Senator Chuck Grassley, the top Republican on the Senate Budget Committee, is keeping a tight leash on the purse strings and is committed to fighting for fiscally responsible policies.

**We cannot afford to let this happen.

subject: URGENT → Warrior needs YOUR help

body:
We need your support for a soldier wrongly accused and convicted!| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=263922d60abd4c3b9eeb33900d090c51&_e=cph2bZBMk9N6YqAbvEzXB-jlZ1RhPPX6xnZcLoXWNyXZYZv2Y1W3NwWWX-y0OmmrCRowSNh8bTwSucxj2EW955Nkkyig-feHULUL2eYEot5u2WEJLtYiFvOJHfSCb_QwK2IHHJbpIDhlFDN6x27Th0bvK4XPIrZCvdj4m9tdYC8afDk_T2JNfZNmpcI4-Hv8PP1Hjds21sJYUA-gY2HZgsFD2SNhKrPL3ghA6rwkz8Jv8JpkIo1uzeun3phkrUdxoU87aAT_InxgTPJkUgKSWfpjGBNGlurRBakSyl3H3bRhklgGVg-oUIQ2I6xg-3W7FEi8zRrxyYXDDlK5G7E3YZ0fAp0BJqxY692BdEm-l_0TuF8aQe-i_axymy0Co363voEylArQ6JIooHRymNU6_A%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I am contacting you to tell the story of one of our Warriors, U.S. Army Sergeant Derrick Miller.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=263922d60abd4c3b9eeb33900d090c51&_e=cph2bZBMk9N6YqAbvEzXB-jlZ1RhPPX6xnZcLoXWNyXZYZv2Y1W3NwWWX-y0OmmrCRowSNh8bTwSucxj2EW955Nkkyig-feHULUL2eYEot5u2WEJLtYiFvOJHfSCb_QwK2IHHJbpIDhlFDN6x27Th0bvK4XPIrZCvdj4m9tdYC8afDk_T2JNfZNmpcI4-Hv8PP1Hjds21sJYUA-gY2HZgsFD2SNhKrPL3ghA6rwkz8Jv8JpkIo1uzeun3phkrUdxoNyCLOsHWxnS8PeRYaoXDUMzvgTerr-FWt8WsIlpq88D49tG9Z5pcdQtZ38uhJYTIHsz68Vqn6P73J_R89Z25pxeykr9YTKuTLnZcToVG6I6dT4gKgtHfJwzDasrDLGX8pZp14LPtpFy6F56Ca2PiA%3D%3D)
---
Raised in Frederick, Maryland, SGT Miller joined the MD National Guard in 2006 and later volunteered for multiple combat deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan. He was described as a model soldier who was peaceful and calm. **But his life completely changed when he was wrongly accused and convicted of premeditated murder.** Here’s what happened while SGT Miller was deployed in Afghanistan in 2010... Atta Mohemmed was detained on suspicion of transporting weapons and enemy combatants. SGT Miller reencountered him and recognized him from the day before with “100 percent certainty.” Concerned for the safety of his fellow soldiers, Miller went to an open area with an Afghan interpreter and a fellow soldier to question Mohemmed. But, once SGT Miller started asking questions, Mohemmed's story COMPLETELY unraveled.
* He claimed to be an electrician, then a plumber...yet had no tools for either job.
* He claimed he couldn't drive...then they found truck keys on his person.

As the questioning intensified, Mohemmed reached for SGT Miller's pistol, and a fight broke out. Miller fired a shot and killed Mohemmed. Less than an hour later, Derrick's unit came under well-aimed enemy fire, proving the enemy benefited from surveillance of the units’ leaders' locations, vehicles, and defensive positions. **Thankfully, SGT Derrick Miller's actions put the unit on full alert, and NO American lives were lost.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=263922d60abd4c3b9eeb33900d090c51&_e=cph2bZBMk9N6YqAbvEzXB-jlZ1RhPPX6xnZcLoXWNyXZYZv2Y1W3NwWWX-y0OmmrCRowSNh8bTwSucxj2EW955Nkkyig-feHULUL2eYEot5u2WEJLtYiFvOJHfSCb_QwK2IHHJbpIDhlFDN6x27Th0bvK4XPIrZCvdj4m9tdYC8afDk_T2JNfZNmpcI4-Hv8PP1Hjds21sJYUA-gY2HZgsFD2SNhKrPL3ghA6rwkz8Jv8JpkIo1uzeun3phkrUdxDBvfVVpfuSCwuyBYlu8DTAHLOPkWNxTUMDAa0LFc2emEGbjh19yfZGp2YyyQuv27Kgpk4_mhmHN-_DOFKvWLZrT0xX9_7UoPLcbqT3ULPMvZ0cZqZWV4wHPcwa_EJcu6uioSTQq0bMKPdeq7RKevlg%3D%3D)
---
Even though a thorough investigation never took place and no photos of Mohemmed’s body were presented, SGT Miller was found guilty of "premeditated murder – and faced LIFE in prison. [**__THIS IS WRONG >>__**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=263922d60abd4c3b9eeb33900d090c51&_e=cph2bZBMk9N6YqAbvEzXB-jlZ1RhPPX6xnZcLoXWNyXZYZv2Y1W3NwWWX-y0OmmrCRowSNh8bTwSucxj2EW955Nkkyig-feHULUL2eYEot5u2WEJLtYiFvOJHfSCb_QwK2IHHJbpIDhlFDN6x27Th0bvK4XPIrZCvdj4m9tdYC8afDk_T2JNfZNmpcI4-Hv8PP1Hjds21sJYUA-gY2HZgsFD2SNhKrPL3ghA6rwkz8Jv8JpkIo1uzeun3phkrUdxjdv6ml0om-vq7QNi9u4urm2MhzwhcjWl5fe2Qa8n45WiItVwGBKiU1C96veOfwO6adhe4PC3vtivwrZJIaTx5nUGlp-YM39VgpwUTWEVY3ReDIWxzEpuHe0sczyx9WA6E643QBP8JEIWTW94oM8OCw%3D%3D) The bogus conviction was based SOLELY on the testimony of an interpreter that was granted asylum and a path to American citizenship, all with the Army’s help, and a scared soldier whose testimony changed drastically after being threatened by investigators. **Peter, the team at United American Patriots fought to get him released on parole.****We succeeded, but now it’s time to clear his name fully!** United American Patriots needs more grassroots supporters like you to fuel our fight. [**_Rush in a donation now to our Warrior Fund to help get SGT. Derrick Miller’s name fully cleared once and for all._**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=263922d60abd4c3b9eeb33900d090c51&_e=cph2bZBMk9N6YqAbvEzXB-jlZ1RhPPX6xnZcLoXWNyXZYZv2Y1W3NwWWX-y0OmmrCRowSNh8bTwSucxj2EW955Nkkyig-feHULUL2eYEot5u2WEJLtYiFvOJHfSCb_QwK2IHHJbpIDhlFDN6x27Th0bvK4XPIrZCvdj4m9tdYC8afDk_T2JNfZNmpcI4-Hv8PP1Hjds21sJYUA-gY2HZgsFD2SNhKrPL3ghA6rwkz8Jv8JpkIo1uzeun3phkrUdxjFCtfp3D2cvqWjqt03s4-1RZUeWJID-yC9DEdFldPEAmm3Y1ruskDl1TGPlk8ILNU7s8PL4MCOG_d3gSL5vUZ0XUH_IezZXxDRH8eh7p-vk1zxZo6fyjBGI9hG08Ft0PCiB0teSzSq5A89SgMsBpmg%3D%3D)

clean_body: We need your support for a soldier wrongly accused and convicted!| | | Peter, I am contacting you to tell the story of one of our Warriors, U.S. Army Sergeant Derrick Miller. Raised in Frederick, Maryland, SGT Miller joined the MD National Guard in 2006 and later volunteered for multiple combat deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan. He was described as a model soldier who was peaceful and calm. But his life completely changed when he was wrongly accused and convicted of premeditated murder. Here’s what happened while SGT Miller was deployed in Afghanistan in 2010... Atta Mohemmed was detained on suspicion of transporting weapons and enemy combatants. SGT Miller reencountered him and recognized him from the day before with “100 percent certainty.” Concerned for the safety of his fellow soldiers, Miller went to an open area with an Afghan interpreter and a fellow soldier to question Mohemmed. But, once SGT Miller started asking questions, Mohemmed's story COMPLETELY unraveled. He claimed to be an electrician, then a plumber...yet had no tools for either job. He claimed he couldn't drive...then they found truck keys on his person. As the questioning intensified, Mohemmed reached for SGT Miller's pistol, and a fight broke out. Miller fired a shot and killed Mohemmed. Less than an hour later, Derrick's unit came under well-aimed enemy fire, proving the enemy benefited from surveillance of the units’ leaders' locations, vehicles, and defensive positions. Thankfully, SGT Derrick Miller's actions put the unit on full alert, and NO American lives were lost. Even though a thorough investigation never took place and no photos of Mohemmed’s body were presented, SGT Miller was found guilty of "premeditated murder – and faced LIFE in prison. The bogus conviction was based SOLELY on the testimony of an interpreter that was granted asylum and a path to American citizenship, all with the Army’s help, and a scared soldier whose testimony changed drastically after being threatened by investigators. Peter, the team at United American Patriots fought to get him released on parole.We succeeded, but now it’s time to clear his name fully! United American Patriots needs more grassroots supporters like you to fuel our fight. Our Heroes put themselves in harm’s way for our freedom. We owe it to Warriors like SGT Miller to fight for their freedom when they’re wrongly accused of crimes, which is what we do here at UAP. I hope you’ll join us in this critical mission by contributing to our Warrior Fund at this link: Semper Fi’ David “Bull” GurfeinLtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. | | They're all up for reelection in 2024 [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59945206/395576726/118143280?sourceid=1048732&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RhNWJmOS1kOWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qidOd5gsbporvUIDyr2H3WSjenmx8drNZvjyeR9KwlI=&emci=b0da5bf9-d9be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b3da5bf9-d9be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

We're always glad to kick off a new election cycle, but this cycle, we're especially excited — because in 2024, superstar senators like **Sens. Elizabeth Warren (MA)** , **Mazie Hirono (HI)** , and **Jacky Rosen (NV)** are running for reelection. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59945207/395576727/118143280?sourceid=1048732&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RhNWJmOS1kOWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qidOd5gsbporvUIDyr2H3WSjenmx8drNZvjyeR9KwlI=&emci=b0da5bf9-d9be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b3da5bf9-d9be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) ⚾ We've been proud to stand with **Sen. Elizabeth Warren (MA)** for more than a decade. In fact, former EMILYs List President Stephanie Schriock helped convince her to run for Senate back in 2011. Throughout her career, Elizabeth has maintained a clear vision for how to build a better America, worked hard to put power in the hands of the people, and campaigned again and again for progressive values. We can't wait to see what she'll do in her third term.

🌴 Not only is **Sen. Mazie Hirono (HI)** a tireless fighter for women and families, but she's also an exceptional trailblazer. She is: the _first_ elected woman senator from Hawai'i, the _first_ Asian American woman elected to the Senate, the _first_ senator born in Japan, and the _first_ Buddhist senator in U.S. history. Throughout her decade-long tenure in the Senate, she has been an outspoken advocate for women, immigrants, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and the working class. We know that, if she wins reelection, she will continue to champion those who need it most — and that's why we're so proud to call her a member of the EMILYs List family.

🎲 **Sen. Jacky Rosen (NV)** brings her incredible work ethic, passion, and determination to every day of her political career — first as a member of the House and then, two years later, as a U.S. senator. Not only did Jacky unseat an incumbent Republican senator in a quintessential swing state during the 2018 election, but she also became the first woman freshman House member to win a Senate seat — ever. Her upcoming run will be one of the closest and most-watched races of 2024, and we'll be with her every step of the way.

Each of these women is an extraordinary pro-choice fighter with a remarkable record of justice and integrity. It's our job to help make sure they _all_ get another term in the Senate. ****Donate now toward our $150,000 Save the Senate fund and help reelect Democratic pro-choice women like Elizabeth, Mazie, and Jacky to the Senate in 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Lets-Save-The-Senate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59945214/395576734/118143280?sourceid=1048732&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RhNWJmOS1kOWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qidOd5gsbporvUIDyr2H3WSjenmx8drNZvjyeR9KwlI=&emci=b0da5bf9-d9be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b3da5bf9-d9be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team

clean_body: | | | They're all up for reelection in 2024 Peter, We're always glad to kick off a new election cycle, but this cycle, we're especially excited — because in 2024, superstar senators like Sens. Elizabeth Warren (MA) , Mazie Hirono (HI) , and Jacky Rosen (NV) are running for reelection. ⚾ We've been proud to stand with Sen. Elizabeth Warren (MA) for more than a decade. In fact, former EMILYs List President Stephanie Schriock helped convince her to run for Senate back in 2011. Throughout her career, Elizabeth has maintained a clear vision for how to build a better America, worked hard to put power in the hands of the people, and campaigned again and again for progressive values. We can't wait to see what she'll do in her third term. 🌴 Not only is Sen. Mazie Hirono (HI) a tireless fighter for women and families, but she's also an exceptional trailblazer. She is: the first elected woman senator from Hawai'i, the first Asian American woman elected to the Senate, the first senator born in Japan, and the first Buddhist senator in U.S. history. Throughout her decade-long tenure in the Senate, she has been an outspoken advocate for women, immigrants, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and the working class. We know that, if she wins reelection, she will continue to champion those who need it most — and that's why we're so proud to call her a member of the EMILYs List family. 🎲 Sen. Jacky Rosen (NV) brings her incredible work ethic, passion, and determination to every day of her political career — first as a member of the House and then, two years later, as a U.S. senator. Not only did Jacky unseat an incumbent Republican senator in a quintessential swing state during the 2018 election, but she also became the first woman freshman House member to win a Senate seat — ever. Her upcoming run will be one of the closest and most-watched races of 2024, and we'll be with her every step of the way. Each of these women is an extraordinary pro-choice fighter with a remarkable record of justice and integrity. It's our job to help make sure they all get another term in the Senate. **Donate now toward our $150,000 Save the Senate fund and help reelect Democratic pro-choice women like Elizabeth, Mazie, and Jacky to the Senate in 2024: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. clean_body: The far-right group American Action Network just announced an investment of OVER $2 MILLION on ads attacking me and other House Democrats. | = | Peter, I know the next election seems far away, but Republicans are already spending big in their attacks against me – so we can’t afford to slow down our campaign for even one day. The far-right group American Action Network just announced an investment of OVER $2 MILLION on ads attacking me and other House Democrats. = | = With our race already being called a toss-up by national experts, we can’t risk falling behind in our fundraising now. Republicans know they can’t hold on to their razor-thin House majority without flipping this seat, so they’ll do everything they can to unseat me and replace me with another rubber stamp for their far-right agenda. We’ve won tough races before, and I know we can do it again, but we need to prepare right away. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. If we leave this unresolved, we risk letting our fundraising efforts spiral – something we can’t afford, especially in the last month of the quarter.
March is going to come and go and at the end of it, our numbers will be publicly reported and the GOP will look at every dollar we’ve raised under a microscope. They’ll be on the lookout for any signs of weakness to show that this district is flippable.
Our projections are exact in the amount that we need to raise each week. We stayed on track in 2022 and kept NV-03 blue as a result, and we need to do the same for 2024.

The United States of America as we know it is on the verge of complete and total destruction if we lose in 2024. But we want to do something new - something unique - that lets you share your opinion and improves our odds of winning in 2024.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=18dfe7cdef6b44debfa85858f356364a&_e=72HKLhn7bRnsa9opaGnwZdCSBzawd7kDGj5OTbiW_8K8BtXnkXqqdYVotfd-WNTuh8bUpeaRWlCxK9sfAywF8KNJq6Tzvukzgn7sGqtHAwvpLOh78v1VFUgJ1UgxjSXaPZ5tOQT5eG7f2Y5E6ZnPgo2IibU7gFp9aiZLERcLePMKZrypK3_11rIkvWiefhySbwzcoOQiI-tN5smLHrUMDYB0diB7h4LyvGJmRIg1gjCrqnkJMbAiD_rogG-ZMM-gmu9Z3_IPvqaEoejEfHeFQKkCV3XlB1cnZsLhESKQF_NvEj01e3XqHdOA5jwwXeVjwuvjHofF77ikJB8nJvcURXAQ6xOOo7Mtkh7_3OXnSJQM_pHFk2ikLRAr9psSaA0BwzCC2Da8xKz53o5dMvX913GQQ7PCSbN1XY4y4Bk90Y5JhJOMgpzZUeyFkSFkC3dx1v-Z9cGH6Ulh-oFySnWsvA%3D%3D)

name: Team DPVA
subject: Parents or Politics?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Protect Virginia’s public schools!

|
---
Derek, Tonight, Glenn Youngkin is set to take the stage on CNN, sitting down for an “Education Town Hall.” Virginians know firsthand the impact of Governor Youngkin’s failed education policies, and the political points he has attempted to score at the expense of our public education system. Youngkin centered his 2021 campaign around the “threat” of culture war boogie men, like Critical Race Theory, ran campaign ads featuring people who have called for banning books, and fomented anger directed towards autonomous school boards around the Commonwealth — anger that would eventually turn violent in some areas of the country. Glenn Youngkin has made these policies the heart of his education agenda. From promoting legislation that actively endangers Transgender students, to calling on his Department of Education to review AP African American Studies, and defunding public education, Glenn Youngkin’s education policies serve only one purpose: scoring the governor political points for a potential White House run in 2024. **Virginians know that the future of public education is in danger in the Commonwealth.** Glenn Youngkin’s agenda does not put Virginia’s students first. Instead, it denies children safe spaces, obstructs the right to confidentiality, and deprives students of essential educational resources. **[Let’s stand with Virginia’s parents, teachers, and students. name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: When they saw “Trump”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY2OTAifQ/mPqJAvCGKmnwlWHkc4S0KA)
---
Fellow American, **Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security ..._simply because my last name is Trump!_** That's right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this****outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.** ](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY2OTAifQ/wQLTRXft8BUup-c3wptudg)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY2OTAifQ/L6Qe-aT-gvbpgk4DV4MrYw)
---
Fellow American, even if I _were_ related to President Trump (I'm no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call - and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! Fellow American, let's add one more win for free speech to Speech First's Texas Victory Tour. [**Add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.** ](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY2OTAifQ/Pmesshvxp5ZdD2k_7-KDIA) There's barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpSpeech First
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY2OTAifQ/7L86TZD_xatcKO2UsfLvzw)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY2OTAifQ/EXNUjVVErI4hdl5S0LD5VQ)
---

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security ...simply because my last name is Trump! That's right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. Fellow American, even if I were related to President Trump (I'm no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call - and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead? I don't think so! Fellow American, let's add one more win for free speech to Speech First's Texas Victory Tour. There's barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support! Cherise TrumpSpeech First 1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Candace Owens
subject: What legacy do Black Americans want to leave?
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about — the victimhood mentality.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm7vda72lmfmbrck2mv1d9sa4a7o5vssl67t2480_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7bnjn8t2s3o4j5rpnkgoa7tclqqv1h5uqbio2rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1gr97965lkq28kacs7uo041pkd8vn1tuatattu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpncbs1t3t4g7pk0lg9smv5fehe8823uuks9ko28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zerg7ucel1nps59ksf8qmv4v28r2ugcdub3amtr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7lq65oi6dopt36s30dtr5ae5no51men8l3vg1f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdh42ukol3vua5ufj38qllosc3dd88kbbv3ba2k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdvtn25rg64ltb3nh0b2fkemuktiihibb51u9630_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgv89takleikrbt1iopdlku81b8amvpijvcl7ai8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi9csd6dnqssjo4p4f0f5ta426j4us76p4hh918g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjqmr1sri45mvpe3l9nrdtrdovskjj3oajn07t5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o32chh2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7is539nsau2ca3mcvovlojjec8a0ban9pdrdrrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh1q4s5s1lub07p3d73bm3v2rjlhub3sscvkf1qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1pufh7v3ojfkhjah6hd78c16bube6csspm4dmcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb6867t5v5o6ptasmh9p3jll5j439qohp4eqpm78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z11s6mbonvpbspmhtod811s4t286spt5q9knhlt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z95dpihgc49o2h0eshunmtic9h3v8rt40rpi1uio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi88ob6bj858uha5it7tgbr9vv1ee5sgaa8a2njg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeggd5msbsb0etqdq011iacr8260riup0kiuqv8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhha6h4nq3va9apg9c1k4vvu7fuig3k22mq6n55o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm6o31c9h2bs).

Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. | Friend,
---
| When I accepted the Republican nomination in 2016, I declared, "I am your voice."
---
| During my speech at CPAC, I added that _**" I am your warrior. I am your justice. And for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your RETRIBUTION."**_
---
| 2024 is the final battle for America.
---
| Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1992qduqs7ilkddp2f57qgtks18m91b97sjkge0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gmeo76clh2bs)
---
| I also went through some of our big plans that I will do as the 47th President of the United States.
---
| At the top of my list will be stopping the slide into costly and never-ending wars.
---
| **As you know, I was the only president in DECADES who didn 't start a war.**
---
| But I also _COMPLETED_ wars that had already started, including defeating 100% of the ISIS caliphate - which everyone said was impossible to do.
---
| In fact, a certain general said it could only be done in 3 years - if at all. _**I did it in 3 weeks.**_
---
| Before I even arrive at the Oval Office, I will have the disastrous war between Russia and Ukraine settled. I will get the problem solved - and get it solved quickly.
---
| **Instead of spending hundreds of billions of dollars to defend the borders of distant foreign countries, under my leadership, we will defend OUR borders.**
---
| Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country. I built hundreds of miles of wall and completed that task as promised.
---
| When I am back in the White House, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the **LARGEST DOMESTIC DEPORTATION** operation in American History.
---
| I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country - and there will be no questions asked.
---
| _I will also direct the Department of Justice to go after Marxist prosecutors ' offices to make them pay for their illegal, race-based enforcement of the law._
---
| _All of us have seen too many videos of 13-year-old carjackers and 14-year-old hoodlums viciously beating their victims._
---
| My administration will crack down on these out-of-control monsters, young though they may be, and impose tough consequences on juvenile criminals.
---
| I will also fight for PARENTS' RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents.
---
| I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth -- and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.
---
| And we will keep men out of women's sports!
---
| There's no other way to say it: _**our enemies are lunatics and maniacs.**_
---
| **_They cannot stand that they do not own me, they cannot steer me, they cannot shake me, and they will NEVER, EVER control me._**
---
| At the end of the day, ANYONE else could be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.
---
| I alone will NEVER retreat.
---
| But that's why we must stand together...
---
| While the Soros Money Machine, Hollywood, and globalist billionaires - who have made a fortune off of selling out our country - try to defeat our America First movement, grassroots donors like YOU are our only hope of fighting back to save America.
---
| _**[So please, make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1m6u6sr7q9014n14rdok5s7hodh5kc63fgn60mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gmeo76clh2bs "So please, make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund – for 1,300% impact.")**_
---
| Thank you,

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lTEoQUORx5wZeNMW6vSU8Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lTEoQUORx5wZeNMW6vSU8Q&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00786%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a0gd7JsJwKpOusyra3sn7A&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00787%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hrerRyBOrRC3qCZQZJcfXg&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lTEoQUORx5wZeNMW6vSU8Q&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00788%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OXH6%2bIZyrCZVg6ilefDRWg&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00789%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ecp28%2bAizu6rn1s72fWSsg&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00780%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hDD3biLDpOlyBsZ19LjwGw&sysid=1)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651435%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6M1%2fjJkLqZva9APtO8ZnQ&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651435%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6M1%2fjJkLqZva9APtO8ZnQ&sysid=1)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651436%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=joNKGjXj0DIkczzOAL1%2bpA&sysid=1)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651435%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6M1%2fjJkLqZva9APtO8ZnQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651437%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EnK56dNEWtfx7YiTCQ07pg&sysid=1)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651435%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6M1%2fjJkLqZva9APtO8ZnQ&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651438%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZaEExLykfyGVBXNYqNjZ%2bg&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651439%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gXi5g%2fgi2MmLPu8GsDWdjQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651430%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QCiPHLgZWzuZWyUX6s4iiA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p1Tt%2bvhlVILQd6V71JtC9A&sysid=1)
---|---|---

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk7jg0908hb3cqv4o02v2qvoc0m4ileo5fmo1eo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5gm9or4c3h2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: They never stop
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Team Graham will be the key to Securing the Senate in 2024. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581475:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)
---

Fellow American,

Democrats never stop investing in their candidates. They've raised eye-popping sums of money over the last four years because not a day goes by when they aren't raising money.

**Democrat Senate candidates raised $200 million more than Republicans in 2022.** Democrats beat us in the critical races in Georgia, Nevada, Arizona, and Pennsylvania. They had more money to spend attacking our candidates, reaching out to voters, and turning out their supporters. **_That can't happen again in 2024._**

Fellow American, I am asking for your help to make sure conservatives are not outraised or outspent again in 2024. We're focusing on making sure our eventual Republican nominees have every single dollar they need to flip Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia so we can **Secure the Senate** in 2024. [**Will you join me?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581475:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581475:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)
We will not be able to **Secure the Senate** if our candidates continue to get hammered by the Democrats' money machine. [**Please help us start today with a generous split contribution of $10, $25, $50, or more to support our GOP nominees in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581475:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)

[** $25 -> MT, OH, WV **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581477:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)
---

[** $50 -> MT, OH, WV **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581478:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)
---

[** MORE -> MT, OH, WV **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581475:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)
---

These red states are our top pick-up opportunities in 2024. It's up to us - _Team Graham and grassroots Republicans - to make this happen._

I need your help because **Secure the Senate** is a team effort. I have been able to count on the support of Team Graham in tough battles before, and I'm hoping you will step up again to help Republicans take back the United States Senate.

We don't have much time left to turn this country around, so [**I hope you'll stand with me today!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61581475:WqDMDKDyN:m:1:877327319:60496766D068EBAD1EDC6EFADC3802EA:r)

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

name: Nikki Haley
subject: As a mom
body:
I understand what it's like to be a mom in an economy that is failing so many of us
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418780:JscEvPGN5:m:1:3365131770:1B2C94FE342826AD233CCE3E02563095:r)
---
| | |
Peter,

I have a daughter who is getting married and I see how hard it is for her to buy a home and I have a son who has to write papers that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I understand what it's like to be a mom in an economy that is failing so many of us, and I understand what it's like to put 1,000% into everything, even when faced with the most difficult times and impossible decisions. _**I know so many of you understand this too.**_
---
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418780:JscEvPGN5:m:1:3365131770:1B2C94FE342826AD233CCE3E02563095:r)
---
I've watched the American Dream unfold before me. I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough and America can be doing so much better.

**[I'm running for President because America can do better, and I know how.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418780:JscEvPGN5:m:1:3365131770:1B2C94FE342826AD233CCE3E02563095:r "I’m running for President because America can do better, and I know how. ")**

As governor, I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before.**[And I'll do it as your next President.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418780:JscEvPGN5:m:1:3365131770:1B2C94FE342826AD233CCE3E02563095:r " And I’ll do it as your next President.")**

We can revitalize the economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

In Biden's economy, small businesses are struggling to pay rent, families are struggling to pay for groceries, and I know not everyone can afford to chip in right now. **[So if you are someone who can donate, I am humbly asking to give everything you are able to help fuel my efforts and fight for a brighter future.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418780:JscEvPGN5:m:1:3365131770:1B2C94FE342826AD233CCE3E02563095:r "So if you are
someone who can donate, I am humbly asking to give everything you are able to help fuel my efforts and fight for a brighter future. ")**
---

My very best,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418780:JscEvPGN5:m:1:3365131770:1B2C94FE342826AD233CCE3E02563095:r)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |

She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651446%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F2X8vHK6NIAiEKslkUWI1g&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651447%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PaYxx%2bsGaC2zIedAJ9LZTg&sysid=1)

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _“insurrectionists,”_ then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

I know all about this firsthand. I’ve seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I’ve even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

name: Priority Gold
subject: Leaked Video: Is Your Bank Safe? Protect Yourself Now
body:
This is a worrying situation that should concern anyone with money in the bank.

| | |
# **Leaked Gov’t Video: Is Your Money at Risk? Act Now!**
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Back in November financial regulators were caught on tape plotting to hide alarming market signals from depositors to prevent a bank-run panic. **[> > Click here to watch and see them plotting with your own eyes <<](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z649schq2v7jo5ihio3irkr5s82d18608a24se60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)** This is a worrying situation that should concern anyone with money in the bank.

Did you know that the **FDIC insures $9 trillion of bank deposits with only $125 billion worth of assets?**

This means they cannot insure everybody in a crisis when many people want to withdraw their money all at once.

But there's something you can do to protect yourself.

We've created a **[free bank-bail in guide](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z568iqd2qee9cn0470fp1n9jicsmilsdqmjed4hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)** that can help you safeguard your retirement savings and hard-earned money, tax and penalty-free.

**[Download our guide now to learn how you can protect your money.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4uh4p20gb5cgdekt3h6oqdf274ke3v59csebuv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)**

Don't wait until it's too late to take action. Protect your retirement savings now.

To Protecting Your Future, **Priority Gold**

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My hero son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zek3vl9ims4etv5lbr2t96kb9fr6ff4in838v2do_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmn14kpscqqslobehspvobmism4jb4ulkn2mmmc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zobhf2es7f9qln5iim63ob4gn6em04u8mo80gs5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9b39joesn5c377avpkokb6f211sj1nugoba8e30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9kaio0ahnaf1mfh18lfisk85of1v98la3m7ff18_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2cmqippt8gaq7gqpp0p7d42seoon8sigqljfen8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn616v249sroh8q6jr46mi0oigiqcpikbvios1pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za970fro4nh1ddffsvor2bdic2jsftv00qr0d1h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsl1d5o4bp92fad0ijlsp790hb1g0h5efu8r0mi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6inn1oj7r2bu99haoubrs738ta36r04g4odc508_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5imcoj5c1h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, I'm Jessica Anderson, Executive Director at Heritage Action. If you're not familiar with us, **we're the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. ** And right now, we're spearheading a campaign against ESG or Environmental, Social, Governance policies that prioritize left-wing politics and jeopardize your 401k. But we have a real shot at dealing a _devastating_ blow to ESG and Woke companies. Congress just worked to terminate the Biden Administration's rule that allows investment firms to play politics with the retirement savings of **152 MILLION** Americans, for a total of ~**$11.7 TRILLION** in assets. We worked _tirelessly_ to ensure Congress had the votes to reverse this terrible rule. We've activated our vast grassroots network to call their senators to support terminating this ESG rule. These efforts were successful both the House AND the Senate passed a resolution to overturn Biden's pro-ESG regulation.
**But Biden plans to issue his FIRST-EVER VETO against this resolution and we need** _**your support**_**to keep fighting ESG.** **[Will you help us energize and activate grassroots conservatives across the country to Stop ESG with an IMMEDIATE donation?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418799:6-KK-PGNn:m:1:3365131770:EDD0F4556EA4C0395A11B2828BDFB280:r)**

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78126%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IHNs%2bmqY8iximOhZxsEt5A&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78127%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BJT2bo5XN%2b2Rl9IO7q5vDQ&sysid=1)

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

name: Madison Gesiotto Gilbert
subject: The days of career politicians are OVER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Madison for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter,
---
I'm sure that the Radical Left and DC Swamp Rats have called me a few choice words.

And that's fine... Because I've got another phrase they can call me:

**THEIR WORST FREAKIN ' NIGHTMARE! **
Why? Because I see them for what they are: no good, self-serving, America-last SWAMP RATS.

Well, I've had it up to my eyeballs with the status quo. [**It 's about damn time we send a disruptor to Washington.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418803:6A0rHPGCN:m:1:3365131770:FAB7178D1DB6D1DBE0F0028AAD97AC1F:r) And that is exactly what I'll do.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418803:6A0rHPGCN:m:1:3365131770:FAB7178D1DB6D1DBE0F0028AAD97AC1F:r)
---
I've told you before, and I'll tell you again. I am **SICK** of the same old, same old in Washington. I was raised that when you see a problem, you propose a solution. **[And with you by my side, we will be the solution that America so desperately needs.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418803:6A0rHPGCN:m:1:3365131770:FAB7178D1DB6D1DBE0F0028AAD97AC1F:r)**

_The days of career politicians are OVER._

**FIRST ->****Help me retire the Radical career politician I am running against. ** **THEN ->**** Stand beside me as we take the fight to Joe Biden. ** **FINALLY ->**** We will save our country and restore its greatness. **

I'm working against the clock and have only until midnight tonight to show the Radical Left that, once again, they would be fools to bet against me. To bet against us. To bet against the America First Movement.
---
[**RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418803:6A0rHPGCN:m:1:3365131770:FAB7178D1DB6D1DBE0F0028AAD97AC1F:r)
---
Thank you for all that you do,

Madison
