name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jGY%2bNnaQ%2bh6EdzfEIMOHQw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00796%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o703qMnEOWa9JN6uF%2bperQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00797%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jC2lOB4USleuRxXym0Nxnw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L4jIUWMTSxlPDN%2bVzYkp%2fg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7142%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=MwqgKOzBgOevulsa8CAi%2bw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7142%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=MwqgKOzBgOevulsa8CAi%2bw&sysid=1)

The Supreme Court is moments away from announcing their final decision on Joe Biden's Far-Left student loan bailout.

He thinks it's fair for welders, janitors, plumbers, waitresses, bartenders, and construction workers to pay off the student loans of lawyers, doctors, scientists, and young socialists with gender studies degrees.

_What do you think? _

_**[This is your last chance to sound off on this important issue before the Supreme Court rules on the case before them. Hurry!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419661:67d-HPGDN:m:1:3331421248:8FBC5E9F7981466E64C81189B3C27B16:r "This is your last chance to sound
off on this important issue before the Supreme Court rules on the case before them. Hurry!")**_

Thank you,

House Republicans

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=89c5fa5e8da249339ef22206156bb190&_e=4Tre77ZiDTG5QWAI81dKvmCpOmE4sjsfSPoe_ehagz0ugV_aHMyNSvGbNz-fUQAPM_ZwGEZ031nksifkljlENaCQGTVkQW-NJl4KMBMOaaUGd19zyK39nw4JOxjarmzrowc_TVfas4DwKMXsmthJ6XGA9Zvt7w2TXUABkBlgdFN2FelR0jNxNZMIeoIP76BRt0YXjoj9tOr_vQX56dmSyROJ9o2urtvo00a79LAy9-LZnyWN_TBEI4j9FWpcVYnn9ioKKZvJ-3uiui7jMtlLdP6IVJOaefxzpCXOqWiaQECRjyaxC40YBpd4vK5HdIn8dszXZT8kZHCWiDr8hdmXdOPzDht7_WJd-EvlZqViu3S0jh7DvMqSY65ShwX3a26kQM9TojEx-qlXTjPe8A9baw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=89c5fa5e8da249339ef22206156bb190&_e=4Tre77ZiDTG5QWAI81dKvmCpOmE4sjsfSPoe_ehagz0ugV_aHMyNSvGbNz-fUQAPM_ZwGEZ031nksifkljlENaCQGTVkQW-NJl4KMBMOaaUGd19zyK39nw4JOxjarmzrowc_TVfas4DwKMXsmthJ6XGA9Zvt7w2TXUABkBlgdFN2FelR0jNxNZMIeoIP76BRt0YXjoj9tOr_vQX56dmSyROJ9o2urtvo00a79LAy9-LZnyWN_TBEI4j9FWpcVYnnBNde5TcvAezKXTjk5cJ3FkyIKv2ZB2uEvjFetMzt6MsZhFsN1fGAt_CpBYrM-42yEs0hKPXrZ48AoKMLJ0Pf0CKPQopFho_aVGkZXE9jWlfGcRCRbA8Ty7Br-k94SBPuTeAINaNmTUSMNZGYacIwxQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=89c5fa5e8da249339ef22206156bb190&_e=4Tre77ZiDTG5QWAI81dKvmCpOmE4sjsfSPoe_ehagz0ugV_aHMyNSvGbNz-fUQAPM_ZwGEZ031nksifkljlENaCQGTVkQW-NJl4KMBMOaaUGd19zyK39nw4JOxjarmzrowc_TVfas4DwKMXsmthJ6XGA9Zvt7w2TXUABkBlgdFN2FelR0jNxNZMIeoIP76BRt0YXjoj9tOr_vQX56dmSyROJ9o2urtvo00a79LAy9-LZnyWN_TBEI4j9FWpcVYnnEv3EWbhSAl6gaoRdCQFFvvxwHsMNCWRWP1ZRiM5IGBqQgrQXOVOiR6aasybKoSRgb-fgtJSM8SgUzaAFd5zh5YU1QdeSAkNcu__xmNo8iGTsUWVQtdKmSKUH8rZXu1BXx4bwWTVwiHZEopHjrzo7eA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e61788a5c614db7b854bf7260134268&_e=eKEKDw2LP55GJWtsvXyCiHNUZN5_k-M-FcyZmcvNH6zkvNMZhBIPjbLi1O3i_ckuWgt9VoWC2f0NFrnNovG547VBF9vc152T67TK6V1qhtVn-Mi2-_Z4_5ExaL6rdAWdwTj09Gh2scHrL1LiMUyw0HvBW3h700m0W8T0iWp07RUEuWqV728ozeDQznRqxeEV0p8R1i8na0gUTJkcPt4Ozn2ODK_TRU1HBScBpkzqEKPfYjNM6yB1wxPUuR-22CODfioyPlHRCBGCBBQTpELi11yIswCy_DKCtVQVPlu6JRtGbb3twtvOXRTSDd_2NB1xZVbAP0rKPhhJheEZP0-hD8AN0Ltums6UYcN_ImnmmYvRKLnRa7cbnM_JDs_YumpSZ2JbB9aCRLTxkC5U4eRfRFfNjCCG4HAq9ZrUpsr7lzOSxNp-JkUlzLOtFS9h2_PU)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e61788a5c614db7b854bf7260134268&_e=eKEKDw2LP55GJWtsvXyCiHNUZN5_k-M-FcyZmcvNH6zkvNMZhBIPjbLi1O3i_ckuWgt9VoWC2f0NFrnNovG547VBF9vc152T67TK6V1qhtVn-Mi2-_Z4_5ExaL6rdAWdwTj09Gh2scHrL1LiMUyw0HvBW3h700m0W8T0iWp07RUEuWqV728ozeDQznRqxeEV0p8R1i8na0gUTJkcPt4Ozn2ODK_TRU1HBScBpkzqEKPfYjNM6yB1wxPUuR-22CODfioyPlHRCBGCBBQTpELi14zKAVr8hM_CIPuwnXY6witxMiaATcrIr8boFD8gpMUmYein2nYfUN14vM-04L31Y4ezA6Mt5WZ_LoII0xJHjXWwgVFJ6KbFZMCFsnL-ocb7qDjwzQwEDcCA553K6WHrrarfRj_wuSyTzIKwSl-hG2tQG_e9h3eRnNiYMMGJQcBX)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e61788a5c614db7b854bf7260134268&_e=eKEKDw2LP55GJWtsvXyCiHNUZN5_k-M-FcyZmcvNH6zkvNMZhBIPjbLi1O3i_ckuWgt9VoWC2f0NFrnNovG547VBF9vc152T67TK6V1qhtVn-Mi2-_Z4_5ExaL6rdAWdwTj09Gh2scHrL1LiMUyw0HvBW3h700m0W8T0iWp07RUEuWqV728ozeDQznRqxeEV0p8R1i8na0gUTJkcPt4Ozn2ODK_TRU1HBScBpkzqEKPfYjNM6yB1wxPUuR-22CODfioyPlHRCBGCBBQTpELi14DcxYi4xFrK_W1JuUSLbZW9nfA6qp_v6LH6l2phhPcgLoY4vM8HuUTjNBMDbsrgyARckzy1r4MgrSHhfKw6uIOwFETIGEHrfKWRCb5FN_gsTDFOsYi785FpoI_i-FpV3rwSBie5A4Th_vxu7mER8ufUvHsr9UmNX9MULot1_hwy)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e61788a5c614db7b854bf7260134268&_e=eKEKDw2LP55GJWtsvXyCiHNUZN5_k-M-FcyZmcvNH6zkvNMZhBIPjbLi1O3i_ckuWgt9VoWC2f0NFrnNovG547VBF9vc152T67TK6V1qhtVn-Mi2-_Z4_5ExaL6rdAWdwTj09Gh2scHrL1LiMUyw0HvBW3h700m0W8T0iWp07RUEuWqV728ozeDQznRqxeEV0p8R1i8na0gUTJkcPt4Ozn2ODK_TRU1HBScBpkzqEKPfYjNM6yB1wxPUuR-22CODfioyPlHRCBGCBBQTpELi12vuiFRaRhcP0muybSIPUbDN7rRldv8c-1BNgIKDI_NgrON_s7VciDa2xkxF43UO6X8wAmfDvtuYjF2EXOcqGZZTmlPMTpTxKO0Jk7zMP-1QpF8ocQiROQJA45jIyZWdsjbkmOO5cn8j3DAY4MyvHKbmTk04O_WLcQYhY2HXbh0F).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00738%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BFFW7TVdxrwuE1Uj%2b2I%2bZw&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

clean_body: I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. Friend, The government and fake news media are lying to you! They called the January 6th protest a “deadly insurrection,” but the video evidence doesn’t back it up. A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful. We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State. I’m launching the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Support the January 6th Defendants Goal: $33,000 Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation: PENDING The January 6th Committee lied. They lied about how Brian Sicknick died. They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission. They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away. They lied about Ray Epps. If they were “insurrectionists,” then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested? What else are they lying about? I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free. I know all about this firsthand. I’ve seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I’ve even been on the receiving end of their spying. This is just the beginning. The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events. Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. ** Thank you, Kash Patel The Fight With Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. ** Your America News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Candace Owens
subject: Here’s the real disease hurting our communities
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f306952095744feab6d51806c3a7d4f1&_e=fK6_So4LH6nnvMOD9-mSfAV7Z5rH4dgZMP8w4jCHvmDZ36TSt8PorlplZAXk_t_vpW9jE8HU_xEqW8d0FBRorq1xeDI1V1vweTqA-KVH0AiR1-IC8lZXZBp1k2tDl6GktgLE6-CGdgEYQ0hIbR7BaCBJUtfReSszz872CWInUe6Ve_jptdRNSajr-mrzSSxtwXFhQeB1rJtJTTLE-1oWY2nrcNlyEPU9Zm-5ioZhbfcplbMW_pysmFGhFsNKMo7L4xcBb5RFaPl3-9gKRioOFiUXDmLKiLqsIUlUaKPnj1o%3D)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f306952095744feab6d51806c3a7d4f1&_e=fK6_So4LH6nnvMOD9-mSfAV7Z5rH4dgZMP8w4jCHvmDZ36TSt8PorlplZAXk_t_vpW9jE8HU_xEqW8d0FBRorq1xeDI1V1vweTqA-KVH0AiR1-IC8lZXZBp1k2tDl6GktgLE6-CGdgEYQ0hIbR7BaMk2QCfCA2-X7zd8LpO4VveYVMpym9eWWauW4yJ3LrN7xvcjQu0JJ62kVbMGATlpfExxXTS3ba2XnELFgeNjtpOs8t4pYzDFWEX7Y7opRW5wZVDsNcjXIYBGiKT8Lzhcrm6b2NVCQnQkD9wHU7ZtAx4%3D)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f306952095744feab6d51806c3a7d4f1&_e=fK6_So4LH6nnvMOD9-mSfAV7Z5rH4dgZMP8w4jCHvmDZ36TSt8PorlplZAXk_t_vpW9jE8HU_xEqW8d0FBRorq1xeDI1V1vweTqA-KVH0AiR1-IC8lZXZBp1k2tDl6GktgLE6-CGdgEYQ0hIbR7BaKALFY-sT4G9rZTPWvQXqszUD7unEIJ9G8cubfzrqGY4NIx2UZI0k-qc4O4Z6gXVXgz8Mg0Ac48uT3AXQ37DYnB1lbSdrA-8UhPZ489Dt-RyIjJUZz_d5YDF2lngde4Tda_SXHkk3oCV6NGs4-5JYgE%3D)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f306952095744feab6d51806c3a7d4f1&_e=fK6_So4LH6nnvMOD9-mSfAV7Z5rH4dgZMP8w4jCHvmDZ36TSt8PorlplZAXk_t_vpW9jE8HU_xEqW8d0FBRorq1xeDI1V1vweTqA-KVH0AiR1-IC8lZXZBp1k2tDl6GkDTsKARKyEY8Q9KkjcaUvTzmmETc_eWIFYsr_JONNVddIrHFKn-DDWmoCKFViKX8xk1OX3cKIqlr-ZmN5praJC0EytANJrEFIj3WJGFEoYG6nKhOHgEibm6d3G7_fkI9usA9FaHPAA4tdOi7QTBBGBrAzWqxtsihqV257YHB8PbE%3D)

clean_body: There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
My team intercepted an internal Democrat communication from Ilhan Omar to her top supporters

| |
---
| | | This CAN'T be real. My team intercepted an internal Democrat communication from Ilhan Omar to her top supporters, and well, you have to see it to believe it:

---
_**GOOD NEWS:** As it stands, we've received nearly 2.5x as many grassroots contributions in February as we had at this point in January. That's incredible, Judy -- and it's all thanks to grassroots supporters like you stepping up when it mattered most to our campaign._
_-Ilhan Omar_
---

If this is true, we're in _trouble._ Ilhan's radical agenda is _gaining_ steam amongst her leftist base - they're _**flooding**_ her coffers with cash. At this rate, she'll have MILLIONS in the bank to **spread** her socialist ideology and **expand** Democrat control.

Together, we successfully **KICKED** Ilhan off the Foreign Affairs Committee, a great victory for our nation's national security. However, that means she's got _even more_ time on her hands to cozy up to Hollywood donors and leftist elitists.

subject: Just when you think Fox Entertainment has reached the lowest depths of the gutter, with texts proving they knew they were lying to their viewers about "election fraud" and did it anyhow, likely playing a role in incting January 6th, they get worse …
body:
Update on Fox propaganda
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3a62876-9b28-44a3-bcc1-d6dcf0447cbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **Update:**_ Incredibly, just when you think Fox Entertainment (I'll never use "News" in referring to them again) has reached the lowest depths of the gutter, with texts proving they knew they were lying to their viewers about "election fraud" and did it anyhow, likely playing a role in incting January 6th, they get worse._ _**Tucker Carlson's been using the 40,000 hours of Jan 6th video the vile Kevin McCarthy gave only to him, to cherry pick parts of it to pretend the violent coup attempt was a friendly walk in the park.** **Even Mitch McConnell said it was false, and Republian Senator Thom Tillis referred to it as "bullshit."** _**_After all the damage Fox has done to our democracy, to humanity, the unhinged, desipicable Carlson is still trying to destroy us even more. He, and they, must be stopped._** **Please read the rest below for one way we can begin curtailing their disastrous influence on our country.** Cliff On Wed, Mar 8, 2023 at 2:39 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **_Fox News is a propaganda organization._ **_**Dangerous conspiracy-mongers that pollute the minds of millions of Americans, turning them into right-wing kooks and Russian sympathizers. **_ _**[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0fea9ad-eaa0-4882-8c16-5789018ebebc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_ _You may have seen the news re the Dominion Voting Systems' lawsuit vs Fox. It produced texts and emails proving _**Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Sean Hannity, their supposedly *serious newsman* Brett Baier and owner Rupert Murdoch knew Trump's bs about "election fraud" was just that. Bs. But like the treacherous jackals they are, they repeated it anyhow.** _**Because, Fox cares only for ratings and profits, **not anything approaching integrity or their fellow human beings**.** __**Fox has turned tens of millions of Americans against their country, communities and democracy. **_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can promote this video far and wide and begin the process of de-Foxing our country to stabilize our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e82f13a-44e6-47da-9bff-fba4692e7931/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_So, It's a sick joke this station can call itself news, much less be played at our military bases. In fact, one in seven of those who stormed the Capitol in an attempted coup had military experience._** _As an American, and son of a father who spent much of his career on a military base,** it's sickening we allow Fox's cabal of conspiracists anywhere near our military** to convince our troops to not only hate their country, but use their training to attack it._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c7ce8c2-d710-423e-a205-24288b97a642/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_That's why I support VoteVets' effort to get the Pentagon to ban Fox on U.S. military bases, and hope you will too! _**_VoteVets created an outstanding video to make their case, and if we can get them resources, more people will see it. _ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta36f5f18-7af1-4e1c-a5f1-c191ca225034/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can promote this video far and wide and begin the process of de-Foxing our country to stabilize our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T128a6a36-b994-4b96-b68d-bf99af621f90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for taking on this vicious propaganda._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Our Voices were Heard in Hartford
body:
Very proud of everyone who submitted testimony on so many far left election proposals | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/19539808b00c/stand-up-or-shut-up-its-time-to-find-your-voice-13527640?e=8763c56857)
---
# From the Desk of Dominic Rapini
|
---
# We Carried the Fight to Hartford

The GAE committee heard testimony on a variety of legislative proposals over a 7 hour period. Our voices were heard, here is what I had had say about Ranked Choice Voting
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=291b67bb1f&e=8763c56857)
“Ranked Choice Voting violates the American principle of One voter, one vote. “ Opening line of my testimony.
_Be Brave, Be Brief, Be Heard - the 3 B’s!_

What’s on Deck: (Click on Bill to read)
[**Proposed H.B. No. 5714**
Session Year 2023
](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=896c1b8fd8&e=8763c56857)
#### AN ACT CONCERNING INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS AND VOTING

**Principle** : The role of government is to place a priority on law abiding citizens and not return rights to those who have committed acts of murder, rape, robbery, and other offense against society.——————————————————————-[**Proposed H.B. No. 5704**
Session Year 2023](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=ea1c9027c3&e=8763c56857)

#### AN ACT CONCERNING MANDATORY VOTING

**Principle** : Requiring citizens to vote is a violation of the first amendment guaranteeing free speech. Compelling us to vote is coercion and thus compelled speech. As Americans we have to right to be silent and therefore the choice not to vote.——————————————————————-[**Proposed H.B. No. 5701**
Session Year 2023](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=f712077323&e=8763c56857)

#### **AN ACT INSTITUTING RANKED-CHOICE VOTING FOR MUNICIPAL, STATE AND FEDERAL ELECTIONS**

**Principle** : Ranked Choice Voting is a Ponzi scheme that violates the American practice of One Voter, One Vote. The complexity of RCV will suppress voters and diminish civic engagement. We shouldn’t need an instruction manual to vote.
**Ranked Choice Voting is a Ponzi scheme - Read here:**[**LINK**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=9e3746e42e&e=8763c56857)

# Take Action and email the GAE Chairs your position on the proposed election legistlation
| [Email GAE Chair - Mae Flexer ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=a0a49841fc&e=8763c56857)
---
| [Email GAE Chair - Matt Blumenthal ](mailto:Matt.Blumenthal@cga.ct.gov)

| Peter,
New evidence proves that, just before the 2020 Lockdowns, **Dr. Fauci commissioned a paper to HIDE the origins of Covid...**
...and cover up the fact that he was **involved in gain-of-function research** at the Wuhan Institute of Virology.

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhtvrok9hmnd77tohg3519c12m4pa44poi15oqm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5jm0pj4c5h2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z30pbq04tnou7e8qnpvqhcuk6efdm34v9t6dicsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5jm0pj4c5h2bs)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

# _House Democrats Show Us Who They Really Are, Again_
---
U.S. House Republicans once again went on the offense, and U.S. House Democrats once again showed us who they _really_ are. A few weeks ago, the U.S. House took up a Republican-led resolution disapproving of the Washington, D.C. Council's decision to revise their criminal code. The revision, as the White House itself stated, would have reduced maximum penalties "for offenses like murders and other homicides, armed home invasion burglaries, armed carjackings, armed robberies, unlawful gun possession, and some sexual assault offenses." _The Washington Post_ Editorial Board added that it would further tie “the hands of police and prosecutors while overwhelming courts.” When the votes were tallied, 173 House Democrats, including Indiana's two lone Democrats, Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson, voted against the resolution. If you were wondering, that's _81 percent_ of House Democrats. Weeks after the vote, when it became clear that the resolution would pass the U.S. Senate, President Joe Biden stated that he would sign it — a huge flip-flop that left House Democrats out to dry. Later, it was reported that those 173 House Democrats “voted along with what they thought was the White House’s stance..." So that begs the question: **Do House Democrats like Reps. Mrvan and Carson value criminals over law-abiding citizens or do they just vote however they think Joe Biden wants them to?** Neither is acceptable, and both serve as a great reminder of the important work we have ahead of us to not just keep the U.S. House, but to take back the U.S. Senate and elect a Republican president in 2024. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**

# _An Update on East Palestine, Ensuring Safety_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** meets with crew members of the USS Indiana earlier in the week._
---
On Wednesday,**Governor Eric Holcomb** released the results of third-party testing of material brought from the site of the East Palestine train derailment. The results indicated that the material doesn't contain any harmful levels of dioxins when compared to acceptable levels established by the EPA. Additionally, at **Governor Holcomb's** request, the EPA agreed to pause further shipments of material until further testing is conducted. His full statement on the results can be found below. _"Pace Labs has completed and shared the full results of their third-party dioxin testing I had ordered and expedited last week. Initial samples were taken on Saturday morning, March 4, and testing began that same day at their Minneapolis laboratory._ _"These results indicate that the material tested does not contain any harmful levels of dioxins when compared to acceptable levels established by the EPA. Furthermore, these results demonstrate that the site operator is lawfully permitted to dispose of that material at its site. We have informed the EPA and the site operator of these testing results._ _"We will have Pace Labs continue to test samples of any future loads that may arrive in Indiana from East Palestine to confirm that none of the material contains harmful levels of dioxins."_

| | |

# _National Review: Biden’s Budget Includes $5.5 Trillion in Tax Hikes_

---
As the _New York Times_ put it, President Biden's proposed budget **["doubles down on the power of government."](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/4e090da6300dc1f5/8d1ce46e2c48ec9bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) **It also increases IRS funding by an [additional 15%](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/4e090da6300dc1f5/1d719cbf35d0cb4fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) on top of the additional **$80 billion** it received in the so-called "Inflation Reduction Act." From _[National Review](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/4e090da6300dc1f5/a38d9ccf0ccd657cc3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : President Biden on Thursday unveiled a budget that has a staggering $5.5 trillion in tax hikes to help finance an expansion of Obamacare, Medicaid, and housing subsidies, as well as a slew of other federal programs. Though the budget claims $3 trillion of deficit savings, that is only when measured against the budget that was already inflated by his first two years in office. While the budget is not going anywhere, given Republican control of the House of Representatives, it does represent Biden’s opening salvo in upcoming negotiations over the budget and raising the debt ceiling._
Story continues._

# _New York Post: Riedl: King of debt Joe Biden absurdly labels himself a ‘deficit hawk’_

---
When you here Democrats claim Joe Biden has reduced the deficit by trillions, send them this. From the _[New York Post](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/4e090da6300dc1f5/caf70578cfd92f44c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : After President Biden spent 2022 claiming that “I have made tackling inflation my top economic priority,” a new report quotes Biden and his advisers unveiling their top economic priority for 2023: deficit reduction. I’m not kidding. How serious is the White House about reining in inflation and deficits? The very same day Politico unveiled the new priority, the Biden administration went to the Supreme Court to defend its illegal — not to mention inflationary and deficit-financed — attempt to unilaterally forgive $400 billion in student loans. The president’s pivot toward deficit reduction brings no actual new savings proposals._
Piece continues._

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | House Democrats Show Us Who They Really Are, Again U.S. House Republicans once again went on the offense, and U.S. House Democrats once again showed us who they really are. A few weeks ago, the U.S. House took up a Republican-led resolution disapproving of the Washington, D.C. Council's decision to revise their criminal code. The revision, as the White House itself stated, would have reduced maximum penalties "for offenses like murders and other homicides, armed home invasion burglaries, armed carjackings, armed robberies, unlawful gun possession, and some sexual assault offenses." The Washington Post Editorial Board added that it would further tie “the hands of police and prosecutors while overwhelming courts.” When the votes were tallied, 173 House Democrats, including Indiana's two lone Democrats, Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson, voted against the resolution. If you were wondering, that's 81 percent of House Democrats. Weeks after the vote, when it became clear that the resolution would pass the U.S. Senate, President Joe Biden stated that he would sign it — a huge flip-flop that left House Democrats out to dry. Later, it was reported that those 173 House Democrats “voted along with what they thought was the White House’s stance..." So that begs the question: Do House Democrats like Reps. Mrvan and Carson value criminals over law-abiding citizens or do they just vote however they think Joe Biden wants them to? Neither is acceptable, and both serve as a great reminder of the important work we have ahead of us to not just keep the U.S. House, but to take back the U.S. Senate and elect a Republican president in 2024. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | An Update on East Palestine, Ensuring Safety | | Governor Eric Holcomb meets with crew members of the USS Indiana earlier in the week. On Wednesday,Governor Eric Holcomb released the results of third-party testing of material brought from the site of the East Palestine train derailment. The results indicated that the material doesn't contain any harmful levels of dioxins when compared to acceptable levels established by the EPA. Additionally, at Governor Holcomb's request, the EPA agreed to pause further shipments of material until further testing is conducted. His full statement on the results can be found below. "Pace Labs has completed and shared the full results of their third-party dioxin testing I had ordered and expedited last week. Initial samples were taken on Saturday morning, March 4, and testing began that same day at their Minneapolis laboratory. "These results indicate that the material tested does not contain any harmful levels of dioxins when compared to acceptable levels established by the EPA. Furthermore, these results demonstrate that the site operator is lawfully permitted to dispose of that material at its site. We have informed the EPA and the site operator of these testing results. "We will have Pace Labs continue to test samples of any future loads that may arrive in Indiana from East Palestine to confirm that none of the material contains harmful levels of dioxins." | | | National Review: Biden’s Budget Includes $5.5 Trillion in Tax Hikes As the New York Times put it, President Biden's proposed budget It also increases IRS funding by an on top of the additional $80 billion it received in the so-called "Inflation Reduction Act." From : President Biden on Thursday unveiled a budget that has a staggering $5.5 trillion in tax hikes to help finance an expansion of Obamacare, Medicaid, and housing subsidies, as well as a slew of other federal programs. Though the budget claims $3 trillion of deficit savings, that is only when measured against the budget that was already inflated by his first two years in office. While the budget is not going anywhere, given Republican control of the House of Representatives, it does represent Biden’s opening salvo in upcoming negotiations over the budget and raising the debt ceiling. Story continues. | This Week at the Statehouse Legislators are back at the statehouse, with committee work resuming and bills clearing. Check out the status of priority bills, and those of the and , by visiting You can also watch committee and floor proceedings LIVE or view archives by clicking . | Statement by Chairman Kyle Hupfer on the Republican-led Resolution to Stop Washington, D.C.’s Criminal Code Revision For a text version, click . | New York Post: Riedl: King of debt Joe Biden absurdly labels himself a ‘deficit hawk’ When you here Democrats claim Joe Biden has reduced the deficit by trillions, send them this. From the : After President Biden spent 2022 claiming that “I have made tackling inflation my top economic priority,” a new report quotes Biden and his advisers unveiling their top economic priority for 2023: deficit reduction. I’m not kidding. How serious is the White House about reining in inflation and deficits? The very same day Politico unveiled the new priority, the Biden administration went to the Supreme Court to defend its illegal — not to mention inflationary and deficit-financed — attempt to unilaterally forgive $400 billion in student loans. The president’s pivot toward deficit reduction brings no actual new savings proposals. Piece continues. | Now Hiring Interns If you know a college student that's interested in stepping into the world of Hoosier politics, we've got them covered. We're looking for young, talented Hoosiers to join us at our headquarters in Indianapolis. This opportunity allows them to get hands-on experience working for Indiana's largest and most successful political organization, providing administrative support to staff and taking on special projects (and more) while helping build their resume, gain insight into the political and legislative processes, and make valuable connections. And we'll do this all while helping them earn college credit. Have someone in mind? name: Rep. Eric Swalwell
subject: These House GOP “whistleblowers” have about as much credibility as Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend,

In his latest attempt to prove the government has been “weaponized” against conservatives, Jim Jordan is claiming that “dozens” of whistleblowers have come to his office with stories of discrimination and bias.

Here’s the kicker, though: Of these “dozens” of whistleblowers, only three have actually come in for interviews with the committee. And while none of them have had their claims validated by the proper authorities, two of them have been verified as recipients of financial help from a Trump ally.

As if that weren’t shady enough, the rest of Jordan’s “witnesses” who haven't come in for interviews are suspended by the FBI for being at the Capitol on January 6th.

At this point, I’m not surprised by the lengths MAGA Republicans like Jim Jordan will go to distort the irrefutable facts of the January 6th Insurrection or make martyrs of the very people who actually weaponized our democracy — but I am determined to stop it.

Join my fight to take back the House and ensure Jim Jordan and his committee of insurrectionists don’t get another opportunity to stand in the way of justice in 2024 by making a donation of any amount today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-March2023-FR-StopMaga?refcode=E20540-20230310-Whistleblowers-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

KEEP INSURRECTIONISTS OUT OF CONGRESS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-March2023-FR-StopMaga?refcode=E20540-20230310-Whistleblowers-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

These House GOP “whistleblowers” have about as much credibility as Fox “News.” It’s clear that facts just don’t matter to MAGA Republicans — and team, we have to make sure that democracy deniers like Jim Jordan don’t have another opportunity to wreak havoc on Capitol Hill.

I’m fighting to take back our majority and keep our government out of the hands of people who would rather see our government burn than uphold the most fundamental part of our democracy: our vote. If you’re with me, please donate whatever you can to my re-election campaign so we can reclaim the House and keep these insurrectionists out of Congress for good. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-March2023-FR-StopMaga?refcode=E20540-20230310-Whistleblowers-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

— Rep. Eric Swalwell

Session is over. And despite what my opponents say, I have been one of the most effective senators AGAIN in standing for what's right and passing legislation!

Truth is, I'm the most effective Legislator in this race- and it's all for the right causes.

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==)

---
Ask yourself this: What on this list- this massive list- is something you'd disagree with?
The fact that I got several bills through a deeply divided General Assembly is a minor miracle. And it speaks to how effective- even in principle- I am.
[I take my oath seriously, and I get things done. That's why I need you to rush a donation of $100 so I can keep fighting for you, getting your own priorities achieved.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==) [Donate $100 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==) [ Donate Any Amount Today! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==)
One thing about RINOs- they NEVER get anything done. Why? Because they never seek office to DO anything. They seek office to BE something.
My opponents don't want to DO anything. They are running so they can BE someone. And they would be terrible in the Senate.
RINOs seek office to hold a title. I never cared about a title. I'm in this to save Virginia.
[I NEED you to join my team and support my re-election campaign. While I was getting things done for YOU in session, I couldn't raise money. My opponents could. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==) [March 31 is a huge deadline for me! Donate $100 or more today! I need your help today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O74XfU0fd_qa3TAOScdYJUeH3QRkBa3ixeK0ogvbKMmhFVTg6kxTR2TbGHDaOTZCpKZZfizP0nSo9o4td49fnW8Gz4N-TfDSiaDAFDP8igdPNZ-2QJjcWLY4sUruou93r9tndniUVUAvPqC67IS00lV7kc-gwT8E8fjVvGsahdg=&c=-QTHA5wa-EkIr8Cem3WYlFOXNfSG0KrOwr7N-I59Gra2SbeimjTIqw==&ch=BzDUaKW5yMRpehHWN8nt5mHf5VrQ3do81FUUNgofaDkAzpRbrwg05w==)

name: Add Your Name via Left Action
subject: Support President Biden's Billionaire Tax to make the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Don’t let billionaires evade income taxes. Make them pay a minimum rate >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T850fd598-747b-4cc6-93f3-e5bf39867abf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c91be96-9743-42b2-8f58-ffa27e27c8a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **There are billionaires in America paying a lower income tax rate than their secretaries. There are some paying no income tax at all.** This is just plain wrong, which is why [President Biden has proposed that billionaires pay a rate of at least 25%.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda04882a-b6a5-4489-a183-40f224b2c66f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is eminently reasonable, and it has broad support among Americans across the political spectrum. **And yet, Republicans in congress refuse to pass it.** Don't let them get away with it. We need to keep up the pressure, and make them feel the political pain. We can win this one, if enough people speak out. [**Add your name, and tell congress to Make Billionaires Pay a Minimum Income Tax >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3f2b197-d67b-4f4f-855c-91738319ce15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgrof3f4f45ralifj4nlngml115la9gm8c83i970_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5jmcp74cjh2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6gh335dev9g9faf6m007ofg1n6db47hoe82e8ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s5jmcp74cjh2bs)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: My Houston Roots: Acres Homes
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Dear Friend,
In our final installment of our My Houston Roots video series join me as I take a walk down Victory in Acres Homes. I chat about my home church - St. Monica Catholic Church and how God, faith, family and service were pillars of my childhood and helped lay the foundation for my journey in service.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pp7U0BLe0BY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pp7U0BLe0BY]
We hope you have enjoyed each video in our series and if you are interested in learning more about you can view each them on our campaign’s YouTube Page by clicking [https://www.youtube.com/@AKEdwardsTX] here [https://www.youtube.com/@AKEdwardsTX] .

name: Jon Soltz
subject: VoteVets knows what it takes to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Out of 107 million votes cast, that’s the amount that cost Democrats the House.
#
Jon Soltz here.
I co-founded VoteVets 17 years ago, after I got back from my second tour in Iraq.
The Iraq War was a disaster, and the reason it happened was because of who got elected to the White House.
And to me, the best way to stop that from happening again was to raise the voices of Veterans — Democratic and progressive Veterans, their families, and allies — in Washington and beyond.
Since then, we’ve become the **5th largest Super PAC supporting Democrats.** We’ve had a lot of wins. We’ve done a lot of good work.
And the next chapter in that work is winning back — and expanding — Democratic majorities in 2024.
**[Are you with us? There’s no better way to get the job done than a donation of $3, right now. We’re coming up on our first quarterly FEC deadline of the year, so we’ve got to make this month a big one.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230310-1-subs&t=1&akid=7778%2E3013755%2EgGooNc)
If we haven’t convinced you yet, listen to this:
Less than 6,700 votes is all it took in 2022.
Out of 107 million votes cast, that’s the amount that cost Democrats the House.
We have a huge opportunity ahead of us to kick Kevin McCarthy out of the Speaker’s office, and who better to take the fight to dangerous and dysfunctional Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz than Veterans?
Candidates who understand service and sacrifice, and are willing to do the hard work to bring our country together.
**[So, how about it: $3 today to take back the House in 2024. We’ll work in races others can’t. We’ll put every dollar behind candidates who can win. And every step of the way, we’ll use data and military precision to target and guide our campaigns.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230310-1-subs&t=2&akid=7778%2E3013755%2EgGooNc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.cr5sY4&refcode=em230310-1-subs&t=23&akid=7778%2E3013755%2EgGooNc)**

****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.anjnsY&refcode=em230310-1-subs&t=24&akid=7778%2E3013755%2EgGooNc)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $250 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2930?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.kA-3Gz&refcode=em230310-1-subs&t=25&akid=7778%2E3013755%2EgGooNc)**

VoteVets knows what it takes to win. And with your help today, we’ll do it.
With resolve and determination,
Jon Soltz

I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. **But here's the thing:**
**I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today.**
From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, **the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy.**
But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning _could actually happen._

**That's why this is urgent.** **We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW.**

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dc06b7ae29904804b15c436ac2052906&_e=Ldm-djcpN6iiyQxYiKevzX-VnshK52w9BLeUKEY_gOMd1C6oU2kajgvVkYpJm5H2B5iEVtKxD_1lSMXVD3VDH0AOauu3ot2RNAgoOHRXD6JW7xJm1PQpWmLTuIJRDn4omKr-q6lUmwrEI0-InJckCM4GsSoFw_cj9hNDrK2qy_Fz9Z13fuomF2ynVusYmqRKFgLIxh6SB-4DEKHUxuECSU0jF8r_vpFq6rd8nPAkKK2ytjVNwga-Atd1fXS3aGK2)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

| | **BREAKING: DAN KILDEE NAMED TO HOUSE DEMOCRATS’ FRONTLINE PROGRAM**

Our race is once again one of the most competitive races across the country in 2024, and National Republicans are getting ready to spend big to defeat us.

**[Support Dan with a $20.24 donation in the first 24 hours following this announcement→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59964055/395624911/-630420539?amount=20.24&contactdata=L9z9B4UBv4GKAF1BmEgdSUn/mYgKOWxcBi/1BMJd8kDERpvtDX46I6XbzIbunPgpcLQAUQHF0pDGcFbzZ8MQbrQ1ET0saa8dmx6BDo8RCVGzaK1Ywp8YUPnJJJcZXeiiJV7bPBxsGNemMxo+DsRD5w==&refcode2=8e6dc918-4ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230310_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZkYzkxOC00ZWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9Rnst0icZ9w1TMKYFOsa2UCGjJaP1nZbD7EtR9FzlA=)**
---

We just found out that Dan is again a part of the House Democrats’ Frontline program. We wanted to take a minute to explain this new announcement, what it means for our campaign, and what you can do to help.

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Frontline program is a list of Members of Congress who will be running in the most competitive races in 2024. Dan was also on the “Frontline” list in the midterms, and our supporters stepped up to help us win our competitive race last November. Now, we need to do it again.

**Why is Dan a Frontline member?**
* Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races across the country. It is expected to be every bit as critical as it was in 2022.

* National Republicans will target competitive Frontline districts like Dan’s as they attempt to grow their slim House majority next year.

* Dan’s next race lines up with a presidential campaign and competitive Senate race in our swing state, so we know National Republicans will pour money into Michigan to flip it red.

Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference.

Here at Team Kildee, we are building a strong campaign to win again, but we need to show grassroots strength after this major Frontline announcement.
**[Can you contribute $20.24 now to help us build a winning 2024 coalition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59964056/395624912/-630420539?amount=20.24&contactdata=L9z9B4UBv4GKAF1BmEgdSUn/mYgKOWxcBi/1BMJd8kDERpvtDX46I6XbzIbunPgpcLQAUQHF0pDGcFbzZ8MQbrQ1ET0saa8dmx6BDo8RCVGzaK1Ywp8YUPnJJJcZXeiiJV7bPBxsGNemMxo+DsRD5w==&refcode2=8e6dc918-4ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230310_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZkYzkxOC00ZWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9Rnst0icZ9w1TMKYFOsa2UCGjJaP1nZbD7EtR9FzlA=)** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59964057/395624913/-630420539?amount=20.24&contactdata=L9z9B4UBv4GKAF1BmEgdSUn/mYgKOWxcBi/1BMJd8kDERpvtDX46I6XbzIbunPgpcLQAUQHF0pDGcFbzZ8MQbrQ1ET0saa8dmx6BDo8RCVGzaK1Ywp8YUPnJJJcZXeiiJV7bPBxsGNemMxo+DsRD5w==&refcode2=8e6dc918-4ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230310_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZkYzkxOC00ZWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9Rnst0icZ9w1TMKYFOsa2UCGjJaP1nZbD7EtR9FzlA=)**
We can take back the House majority if we protect competitive seats like Dan’s and flip a handful more across the country. Early investments help our team build a stronger and more robust campaign in cities like Flint, Saginaw, Bay City, and Midland — and in other communities across our new district.

**Every dollar you give now will help as we make key decisions about when and where to invest early resources, and will also help us prepare to take on attacks from National Republicans who want to flip Dan’s seat.**

Thank you for your continued support,

Team Kildee

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! [**Join the team and chip in here to take back our House majority and keep Dan fighting for Michigan in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59964058/395624914/-869271610?amount=20&contactdata=L9z9B4UBv4GKAF1BmEgdSUn/mYgKOWxcBi/1BMJd8kDERpvtDX46I6XbzIbunPgpcLQAUQHF0pDGcFbzZ8MQbrQ1ET0saa8dmx6BDo8RCVGzaK1Ywp8YUPnJJJcZXeiiJV7bPBxsGNemMxo+DsRD5w==&refcode2=8e6dc918-4ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230310_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZkYzkxOC00ZWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9Rnst0icZ9w1TMKYFOsa2UCGjJaP1nZbD7EtR9FzlA=)

name: ALERT via Team Wiley
subject: We’re on the frontline, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email]Friends, This is Caroline, Wiley’s wife, reaching out with a very important message for Women’s History Month. In March, we remember the struggles and triumphs of the women who came before us. From fighting for the right to vote, equal wages, and fair opportunities, women have long fought for the rights and freedoms we have today. The progress that has been made for women in this country is monumental. But as a mother of a young daughter, I know that no matter how much progress has been made, no rights are guaranteed. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email] We must all have to remain committed to the fight, and part of that commitment comes with supporting candidates at every level of government who will not lose sight of what is at stake for women in this country. That’s why I am reaching out to ask you to support my husband, Wiley, in Congress. Wiley has committed to fighting for reproductive freedom, pay equity, and affordable and accessible health care for women in this country. He will do everything he can to continue expanding and protecting women’s rights so our daughter and other young girls can grow up in a country where they have every possible opportunity to live the life they choose to live. Can you chip in a donation of any amount to help ensure NC-13 has a representative committed to the fight in Congress? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email] Thank you kindly, Caroline Nickel Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

[ Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) expressed her ridiculous “concerns” on CNN’s Thursday airing of “Anderson Cooper 360” about Fox News host Tucker Carlson’s coverage of video footage from the January 6, 2021 riot at the U.S. Capitol, calling it ‘dangerous’.” ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652562%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vJKpNdOKwg%2bePfmJ0gGkRw&sysid=1)

subject: Violent mob BURNS DOWN police training center
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
|
---
| | | ** BREAKING NEWS:
Violent mob burns down Atlanta Police Training Facility, dubbed 'Cop City'**
* * *

_Peter, if you care about law enforcement in America, you 're going to want to read this:_

Atlanta law enforcement just released footage of two dozen violent criminals breaking into a police training facility, shooting off fireworks near police officers, throwing Molotov cocktails, and fleeing in a getaway car as the training center went up in flames.

**The anti-police radicalism on the Far-Left is gaining serious momentum and we all need to do our part to stop them.** The safety of our neighborhoods is at risk.

That's why we're calling on every Conservative in America to sign our petition to Back the Blue. If the Far-Left is going to burn down law enforcement facilities, slash their budgets, and attack the integrity of police officers, Conservatives MUST be brave enough to stand up for the rule of law. _**[We aim to gather at least 25,000 signatures before 8:00 AM TOMORROW to prove to the men in uniform we have their backs. We need your help to reach this goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418816:6RCI3PGNE:m:1:3365131770:BA159E2851EB1606791912BC64126FC6:r "We aim to gather at least 25,000 signatures before 8:00 AM TOMORROW to prove to the men in uniform we have their backs. help to reach this goal.")**_

| | | ** BREAKING NEWS:
Violent mob burns down Atlanta Police Training Facility, dubbed 'Cop City'**
* * *

_Peter, if you care about law enforcement in America, you 're going to want to read this:_

Atlanta law enforcement just released footage of two dozen violent criminals breaking into a police training facility, shooting off fireworks near police officers, throwing Molotov cocktails, and fleeing in a getaway car as the training center went up in flames.

**The anti-police radicalism on the Far-Left is gaining serious momentum and we all need to do our part to stop them.** The safety of our neighborhoods is at risk.

That's why we're calling on every Conservative in America to sign our petition to Back the Blue. If the Far-Left is going to burn down law enforcement facilities, slash their budgets, and attack the integrity of police officers, Conservatives MUST be brave enough to stand up for the rule of law. _**[We aim to gather at least 25,000 signatures before 8:00 AM TOMORROW to prove to the men in uniform we have their backs. We need your help to reach this goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420303:JJOi3PGNM:m:1:3331421248:C89E6EE5BE39C23570CBFD37A37552C5:r "We aim to

goal.")**_

To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqVSYjgcK5Ar6lAeHa8vtxCUm6ZKPV_sAS8ZS4RrgUAzfGQwasnRSZ87ra6IVDQHTrBfUzXk3sIJLZTE7kOD3qO8Fa6S1Jq7XLBaF6eS7TQfUGVfitbpto8mPXJ9KdB7UR4ido46iz_j1e9qcA64Lq4ug2aC7lLWP5PQle8fqCcKYLAHxkEYqjYpf1XWpG9hEHcDbbFew5B78uHzNKllovVyVK_JyVt77fejHMxHkRW-j8imrkU76UOF3LRxVxew-zVygcci-oDTWN5Fm0lCegtWxILI2HW1XCBP44BX3Bmzd3bfdaXPino163ZGcP8hMKsGpBV72VJlVMDKbIGIP8U4hapHaarDoOg2WO8BHm3SUnPq0BIXcik-FRziTzheZo4rSYBY635AMC2RjoyrJsaKA/3ud/7vkdMl2TS4ibK9r6_3knCw/h3/dhLUVDncMQkcS4h51MKNRfQov7rCafFx24505jJ46-Q) **FIRST →** Senator Elizabeth Warren called for a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices to restore trust in the Court and hold justices – like Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett! – accountable for possible conflicts of interest. **THEN →** The American Bar Association voted to SUPPORT a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. **NOW → We want to hear what grassroots Democrats think about this plan, so we’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today.** | **Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**

Yes

After Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni Thomas, was exposed for her role in Trump’s Big Lie and close ties to anti-abortion rights groups, the impartiality of the Court was called into question. **But the American people deserve to feel confident in the Court!**
That’s why it's critical that the Supreme Court has a binding code of ethics, so that justices are held accountable for any potential conflicts of interest.
[_**But we want to hear what Democrats in your community think: Will you take our poll to let us know if you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqVSYjgcK5Ar6lAeHa8vtxCUm6ZKPV_sAS8ZS4RrgUAzfGQwasnRSZ87ra6IVDQHTrBfUzXk3sIJLZTE7kOD3qO8Fa6S1Jq7XLBaF6eS7TQfUGVfitbpto8mPXJ9KdB7UR4ido46iz_j1e9qcA64Lq4uuwW5vr29plHeorqNsAbxo1KEI8HL5tfE8KlF5BShA6TM2tOZ6PJFXkU22Tai3plEZR7Y4zNaCdwJO6axhN7l8zaAYP324KR6Sl1AyJwD1UdMzqzj9OpHrOfNtNgE2yym0R7GuA3DEF4sOdvqnsEv6KPredMS5qSjjV7YUhu8PyLaKOlDO3QPCCCfsQxJvIeNUHRjPsDhFgs71ZS6EqCnSNxdphjbSU46xXJ4Kp25j0puErEzWAaRCUqJnZPbU38Rg/3ud/7vkdMl2TS4ibK9r6_3knCw/h5/Vaoc9-ZSyf0nQlusRfICshRei0ucBTmTDGpFFTilgDk)

clean_body: Nearly 5,000 grassroots Democrats have submitted their Supreme Court code of ethics poll | | | | | Nearly 5,000 grassroots Democrats have taken our Supreme Court code of ethics poll. But our dataset says we’re missing critical responses from your area, leaving us with incomplete results. Represent your state, and let us know where you stand on a code of ethics for the Supreme Court now: – Team DLCC \-------------Forwarded Message------------- From: Date: Sat, Feb 18, 2023 Subject: This could hold Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett accountable: To: FIRST → Senator Elizabeth Warren called for a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices to restore trust in the Court and hold justices – like Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett! – accountable for possible conflicts of interest. THEN → The American Bar Association voted to SUPPORT a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. NOW → We want to hear what grassroots Democrats think about this plan, so we’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today. | Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices? Yes No Unsure After Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni Thomas, was exposed for her role in Trump’s Big Lie and close ties to anti-abortion rights groups, the impartiality of the Court was called into question. But the American people deserve to feel confident in the Court! That’s why it's critical that the Supreme Court has a binding code of ethics, so that justices are held accountable for any potential conflicts of interest. We’re counting on your response, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. subject: Proud to be in Chris Deluzio's corner
