| Derek, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Chris Deluzio to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Chris’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across western Pennsylvania. But with Chris serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

**[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $15 to help keep Chris in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59969466/395645680/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTZhNTRkMS01NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J0ILEPpX1xbbn4yV6vrFKUIZQRH3agNuCWh9khgO1hY=)** | **[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59969467/395645681/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTZhNTRkMS01NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J0ILEPpX1xbbn4yV6vrFKUIZQRH3agNuCWh9khgO1hY=)**

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

Derek, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Chris.** I know Chris has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for PA-17, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

**[I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Chris in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59969468/395645682/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTZhNTRkMS01NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J0ILEPpX1xbbn4yV6vrFKUIZQRH3agNuCWh9khgO1hY=)**

I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Greg Landsman to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.
| Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Greg Landsman to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Greg’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Southwest Ohio. But with Greg serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Greg Landsman in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59969966/395647885/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_sddc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjE4NWQwNi01N2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AGNSlKr5_hk02o-0Zu1ZJonJCVuXDL11HSGrK0hDjQY=)

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Greg.** I know Greg has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OH-01, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

body:
Here’s where we’re at:
#

Peter -
Here’s where we’re at:
**FIRST:** We explained why this FEC fundraising deadline month was so important to Ruben’s chances of winning Arizona’s Senate seat.
**THEN:** We set a one day goal of 1,000 donations to help us catch up after a slow start to the month. We came up a bit short.
**NOW:** We’re really in an all-hands-on-deck situation. We are legally required to report our numbers and there are endorsements on the line.
[**So Peter: Can Ruben count on you to make your first online donation to his campaign before this FEC deadline ends? The amount isn’t as important as the donations we receive, because it all adds up.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230310-1-30-15&t=1&akid=450%2E734936%2EplE36p)

Every single donation matters.
It matters to people considering endorsing Ruben.
It matters to financial goals we need to meet in order to win.
It matters because we need to be prepared as Republicans get in this race.
We mean it when we say that the donation itself is more important than the amount you give. It will add up when we’re in this together. [**So please. Contribute whatever feels right to you today. body:
Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Nikki Budzinski to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59970925/395651257/476961211?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_sddc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmEzZjY4Yy01OGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqWa-EeH2PvY07_CU0P9-zqppzCHd5zcVZgnYJxnNbI=)
| Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Nikki Budzinski to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Nikki’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Illinois’ 13th district. But with Nikki serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in any amount to help keep Nikki in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59970926/395651258/-1547163637?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_sddc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmEzZjY4Yy01OGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqWa-EeH2PvY07_CU0P9-zqppzCHd5zcVZgnYJxnNbI=) | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59970927/395651259/476961211?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_sddc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmEzZjY4Yy01OGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqWa-EeH2PvY07_CU0P9-zqppzCHd5zcVZgnYJxnNbI=)
---
**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Nikki.** I know Nikki has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for Illinois’ 13th district, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

body:
# [ ](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=85b6b7e00b&e=4181cc0be9)
Friend, I've been humbled by the outpouring of love and support I've gotten since we launched our campaign for Congress.
I look forward to getting out there every day, and earning every vote, so I can fight for the folks who are entrusting me with their voice.
**In fact, this past weekend I spent Saturday calling folks, telling them about our campaign, and asking them for their support:**
[](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=27a658d026&e=4181cc0be9)
---
I've been fighting for this community since I was 16 years old — I'm not going to slow down now. This is just a taste of how hard I'm going to work for this community in Congress.
[**_California's 12th is a special community, and I'm committed to making everyone so proud. If you want to help me do that, will you consider making a gift to my campaign today?_**](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=9804c99e75&e=4181cc0be9)
**[Donate»](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=9ea2f948f9&e=4181cc0be9)**

Thank you so much for everything,
Lateefah Simon
**[Donate»](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=ffc2445248&e=4181cc0be9)**

| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62418821:6P5kaPGNb:m:1:3365131770:300F7BB6505B3DAD5E61EEE011DAE94C:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke

clean_body: | | | | | This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid** progressive D.A., Jose Garza will win. On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. Breaking news, team: **The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just unveiled their first wave of 2024 endorsements, and Gabe was named a Frontline member!** Frontline is the DCCC’s program to ensure Democratic members of Congress from the most at-risk districts have what they need to win and defend their seats. Last November, Gabe flipped this district blue by a slim 0.68% margin, or 1,350 votes — _making it the closest Democratic victory in the nation._ **This Frontline endorsement further confirms that Gabe is the most vulnerable Democrat up for re-election in 2024, and NM-02 will be one of the closest races in the country that we can’t afford to lose.** **[Will you rush $10 or more right now to show Gabe your support and help us prepare for this 2024 Frontline race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59972146/395656015/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230310frontline_tv_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTE0ODRhNS01YmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vhd5exIGkaMoc7dKotEsOjoNj2gf5LXpZ-lJKcFJilM=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Frontline is the DCCC’s program to ensure Democratic members of Congress from the most at-risk districts have what they need to win and defend their seats. Last November, Gabe flipped this district blue by a slim 0.68% margin, or 1,350 votes — making it the closest Democratic victory in the nation. This Frontline endorsement further confirms that Gabe is the most vulnerable Democrat up for re-election in 2024, and NM-02 will be one of the closest races in the country that we can’t afford to lose. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for anything you can give to rebuild our grassroots campaign, keep Gabe fighting for us in Congress, and take back the House next year! — Team Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. name: Andy Biggs
subject: [Smoking Gun] Proof that Fauci covered up Covid Origins >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420305:JnyGaPGNw:m:1:3331421248:72E5802335C146E2143C0DA84BA0F11B:r)
---
| Peter,
New evidence proves that, just before the 2020 Lockdowns, **Dr. Fauci commissioned a paper to HIDE the origins of Covid...**
...and cover up the fact that he was **involved in gain-of-function research** at the Wuhan Institute of Virology.
We can't let this crook get away with this, especially if his research led to the pandemic that cost millions of lives and immeasurable damage to our country and the stability of the world.
I'm leading the fight to hold Fauci accountable and as more damning information comes out about his lies, **[I need your continued support to rally my colleagues in Congress and the American people behind me.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420305:JnyGaPGNw:m:1:3331421248:72E5802335C146E2143C0DA84BA0F11B:r)** | | | | [DEMAND THE TRUTH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420305:JnyGaPGNw:m:1:3331421248:72E5802335C146E2143C0DA84BA0F11B:r)
---
Three agencies in the Biden Administration, including the FBI, have admitted that the most likely origin for COVID-19 was from a lab leak in Wuhan.

But it's going to take a lot more pressure and demand from the American people to ensure we actually get the truth about Fauci's gain-of-function research and the connection to the lab leak.

**I will not back down here...and I know we can get to the bottom of this, but I cannot do it alone.**

**[Help me continue to lead the fight on Capitol Hill to hold Fauci accountable and push my colleagues in Congress to join me>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420305:JnyGaPGNw:m:1:3331421248:72E5802335C146E2143C0DA84BA0F11B:r)**

Thank you for being a leader in the America First movement and an instrumental part of this fight to investigate Fauci's lies.

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

Dear Friend,

We have some exciting news to share with you! **Ron DeSantis, the Governor of Florida, is coming to Iowa.** Iowa is ground zero for selecting our next presidential nominee, and we want to hear what you think.

Governor DeSantis is leading the way for the state of Florida and is a strong conservative, and many people are talking about him as a potential candidate for President in 2024. We want to know what you think.

**Would you support Ron DeSantis for President in 2024?**

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just added Kim to their Frontline program for 2024 [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59972861/395658992/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzNlZjE5Yy01Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAOpY79FvaFrY99DMg_xIeU5n3MEeo7hmBIBa6AUceE=&emci=83ef169d-92be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c3ef19c-5cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)

**NEW: Dr. Kim Schrier named to DCCC's Frontline Program**
Peter,

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just added Kim to their Frontline program for 2024 – a list of Democratic districts that will be critical in our efforts to retake the majority next year.

We can't retake the House majority without reelecting Kim in Washington's 8th District, but we have a tough fight ahead of us. Washington State and national Republicans are once again making flipping WA-08 a top priority and Kim's first Republican challenger announced her candidacy last month.

| | Hey Peter, **Did you get a chance to tune into Governor Shapiro’s first budget address this week?** If not, don’t sweat it. Here’s everything you need to know. **The budget includes historic investments in education, public safety, and Pennsylvania infrastructure. The budget lowers costs and cuts taxes for Pennsylvanians while protecting our environment and investing in public health. ** The bottom line? This budget is packed with commonsense solutions to the problems Pennsylvanians face every single day. Governor Shapiro is putting people and practical policies over politics. Period. [If you’re interested, read more about Governor Shapiro’s budget here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59972915/395659074/-680486151?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNlZjE5Yy01Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RQZQ7K-JgrCkonuGWw4VnH8-AG4gPzZhX0JWR8ryzKc=&emci=1673d423-aebe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=653ef19c-5cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25616296) The truth is, Peter – we’re lucky to have Democratic electeds who are working to get things done for Pennsylvanians. But we also recognize that the work is only possible because we were able to elect Governor Shapiro and cement our majorities in the House last election cycle. clean_body: | | | | | Hey Peter, Did you get a chance to tune into Governor Shapiro’s first budget address this week? If not, don’t sweat it. Here’s everything you need to know. The budget includes historic investments in education, public safety, and Pennsylvania infrastructure. The budget lowers costs and cuts taxes for Pennsylvanians while protecting our environment and investing in public health. The bottom line? This budget is packed with commonsense solutions to the problems Pennsylvanians face every single day. Governor Shapiro is putting people and practical policies over politics. Period. The truth is, Peter – we’re lucky to have Democratic electeds who are working to get things done for Pennsylvanians. But we also recognize that the work is only possible because we were able to elect Governor Shapiro and cement our majorities in the House last election cycle. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Pennsylvania Democrats | Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Greenhalgh for Delegate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Geenhalgh for Delegate,Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
In 2021, I was able to win by 112 votes with the support of people like you who gave their time,
treasure, and prayers to help get our campaign over the finish line.
As I talk with people who live in my district, I realize we want the same things for Virginia: \- Safe neighborhoods to raise our families.
\- Schools that prepare students for college, career, or starting their own businesses.
\- Lower taxes to make living in Virginia more affordable.\- A strong economy with stable businesses offering good jobs.
I won the 51st seat in the House of Delegates, giving Republicans the majority. We were able to pass
large portions of Governor Youngkin’s agenda for Virginia by cutting the grocery tax, improving our
schools, and increasing job opportunities. We are winning the things we all want for Virginia! It has been the honor of my life to serve in the House of Delegates and stand alongside Governor
Youngkin as he works to renew Virginia’s promise. As I run for reelection this year, my race will be heavily contested by the Democrats as they try to win
back the House of Delegates. However, our work in the House is not yet done! We need to expand economic opportunity by cutting
the gas tax, ending the grocery tax, and continuing to lower income taxes. We need to continue
reforming our schools and putting dollars directly into the classroom. We need to expand workforce
training programs and make it easier for businesses to create good paying jobs in the Commonwealth. I have also defended our Constitution which protects the rights of our citizens, and worked to create a
government that lives within its means. This year I am running for re-election to work with Governor Youngkin and the Republican majority to
accomplish these critical priorities. Make no mistake, I am the 51st vote required to pass Governor Youngkin’s agenda. However, I need your help to stay in that role and hold this district. Democrats are already running a well-funded opponent against me in the hopes of retaking the House
of Delegates and undoing the progress that has been made by our majority. They are set on hiking
taxes, making our streets less safe, and keeping parents from having a voice in our schools. We MUST hold the House of Delegates and prevent more flawed liberal legislation from becoming law.
Your donation of [$1,000, $500, $250, or even $100](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/327fcf9caa07634d/ceda782701d29794c3d6b838967d376c/37923) will go a long way in helping me hold this seat. Your support is necessary for our campaign to have the resources we need to get our message out and
make strategic investments early in data, field and other infrastructure to help get me over the finish
line.
Thank you for your continued support.
Sincerely,

Karen Greenhalgh
PS: even $51 to be Governor Youngkin’s 51st vote would be greatly appreciated and help give me the
resources I need to win this campaign.
---

name: Giffords
subject: This isn’t normal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The U.S. surpassed 100 mass shootings in 64 days. We must do better.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230310-1-15&t=1&akid=4387%2E3935704%2EETGmVp)
Over 100 mass shootings in 64 days...
This isn’t normal.
The United States has higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world.
Our national gun violence crisis is a uniquely American problem, but it doesn’t have to be this way. We can be a better nation, but it’s going to take all of us working together.
We must pass universal background checks at the federal level. We must make sure guns are safely stored. We must vote out extremist elected officials who are putting the gun lobby’s radical agenda above the safety of the people they are supposed to serve.
But we can’t do all of this without you.
[**So please, can you make a contribution of $3 to Giffords PAC today? We need you with us in the fight to end gun violence in our country.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230310-1-15&t=2&akid=4387%2E3935704%2EETGmVp)

clean_body: President Biden is making calls to say thank you to this grassroots team. Make a donation for your chance to receive a call so that he can say thank you for all that you’ve done to support Democrats this year. | | This grassroots team is the reason why Democrats have been successful over the past two years. From passing critical legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act to maintaining our Senate majority, Democrats have made incredible progress. President Biden is so grateful for your hard work, Derek, and that’s why he wants to personally say thank you for being a member of this team. If you chip in $7 to the DNC today, you could receive a phone call from President Biden so he can say thank you for helping Democrats deliver for working people and families like yours. President Biden loves calling supporters to talk to them about what issues are most important to them -- and what’s keeping them in the fight. Grassroots support has been crucial to building the political infrastructure that helped Democrats maintain our Senate majority, flip state legislatures, and win races up and down the ballot last year. name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Congratulations to New Pennsylvania Project board member, State Representative Joanna McClinton for being elected PA Speaker of the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this first March edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well during Women’s History Month.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use and other updates.
Graphic depicting a headshot of PA State Representative Joanna McClinton wearing a blue suit and white pearls. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image-2.jpg]
Congratulations to Speaker Joanna McClinton
Congratulations to New Pennsylvania Project board member, State Representative Joanna McClinton for being elected PA Speaker of the House on the last day of Black History Month.
Following the historical election, NPP CEO Kadida Kenner released the following statement:
Graphic of NPP's press release dated Feb. 28, 2023: New Pennsylvania Project on Historic Election of Joanna McClinton as Speaker of Pennsylvania House of Representatives. Harrisburg, PA. Following the election of Joanna McClinton as Speaker of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives, Kadida Kenner, New Pennsylvania Project CEO, made the following statement: “Today is a historic day, and Speaker of the House Joanna McClinton personifies everything we admire: hard work, dedication, empathy, compassion, fearlessness, intellect, and cooperation. “It took more than 240 years to give a woman the gavel in the Commonwealth — now a Black woman will preside over the House of Representatives at a pivotal time in the Commonwealth’s history. Representation matters. For young girls (and boys) to see a resilient and powerful woman like Joanna McClinton with the gavel in her hand is a game changer. Her newest leadership role will pay dividends for generations to come. The glass ceiling has been shattered, and the the sky is the limit.” [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/334273116_5828687443896971_5757650485448617372_n.jpg]
Year Round Voter Registration
NPP is all about year-round voter registration. Even in inclement weather, we’re in our neighborhoods registering Pennsylvanians to vote. We have less than two months to register voters in time for the Primary Election.
The last day to register to vote is May 1st. If you have young adults in your life who will turn 18 years old by May 16th, they can register to vote TODAY!
Please join us in thanking our staff for putting in the work and making a difference all over the Commonwealth.
Graphic depicting two individuals registering to vote outside of his care on the street. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2626.JPG]
Graphic depicting two individuals filling out voter registration forms on a table. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2627.JPG]
Graphic depicting five individuals filling out their voter registration forms and talking together inside a business. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2628.JPG]
Graphic depicting four individuals sitting outside at a table filling out their voter registration forms. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2640.jpg]
News You Can Use
[https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/03/governor-shapiro-budget-education-spending-conservative/] Shapiro’s Budget Pitch Keeps PA Spending Relatively Flat, Preserves Some Pandemic Benefits. [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/03/governor-shapiro-budget-education-spending-conservative/] (Spotlight PA)
“In his first budget proposal as Pennsylvania’s chief executive, Gov. Josh Shapiro is calling for $1 billion in new education spending, permanent state funding for public defenders, and an expansion of a shrinking rebate program for older people.”
Delco State Rep Zabel To Resign After Sexual Harassment Allegations. [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/pennsylvania/mike-zabel-resignation-sexual-harassment-allegations-20230308.html] (Philadelphia Inquirer)
“Hours after a Republican female lawmaker publicly accused State Rep. Mike Zabel of sexual harassment Wednesday, the Delaware County Democrat said he would resign.”
Pa. judges offer conflicting opinions on whether fraud evidence is needed for recount requests [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/02/pa-election-recount-petitions-fraud-evidence-commonwealth-court-rulings/] (Spotlight PA)
“Further, Judge Wallace’s analysis of the ‘chaos’ that would ensue were Judge Cannon’s interpretation to be the correct one is spot on,” Grossman said. “This is what these petitioners are after — chaos and uncertainty about election results.”
She noted that the standard for alleging fraud in federal cases is much higher.
“I think election deniers are looking for any opportunity to disrupt the democratic process,” she said. “It is a real threat and something we should all be paying attention to.”
While some judges, advocates, and even some lawmakers have said it may be time to update the law to increase the $50 filing fee or add an evidentiary standard, no such bill has yet been filed in the legislature.”
Prove That John Fetterman ‘Is Alive and Well,’ PA Republican Official Demands. [https://www.pennlive.com/politics/2023/03/prove-that-john-fetterman-is-alive-and-well-pa-republican-official-demands.html] (Penn Live)
“A western Pennsylvania Republican’s demand that Democratic U.S. Sen. John Fetterman prove he is “alive and well” or resign is gaining traction in conservative circles across the country.”
Graphic depicting NPP's fellow in Philadelphia helping an individual register to vote. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2629.JPG]
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
We’re currently hiring:
*
Director
of
Strategic
Communications
*
Regional
Organizing
Directors
*
Community
Engagement
Associate
*
Fellows
(part-time)
Please email your resume to jobs@newpaproject.org and provide the position you are applying for in the subject line.
For more information and to view the job descriptions, please visit: https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/ [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/]
Policy Corner
Graphic depicting #Policy Corner stating: The Speaker of the Pennsylvania House serves all members of the PA House and upholds the orderly conduct of business, protecting the rights of every elected Representative. Bottom of graphic shows the New PA Project Education Fund's logo. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/NPPEF%20310%20-%20Speaker%20of%20the%20House.png]
The Speaker of the House is the oldest elected statewide office in the Commonwealth.
Did you know that William Penn was the first speaker of the Pennsylvania house in 1682?
The Speaker serves all members of the House and upholds the orderly conduct of business, protecting the rights of every elected Representative.
The position is a constitutionally mandated office, elected by the full membership of the house and presides over the session, appoints committee chairpersons and refers bills to committee. They can also sponsor legislation, vote on all bills, and on rare occasions may turn the podium over to a Speaker Pro Tempore in order to occupy the chair on the floor and participate in debate. The PA House cannot hold an official session in the absence of the speaker or their designated speaker pro tempore.
Democrat Joanna McClinton was elected Speaker of the House on February 28, 2023, becoming the first female and first African-American female Speaker.
NPP's Graphic stating: Happy Holiday, festival of colors with the New Pennsylvania Project logo in the top right corner. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image-8.jpeg]
Happy Holi to those who celebrate! “Festival of Love;” Holi is a time to unite, letting go of resentments and bad feelings towards each other.
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
Team NPP

clean_body: [] Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters. We hope this first March edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well during Women’s History Month. Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use and other updates. Graphic depicting a headshot of PA State Representative Joanna McClinton wearing a blue suit and white pearls. [] Congratulations to Speaker Joanna McClinton Congratulations to New Pennsylvania Project board member, State Representative Joanna McClinton for being elected PA Speaker of the House on the last day of Black History Month. Following the historical election, NPP CEO Kadida Kenner released the following statement: Graphic of NPP's press release dated Feb. 28, 2023: New Pennsylvania Project on Historic Election of Joanna McClinton as Speaker of Pennsylvania House of Representatives. Harrisburg, PA. Following the election of Joanna McClinton as Speaker of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives, Kadida Kenner, New Pennsylvania Project CEO, made the following statement: “Today is a historic day, and Speaker of the House Joanna McClinton personifies everything we admire: hard work, dedication, empathy, compassion, fearlessness, intellect, and cooperation. “It took more than 240 years to give a woman the gavel in the Commonwealth — now a Black woman will preside over the House of Representatives at a pivotal time in the Commonwealth’s history. Representation matters. For young girls (and boys) to see a resilient and powerful woman like Joanna McClinton with the gavel in her hand is a game changer. Her newest leadership role will pay dividends for generations to come. The glass ceiling has been shattered, and the the sky is the limit.” [] Year Round Voter Registration NPP is all about year-round voter registration. Even in inclement weather, we’re in our neighborhoods registering Pennsylvanians to vote. We have less than two months to register voters in time for the Primary Election. The last day to register to vote is May 1st. If you have young adults in your life who will turn 18 years old by May 16th, they can register to vote TODAY! Please join us in thanking our staff for putting in the work and making a difference all over the Commonwealth. Graphic depicting two individuals registering to vote outside of his care on the street. [] Graphic depicting two individuals filling out voter registration forms on a table. [] Graphic depicting five individuals filling out their voter registration forms and talking together inside a business. [] Graphic depicting four individuals sitting outside at a table filling out their voter registration forms. [] News You Can Use [] Shapiro’s Budget Pitch Keeps PA Spending Relatively Flat, Preserves Some Pandemic Benefits. [] (Spotlight PA) “In his first budget proposal as Pennsylvania’s chief executive, Gov. Josh Shapiro is calling for $1 billion in new education spending, permanent state funding for public defenders, and an expansion of a shrinking rebate program for older people.” Delco State Rep Zabel To Resign After Sexual Harassment Allegations. [] (Philadelphia Inquirer) “Hours after a Republican female lawmaker publicly accused State Rep. Mike Zabel of sexual harassment Wednesday, the Delaware County Democrat said he would resign.” Pa. judges offer conflicting opinions on whether fraud evidence is needed for recount requests [] (Spotlight PA) “Further, Judge Wallace’s analysis of the ‘chaos’ that would ensue were Judge Cannon’s interpretation to be the correct one is spot on,” Grossman said. “This is what these petitioners are after — chaos and uncertainty about election results.” She noted that the standard for alleging fraud in federal cases is much higher. “I think election deniers are looking for any opportunity to disrupt the democratic process,” she said. “It is a real threat and something we should all be paying attention to.” While some judges, advocates, and even some lawmakers have said it may be time to update the law to increase the $50 filing fee or add an evidentiary standard, no such bill has yet been filed in the legislature.” Prove That John Fetterman ‘Is Alive and Well,’ PA Republican Official Demands. [] (Penn Live) “A western Pennsylvania Republican’s demand that Democratic U.S. Sen. John Fetterman prove he is “alive and well” or resign is gaining traction in conservative circles across the country.” Graphic depicting NPP's fellow in Philadelphia helping an individual register to vote. [] We're Hiring! The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate. We’re currently hiring: Director of Strategic Communications Regional Organizing Directors Community Engagement Associate Fellows (part-time) Please email your resume to jobs@newpaproject.org and provide the position you are applying for in the subject line. They can also sponsor legislation, vote on all bills, and on rare occasions may turn the podium over to a Speaker Pro Tempore in order to occupy the chair on the floor and participate in debate. The PA House cannot hold an official session in the absence of the speaker or their designated speaker pro tempore. Democrat Joanna McClinton was elected Speaker of the House on February 28, 2023, becoming the first female and first African-American female Speaker. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We’re asking you to support Selma’s ongoing tornado recovery today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59974511/395664939/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230310_f_bloodysunday_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2IwMmNhZS01ZmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrX4Oh1-TOmqFQ9bGjBRM5kBuVC8jOt8zQ9rV-3EX94=&emci=4c3a793c-c8be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e7b02cae-5fbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | This week, on the 58th anniversary of Bloody Sunday, we’re reflecting. We’re reflecting on the sacrifices that Black activists made throughout history to achieve and protect the freedom to vote. The violence they endured while protesting for their fundamental rights. And the powerful movement they ignited to challenge barriers to the ballot box, which continues today. On March 7, 1965, hundreds of civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, aiming to eventually reach Montgomery, to peacefully protest the denial of Black voting rights and the police’s recent murder of Black activist Jimmie Lee Jackson. Led by John Lewis of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and Reverend Hosea Williams of the Southern Christian Leadership Conference, the peaceful protestors were met with extreme violence by local police. That brutal day became known as Bloody Sunday. Every year, to commemorate the anniversary of the attack, a large group of civil rights and voting rights leaders from around the country gather in Selma to march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge — that same path that activists walked not long ago. Like every year, the march took place, but under slightly different circumstances. **The people of Selma are facing the devastating aftermath of a tornado that ripped through the city on January 12, 2023 — destroying homes, businesses, and infrastructure.****Still, local organizers were dedicated to ensuring that the march went on.** **_[That’s why we’re asking you to make a split donation to Fair Fight Action and the Selma Area Food Bank, an on-the-ground organization delivering critical aid to the people of Selma. Will you make a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59974512/395664940/-1281683560?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230310_f_bloodysunday_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2IwMmNhZS01ZmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrX4Oh1-TOmqFQ9bGjBRM5kBuVC8jOt8zQ9rV-3EX94=)_** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59974513/395664941/-1281683560?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230310_f_bloodysunday_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2IwMmNhZS01ZmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrX4Oh1-TOmqFQ9bGjBRM5kBuVC8jOt8zQ9rV-3EX94=)
---
Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote — carrying on the movement that the Bloody Sunday activists bravely fought for.
Thank you,
The Fair Fight Action Team

clean_body: Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote. | | | This week, on the 58th anniversary of Bloody Sunday, we’re reflecting. We’re reflecting on the sacrifices that Black activists made throughout history to achieve and protect the freedom to vote. The violence they endured while protesting for their fundamental rights. And the powerful movement they ignited to challenge barriers to the ballot box, which continues today. On March 7, 1965, hundreds of civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, aiming to eventually reach Montgomery, to peacefully protest the denial of Black voting rights and the police’s recent murder of Black activist Jimmie Lee Jackson. Led by John Lewis of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and Reverend Hosea Williams of the Southern Christian Leadership Conference, the peaceful protestors were met with extreme violence by local police. That brutal day became known as Bloody Sunday. Every year, to commemorate the anniversary of the attack, a large group of civil rights and voting rights leaders from around the country gather in Selma to march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge — that same path that activists walked not long ago. Like every year, the march took place, but under slightly different circumstances. The people of Selma are facing the devastating aftermath of a tornado that ripped through the city on January 12, 2023 — destroying homes, businesses, and infrastructure.Still, local organizers were dedicated to ensuring that the march went on. = | = Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote — carrying on the movement that the Bloody Sunday activists bravely fought for. Thank you, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. Peter, We know that political change doesn’t happen overnight. It takes years of continued investment, belief, and hard work to change how systems operate. So, what do we want Indiana to look like in five years? At the Indiana Democratic Party, we’re working to create the Indiana we want to see – not just over the next few election cycles but also over the next few generations. That means supporting strong candidates and getting more people involved in the political process. By continuing to put good people in office advocating for our communities, we can build the future we want to see. [**Help us build for the future, one step at a time, by chipping in $5 today. name: All On The Line
subject: The Shape of Things: NC-06
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities like (District 06)
|
---

**The Shape Of Things: NC-06**
**The district:** North Carolina’s 6th congressional district includes all of Guilford County and a portion of Forsyth County, keeping the Triad largely unified in a single congressional district. In 2021, the state supreme court overturned the congressional map that split Guilford into three congressional districts. In 2023, the newly elected justices in North Carolina decided to rehear part of _Harper v. Hall_. This landmark redistricting case had previously struck down the 2021 congressional map as an unconstitutional partisan gerrymander. That watershed ruling clarified that state courts could and will intervene when the legislature violates voters' rights.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60008484/395725331/394929392?refcode=20230310_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThings_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0N2NmMGI0LThhYmYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljd0jeWfPPRok2lKDZ4aaSOwD7KbSRsIHztjFwWsuJU=)
---
**History of the District:** This region has a long history of gerrymandering, from the snake-like 12th district that packed Black voters into one long district from Charlotte, through the Triad and into Durham, to the infamous maps drawn in 2016 that split the Greensboro-based campus of NC A&T State University -- one of the largest HBCUs in the United States -- into two congressional districts. That map, a 10R-3D GOP plan, was declared unconstitutional partisan gerrymander. The legislature then drew a remedial plan that ceded two GOP seats for an 8R-5D split, creating strongly Democratic seats in the Greensboro and Raleigh areas. Democratic Rep. Kathy Manning first won this Piedmont Triad seat in 2020.
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities like Guilford County, North Carolina. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. **[Will you support All On The Line with a recurring donation of any amount to support our work to advocate for fair maps in places like North Carolina and other target states?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60008486/395725332/394929392?recurring=1&refcode=20230310_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThings_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0N2NmMGI0LThhYmYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljd0jeWfPPRok2lKDZ4aaSOwD7KbSRsIHztjFwWsuJU=)**
**What’s next?**
On March 14, the North Carolina Supreme Court will be rehearing significant portions of the landmark case, _Harper v. Hall_ , that has made the maps in the North Carolina fair. If the court overturns recent precedent and allows the General Assembly to gerrymander with impunity, they will remove a fair map that allows voters of both parties an opportunity to elect their preferred candidates and revert to a map that divides heavily Democratic Guilford County into three different congressional districts, grouping each section with much redder, rural areas and distant suburbs -- effectively drowning out the voices of Guilford county voters.
---
Last Friday, the Harper plaintiffs, a group of North Carolina voters supported by our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), submitted a supplemental brief in _Harper v. Hall._
This comes after conservative legislators seeking political opportunity petitioned the NC Supreme Court to reconsider the case. These legislators may believe that a change in judicial officers grants them permission to rewrite the law in their favor. But we know that is not how our judicial system works. Neither the law, precedent, nor the facts have changed. And we must not allow extremist conservatives in North Carolina to obstruct the redistricting process that will impact communities in CD-06 and across the state.
Our organization is working tirelessly to ensure voters in North Carolina are supported by a grassroots army fighting to restore our democracy.**[In order to protect fairness in districts like NC-06, we must take action now to help All On The Line advocate for fair maps. Can you help our efforts across the nation by making a donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60008489/395725360/394929392?refcode=20230310_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThings_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0N2NmMGI0LThhYmYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljd0jeWfPPRok2lKDZ4aaSOwD7KbSRsIHztjFwWsuJU=)**

name: Aruna Miller
subject: Everyone should have access to safe reproductive health care.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59975396/395668215/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2EwYmJlNi02MWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GoYXbpli9-iW8QdJGj4szLHWXuqC6fEF8eSPPDr6ow=&emci=5e78bfdf-61bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5ca0bbe6-61bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Hi there, Everyone should have access to safe reproductive health care. That’s why the Moore-Miller Administration is fighting back against far-right attacks on reproductive rights across the country by making Maryland a safe haven for abortion and choice. Last month, Wes joined 20 other governors to form the Reproductive Freedom Alliance, a first of its kind, multi-state coalition committed to protecting and expanding reproductive care. **Wes and I are proud to also stand together with Maryland House Speaker Adrienne Jones and Senate President Bill Ferguson in support of a historic legislative package designed to defend choice and expand abortion access in Maryland.** If passed, these four bills will:
* Establish a constitutional amendment to enshrine the right to abortion in Maryland’s Constitution;
* Protect patients, providers, and people supporting out-of-state patients seeking reproductive health care in Maryland from criminal, civil, and administrative actions from restrictive states;
* Require Maryland’s public higher education institutions to develop reproductive health access plans to provide or refer for the full range of reproductive health, including 24-hour access to contraceptives;
* Protect the private medical information and reproductive health records of in-state and out-of-state patients.

clean_body: | Hi there, Everyone should have access to safe reproductive health care. That’s why the Moore-Miller Administration is fighting back against far-right attacks on reproductive rights across the country by making Maryland a safe haven for abortion and choice. Last month, Wes joined 20 other governors to form the Reproductive Freedom Alliance, a first of its kind, multi-state coalition committed to protecting and expanding reproductive care. Wes and I are proud to also stand together with Maryland House Speaker Adrienne Jones and Senate President Bill Ferguson in support of a historic legislative package designed to defend choice and expand abortion access in Maryland. If passed, these four bills will: Establish a constitutional amendment to enshrine the right to abortion in Maryland’s Constitution; Protect patients, providers, and people supporting out-of-state patients seeking reproductive health care in Maryland from criminal, civil, and administrative actions from restrictive states; Require Maryland’s public higher education institutions to develop reproductive health access plans to provide or refer for the full range of reproductive health, including 24-hour access to contraceptives; Protect the private medical information and reproductive health records of in-state and out-of-state patients. | Thank you for standing with me and Wes as we work to protect every person’s right to reproductive freedom. — Aruna Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | | Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans are threatening America with default unless Republican budget demands are met. But they refuse to show an actual budget saying what those demands are! [**How are Democrats supposed to negotiate with a blank page? President Biden has shown his budget, it's time for Republicans to do the same.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9272b1e5-1907-499c-8ff6-246263a1e199/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) McCarthy appears too scared to put the demands of his lunatic Republican caucus on paper, knowing the numbers simply don't add up. But if this is the case, he needs to stop making threats, get out of the way, and let the adults lead. He needs to put up or shut up. [**Tell Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans: Show Me the Budget!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a07dd99-88ba-4b10-9c15-cba3724e6565/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: Just $25 will help us be able to FIGHT BACK! | Friend, There are just 25 days left until the Wisconsin Supreme Court election, and we MUST keep our momentum going. The radical Left has targeted our Supreme Court, pouring millions of dollars into electing radical judicial activist Judge Janet Protasiewicz to do their bidding. If she wins, we can say goodbye to all of the conservative policy initiatives that the court has upheld that makes Wisconsin the great state that it is today. But if every supporter gave just $25, we will have the resources to fight back against the radical Left’s millions and be one step closer to this important victory! It’s bad enough that Protasiewicz has promised to put her thumb on the scales of justice and rule based on her ‘values’ instead of the law. But now she has declined multiple opportunities to debate and explain her soft-on-crime record and ties to extremist activists. That’s because she knows there is nothing she can say to defend her record of prioritizing criminals over the safety of the citizens of Wisconsin. But the radical Left’s millions are being spent lying to voters about her record and her intentions should she win, attempting to BUY a Liberal Supreme Court win. That’s why we need your urgent help to FIGHT BACK and defend our conservative majority against radical liberal Protasiewicz. Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. www.wisgop.org 148 E Johnson Street, Madison, WI 53703

name: National Rifle Association
subject: We need to address the elephant in the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Self-defense isn't just a right. It's the most important right. | Self-defense is our most important right. In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting...

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419062:6eL_PPGyN:m:1:3365131770:A7F8F2074E07AE3DDBB52432D3132821:r)

Peter,

Self-defense is our most important right.

In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting themselves have become alarmingly common. Far too often, responsible gun owners are being **reprimanded, chastised, or even imprisoned** for using their legal firearms to defend themselves.

That's insane, and we need to put an end to it. _No one is more committed to protecting the American people's Constitutionally guaranteed right to self-defense than the NRA._
**[PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419062:6eL_PPGyN:m:1:3365131770:A7F8F2074E07AE3DDBB52432D3132821:r)**
**The right to self-defense is the cornerstone of all freedoms. Without it, we cannot be free.** That's why, given the recent deranged attacks on our right to protect ourselves, the NRA's work has never been more important.

We recently set a new fundraising goal to preserve **your right to self-defense** , and we need your immediate support to reach it. _**Peter, can you step up?**_

**[Contribute any amount TODAY to help the NRA CRUSH its Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419062:6eL_PPGyN:m:1:3365131770:A7F8F2074E07AE3DDBB52432D3132821:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419062:6eL_PPGyN:m:1:3365131770:A7F8F2074E07AE3DDBB52432D3132821:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DONATION STATUS: Awaiting contribution
PURPOSE: PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419062:6eL_PPGyN:m:1:3365131770:A7F8F2074E07AE3DDBB52432D3132821:r)**

Cases of Americans being taken to court for defending themselves have been making headlines all over the country. Meanwhile, violent crime has been rampant, threatening law-abiding citizens' livelihoods everywhere. _This cannot continue to happen._

The NRA will ALWAYS work to protect your right to self-defense. _We'll fight back against ANY action taken by activist politicians that restricts your liberty or threatens your freedom, and crushing this Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal will be a huge step in the right direction._

**[Please donate to the NRA TODAY so we can continue to work to protect your right to self-defense.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419062:6eL_PPGyN:m:1:3365131770:A7F8F2074E07AE3DDBB52432D3132821:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

Many people consider the year between the midterms and the presidential election an “off-year” for political engagement. But when it comes to combatting the climate crisis, **_there is no such thing as an off-year._**

Every year there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis. The fossil fuel industry and their elected allies will never rest – and neither will we.

Mayors, city councilors, county supervisors, commissioners, district attorneys, controllers, and every other elected or appointed official all play a role when it comes to policies related to extracting, transporting, and burning fossil fuels. From approving permits for deadly drilling projects and pipelines to how we power our homes, offices, and public transportation, each office will make decisions that will impact our progress one way or the other.

That’s why my climate PAC is endorsing climate champions with a proven record of climate action in local races this year – starting with Pennsylvania and Colorado. We are still finalizing our slate of candidates in these states, and as one of our grassroots supporters, you will be among the first to know when we are ready to announce our endorsements. clean_body: Every year there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I want to share some thoughts on why we are so focused on down-ballot races here at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. But first, = | = Many people consider the year between the midterms and the presidential election an “off-year” for political engagement. But when it comes to combatting the climate crisis, there is no such thing as an off-year. Every year there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis. The fossil fuel industry and their elected allies will never rest – and neither will we. Mayors, city councilors, county supervisors, commissioners, district attorneys, controllers, and every other elected or appointed official all play a role when it comes to policies related to extracting, transporting, and burning fossil fuels. From approving permits for deadly drilling projects and pipelines to how we power our homes, offices, and public transportation, each office will make decisions that will impact our progress one way or the other. That’s why my climate PAC is endorsing climate champions with a proven record of climate action in local races this year – starting with Pennsylvania and Colorado. We are still finalizing our slate of candidates in these states, and as one of our grassroots supporters, you will be among the first to know when we are ready to announce our endorsements. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I'm sure that the Radical Left and DC Swamp Rats have called me a few choice words.

And that's fine... Because I've got another phrase they can call me:

**THEIR WORST FREAKIN ' NIGHTMARE! **
Why? Because I see them for what they are: no good, self-serving, America-last SWAMP RATS.

Well, I've had it up to my eyeballs with the status quo. [**It 's about damn time we send a disruptor to Washington.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420307:JRRQfPGNx:m:1:3331421248:F19F7F075B32EC3D54C8710325783E1C:r) And that is exactly what I'll do.

I was raised that when you see a problem, you propose a solution. **[And with you by my side, we will be the solution that America so desperately needs.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420307:JRRQfPGNx:m:1:3331421248:F19F7F075B32EC3D54C8710325783E1C:r)**

_The days of career politicians are OVER._

**FIRST ->****Help me retire the Radical career politician I am running against. ** **THEN ->**** Stand beside me as we take the fight to Joe Biden. ** **FINALLY ->**** We will save our country and restore its greatness. **

I'm working against the clock and have only until midnight tonight to show the Radical Left that, once again, they would be fools to bet against me. To bet against us. To bet against the America First Movement.

[**RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420307:JRRQfPGNx:m:1:3331421248:F19F7F075B32EC3D54C8710325783E1C:r)

Madison

name: Robert Garcia
subject: My story (in photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976932/395673655/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
Friends —
I wanted to take a moment to share why I am in this fight for American families across the country with you.
My mom and I immigrated from Peru to America when I was just 5 years old, unknowing of the endless opportunity this country would place in my hands.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976934/395673657/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
I grew up to become an educator, teaching college students from across the country in Long Beach.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976937/395673686/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
But I knew my true passion in life was in service — to give back to the community and country that made me, and I was honored to be elected Mayor of Long Beach, sworn in with my mother by my side.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976939/395673689/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
Then began my hardest battle yet, COVID-19. The effects of COVID-19 hit too close to home when both my mother and stepfather, tragically passed from the virus. My mother was one of the many health care workers who put her life on the line to help others during the pandemic.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976941/395673691/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
After their passing, I threw myself into my work, vowing to work as hard as I could to ensure other families wouldn’t experience the same pain I did. And Long Beach ended up being known nationwide for becoming the first city in California to vaccinate educators and the first city to vaccinate 99% of its senior population.
I love Long Beach and I love this country, so I want to make sure every person, regardless of race, socioeconomic status, or sexuality, has the same opportunity that this country gave me. I ran for Congress and with you by my side, I made it there. And now I proudly am the first LGBTQ immigrant to serve in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976944/395673694/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
But my work is not even close to being done, and there is so much left for us to fight for.
[**So, I am asking: Can you make a contribution to my campaign to help me continue to make an impact in Congress and in the lives of working American families? This movement relies on the support of grassroots donors and supporters like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976947/395673697/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)
With you by my side, I know we can make this country a better place. Thank you for being a part of this team and listening to my story.
Robert
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59976949/395673700/60992958?refcode2=51767175-65bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230310-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NzE3NS02NWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSEW8qwJ7REbnV2aJ_vcyOA0Qea0jpznIXOdne7b4rQ=)**

The effects of COVID-19 hit too close to home when both my mother and stepfather, tragically passed from the virus. My mother was one of the many health care workers who put her life on the line to help others during the pandemic. = After their passing, I threw myself into my work, vowing to work as hard as I could to ensure other families wouldn’t experience the same pain I did. And Long Beach ended up being known nationwide for becoming the first city in California to vaccinate educators and the first city to vaccinate 99% of its senior population. I love Long Beach and I love this country, so I want to make sure every person, regardless of race, socioeconomic status, or sexuality, has the same opportunity that this country gave me. I ran for Congress and with you by my side, I made it there. And now I proudly am the first LGBTQ immigrant to serve in Congress. = But my work is not even close to being done, and there is so much left for us to fight for. = With you by my side, I know we can make this country a better place. Robert = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . Right now, Republican legislatures across America are pushing bills that target education, free speech, civil rights, healthcare, public accommodation, and countless other rights. **This is unacceptable, and anti-trans legislation is running rampant, especially in rural areas.** How is this happening? Republicans hold trifectas (power of both state legislatures and governor) in 22 states. That means that they can easily pass outrageous discriminatory legislation, like anti-trans bills, that strip Americans of their rights. **Here's how we solve it: elect more Democrats** as governors and state legislators to dethrone Republican trifectas. **I'm in this fight because it's personal to me, Peter.** Republicans across state legislatures in the Midwest, including my home state of Ohio, continue their attacks on young trans women like me, just for being who we are. I'm proud to be trans and I unapologetically reject being used as a pawn by Republicans in the culture war to implement policies that will hurt queer, specifically transgender, folks. That's why I'll keep fighting back against Republican legislators who continue to hurt both my rural and transgender communities. **[Will you help United Rural Democrats as it works to elect Democrats name: Dem Senate Alert
subject: the closest Senate race in the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, critical update out of battleground Nevada:
**FIRST:** Analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ predicted that Senate control could come down to Nevada, and _The Washington Post _ranked Jacky Rosen as one of the **most vulnerable** **senators up for reelection.**
**THEN:** National Republicans started coming after Jacky as a **top target for defeat** , flooding the airwaves with attack ads against us.
**NOW:**** New **polling in Nevada shows Democrats and Republicans locked in a dead heat!
