subject: The days of career politicians are OVER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Madison for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | Patriot,
---
I'm sure that the Radical Left and DC Swamp Rats have called me a few choice words.

And that's fine... Because I've got another phrase they can call me:

**THEIR WORST FREAKIN ' NIGHTMARE! **
Why? Because I see them for what they are: no good, self-serving, America-last SWAMP RATS.

Well, I've had it up to my eyeballs with the status quo. [**It 's about damn time we send a disruptor to Washington.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419558:JdXvfPGN7:m:1:3391001263:FEF69585632A913025F535B080463DDA:r) And that is exactly what I'll do.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419558:JdXvfPGN7:m:1:3391001263:FEF69585632A913025F535B080463DDA:r)
---
I've told you before, and I'll tell you again. I am **SICK** of the same old, same old in Washington. I was raised that when you see a problem, you propose a solution. **[And with you by my side, we will be the solution that America so desperately needs.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419558:JdXvfPGN7:m:1:3391001263:FEF69585632A913025F535B080463DDA:r)**

_The days of career politicians are OVER._

**FIRST ->****Help me retire the Radical career politician I am running against. ** **THEN ->**** Stand beside me as we take the fight to Joe Biden. ** **FINALLY ->**** We will save our country and restore its greatness. **

I'm working against the clock and have only until midnight tonight to show the Radical Left that, once again, they would be fools to bet against me. To bet against us. To bet against the America First Movement.
---
[**RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419558:JdXvfPGN7:m:1:3391001263:FEF69585632A913025F535B080463DDA:r)
---
Thank you for all that you do,

Madison

body:
Here’s the scoop:
| | |

Here’s the scoop: In order to win New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat, our campaign went into debt.
No question about it: It was the right thing to do. Polls were _so_ tight.
But now, our fundraising has come to a screeching halt compared to what we raised around Election Day, and we’ve still got some pretty big bills left to pay. Bad news considering the end of the quarter is a few short weeks away.
We know we ask a lot of you but this is a really important one:

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Everyone should be able to vote the Oregon Way [petition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59978493/395679796/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA5Y2Y0My02OWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKAzl1qKXNwNpLfA1pOL4uanjnFgc8sqWVudprH1paU=&emci=24594872-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1109cf43-69bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Every time I come home to Oregon, I see democracy thriving. Every time I vote, it's clear why: our state votes entirely by mail.** Oregon was the first state to adopt vote-at-home, and we've been going strong for over 25 years. Each election, our state has some of the highest voter turnout rates in the country, because we make it so accessible. Voting at home is safe, easy, and efficient. With vote-by-mail, there's no need to wait in long polling lines, no need to pay for child care, and no taking off time from school or work. It allows every American that wants to make their voice heard in our democracy to do so. That's also why Republicans have spent years trying to crack down on mail-in voting. But the American people know better. During the COVID-19 pandemic, millions of voters got to vote the Oregon Way: from the safety and comfort of their own homes. Now it's time to make it permanent for all federal elections, and I have the legislation to get it done. **Vote-by-mail is the most democratic way to conduct elections, and everyone deserves access. That's why I've put forth a plan to make voting at home the law of the land in all 50 states.** **[But I can't get this done without your help. Sign my petition to tell Congress to pass nationwide vote-by-mail for all!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59978495/395679798/-620433909?contactdata=jSF5nHAqEY+p1C22CHS/SYGLKACwoJv14EyhTsSwg+hBAAhwWzmIQJH5CLYngg/a2mh+PUMz8G7Ax9XPJId3Ii8Hx0AY5fJ9TaeAcgD3u4g=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA5Y2Y0My02OWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKAzl1qKXNwNpLfA1pOL4uanjnFgc8sqWVudprH1paU=&emci=24594872-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1109cf43-69bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)** [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59978497/395679800/-620433909?contactdata=jSF5nHAqEY+p1C22CHS/SYGLKACwoJv14EyhTsSwg+hBAAhwWzmIQJH5CLYngg/a2mh+PUMz8G7Ax9XPJId3Ii8Hx0AY5fJ9TaeAcgD3u4g=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA5Y2Y0My02OWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKAzl1qKXNwNpLfA1pOL4uanjnFgc8sqWVudprH1paU=&emci=24594872-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1109cf43-69bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364) We've all heard the horror stories of voters waiting in line for hours to cast their ballots. And more often than not, those barriers are highest in underserved communities. Here's the deal: voting shouldn't be the hardest thing you do all day. But Republican lawmakers and state legislatures are hellbent on making it harder for you to exercise your constitutional right to participate in our democratic process. **We must fight back against the rampant voter suppression that threatens our democracy. And the best solution is voting at home.** **[Join the grassroots movement. Sign my petition and urge Congress to pass nationwide vote-by-mail for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59978499/395679802/-620433909?contactdata=jSF5nHAqEY+p1C22CHS/SYGLKACwoJv14EyhTsSwg+hBAAhwWzmIQJH5CLYngg/a2mh+PUMz8G7Ax9XPJId3Ii8Hx0AY5fJ9TaeAcgD3u4g=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA5Y2Y0My02OWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKAzl1qKXNwNpLfA1pOL4uanjnFgc8sqWVudprH1paU=&emci=24594872-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1109cf43-69bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)** clean_body: | | | | Every time I come home to Oregon, I see democracy thriving. Every time I vote, it's clear why: our state votes entirely by mail. Oregon was the first state to adopt vote-at-home, and we've been going strong for over 25 years. Each election, our state has some of the highest voter turnout rates in the country, because we make it so accessible. Voting at home is safe, easy, and efficient. With vote-by-mail, there's no need to wait in long polling lines, no need to pay for child care, and no taking off time from school or work. It allows every American that wants to make their voice heard in our democracy to do so. That's also why Republicans have spent years trying to crack down on mail-in voting. But the American people know better. During the COVID-19 pandemic, millions of voters got to vote the Oregon Way: from the safety and comfort of their own homes. Now it's time to make it permanent for all federal elections, and I have the legislation to get it done. Vote-by-mail is the most democratic way to conduct elections, and everyone deserves access. That's why I've put forth a plan to make voting at home the law of the land in all 50 states. We've all heard the horror stories of voters waiting in line for hours to cast their ballots. And more often than not, those barriers are highest in underserved communities. Here's the deal: voting shouldn't be the hardest thing you do all day. But Republican lawmakers and state legislatures are hellbent on making it harder for you to exercise your constitutional right to participate in our democratic process. We must fight back against the rampant voter suppression that threatens our democracy. And the best solution is voting at home. Together we can take this essential step toward a brighter, more democratic future. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: “Too woke”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is the horrifying “woke” agenda that Republicans are trying so hard to block.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230310-3985-header&t=1&akid=3985%2E2526796%2ElpLyQ4)
Yesterday, Alexandria slammed House Republicans in a hearing where the main topic of complaint was that the federal government is “too woke.”
While they gave no definition of what “woke” is, the so-called “woke” policies on paper that were being criticized in this hearing included:
* Remote work for federal workers including those who are disabled
* Paying interns so that opportunities don’t just go to privileged kids whose parents can afford to pay their rent
* Creating career opportunities for partners of military service members
* Protections for firefighters so they don’t leave the job
* Diversity and inclusion efforts so that our federal workforce looks like the people who live in this country

This is the horrifying “woke” agenda that Republicans are trying so hard to block.
**Alexandria is one of our best defenses in Congress to hold Republicans accountable for stunts like this.**
**It’s why we need her in Congress to call out their antics. When Alexandria and our movement is strong (including our fundraising), we have the best chance to counter their moves and win.**
[**If you can, please pitch in $3 or any amount today so that we can hold Republicans accountable and deliver real progress for working people.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230310.8CVcb5&refcode=em20230310-3985-P_FND_RES_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3985%2E2526796%2ElpLyQ4)
Thank you for being such a crucial part of this movement.
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230310.8CVcb5&refcode=em20230310-3985-P_FND_RES_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3985%2E2526796%2ElpLyQ4)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | It's about Tucker Carlson
Tucker Carlson just blew the lid off the Democrat LIES about January 6th.
You already know Liz Cheney and the rest of the Woke Mob hate him, but ever since his BOMBSHELL story was released, **the Deep State is treating him worse than the Taliban.**
It's just been revealed that the Biden White House told Big Tech to censor and BAN Tucker Carlson.
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419066:JlarMPGNG:m:1:3365131770:D94F1618C78F177330AAF475FD29C590:r)
---
As you're reading this message, the highest levels of our government are doing everything they can to eliminate his rights.
We can't let them silence Tucker. We can't let them silence the ONLY voice who's speaking the TRUTH about January 6th.
If Woke Mob can do it to Tucker, they can do it to everyone - including YOU!
Any second he can be yanked off the air and silenced forever.
We're calling for a swift and immediate conservative response that's so massive, the Woke Mob will have no choice to back down.
And all we're asking for is an answer to this one question:
**[Do you think Tucker deserves to stay on TV?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62419066:JlarMPGNG:m:1:3365131770:D94F1618C78F177330AAF475FD29C590:r)**

---
**Liz Cheney is laughing at every patriot who refuses to respond.**
Please, please, PLEASE respond now. We can't let the Deep State cancel Tucker.

name: Congresswoman Suzan DelBene
subject: Asking you to support Andrea Salinas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
---
Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. **I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Andrea Salinas to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November. I’ve seen Andrea’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Oregon's Sixth District. But with Andrea serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. [**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Andrea in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59979295/395682642/574102528?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTAzOGU2ZC02Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S1LAWYeBy2bPCl98WczDFIY2MMxSO1jJ1OeXm131to0=) | _[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59979296/395682643/574102528?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTAzOGU2ZC02Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S1LAWYeBy2bPCl98WczDFIY2MMxSO1jJ1OeXm131to0=)_
---
**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**
Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.
The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__
**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Andrea.** I know Andrea has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OR-06, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.
[**I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Andrea in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59979297/395682644/574102528?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTAzOGU2ZC02Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S1LAWYeBy2bPCl98WczDFIY2MMxSO1jJ1OeXm131to0=)

body:
I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Emilia Sykes to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.
Peter, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Emilia Sykes to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Emilia’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Northeast Ohio. But with Emilia serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Emilia Sykes in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59979545/395683455/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_sddc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWZmZThjZC02Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BgtFMW4mGqZyMvAVb3S8xHvy4B2uyQ8O0t484iFyoDE=)

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

Peter, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Emilia.** I know Emiia has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OH-13, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

I’ve seen Emilia’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Northeast Ohio. But with Emilia serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. = | = I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher. Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block. Peter, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel. But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Emilia. The same people who are pushing these woke ESG policies are oddly quiet about what’s happening in East Palestine, Ohio.| | | |

Peter, over the last few years, the Woke Left has acted as if the sky is falling when it comes to climate change – **some even claimed the world would end in 12 years if we didn’t address climate change.** But the same people who are pushing these woke ESG policies are oddly quiet about what’s happening in East Palestine, Ohio. When faced with an actual environmental disaster they’re more focused on banning your gas stove. **This is** _**proof**_**that their ESG agenda is a total scam.** They don’t care about our environment or our communities but they do care about the power they get by pretending they do. Thankfully, since launching our ESGhurts campaign, we’ve made massive strides in combating this radical agenda in states across the country. For instance, our activists backed a bill in the****[**Kentucky House recently**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=76c7f94015fa42d28a7dea1343c4841c&_e=oO5Z6xVJXvxW_sBtNiB8bl9qn1w38FiueohfAg0KqfFxNB1SANghcQabIyrtjps1NDp1NA8wvLPpVaUz0awRguhg4HeevFvyjxeZ2aV01_aNXWmITkzPvrUBx53DIirhHldCAyoOkFpkUqHcDSEoUpswm_z_AK7i3euhrN0ciOtx_scnnKVhPvXHVMP6gB0omLZVZcPn8Q2_LZro6jKfeB0U6YmU8qemBV4aGAckkRQw2qpdx5WkpIIxmhZm0oVgp7GNZZx5m3DqJY4sRqXKdSPGn_t3Jk8bpZRgNZH8VPuoLYWHVECrAqcqdjSF6na1HvFL36_KJzGEpwOcdo6cNOKBIRkYAA3q-Rn7rKJHpb6cJlk6wGbZRgokqpd1MCAc0XiDOzmv5RlTwyA4vcZ8GjDoBwTMmP2fX4kIli3Dyd4GOvyFQ_lBIAUZDTfgnE97JS6rADtSsgpSolCHd9L-QA%3D%3D) to protect taxpayer dollars from funding the ESG agenda. This is just one of many victories we’ve had in the past 12 months.

body:

| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62420312:6jmvMPGAN:m:1:3331421248:20A73C273E50B5E7BB3C34BF3951D668:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke

NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. Peter, this winter, as many as 68,000 homeless people spent their nights either in a crowded shelter, in subway stations, or on the frigid streets of New York City.

This winter, countless families in lower-income neighborhoods shivered through nights without proper heating, entirely ignored and manipulated by predatory landlords.

And this winter, rent and home prices reached “crisis levels,” worsening the housing shortage and leaving millions of New Yorkers uncertain about where they would rest their heads.
**Peter, this is _unacceptable_. ****Every single person should have the right to housing that is both safe AND affordable, but decades of abuse from predatory landlords, manipulative private investors, and discriminatory housing laws have stripped so many New Yorkers of this right.**

As the People’s Lawyer, I’ve spent the last four years fighting hard to end New York’s housing crisis once and for all. And I will _not_ rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to rest their head at night — but I cannot win this fight alone.
**That’s why I’m counting on 5,000 fearless fighters to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight so I can see how many people are in this fight with me, but I'm still missing your response. So please, Peter, tell me now:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**

clean_body: | | | | | Should everyone have access to affordable housing? | | | | Peter, this winter, as many as 68,000 homeless people spent their nights either in a crowded shelter, in subway stations, or on the frigid streets of New York City. This winter, countless families in lower-income neighborhoods shivered through nights without proper heating, entirely ignored and manipulated by predatory landlords. And this winter, rent and home prices reached “crisis levels,” worsening the housing shortage and leaving millions of New Yorkers uncertain about where they would rest their heads. Peter, this is unacceptable. Every single person should have the right to housing that is both safe AND affordable, but decades of abuse from predatory landlords, manipulative private investors, and discriminatory housing laws have stripped so many New Yorkers of this right. As the People’s Lawyer, I’ve spent the last four years fighting hard to end New York’s housing crisis once and for all. And I will not rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to rest their head at night — but I cannot win this fight alone. That’s why I’m counting on 5,000 fearless fighters to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight so I can see how many people are in this fight with me, but I'm still missing your response. So please, Peter, tell me now: | | Should everyone have access to affordable housing? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

body:

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87e5d4fe1eab46b68d35e4b847a94f5a&_e=MzYPnj-A3SkkWXEPjA9YHjUA5O3cVzYcWNctoKui1Zb54DF54Eiwor729xSKLC4Ygd22Y-uAcAonHSHNsffkSjwbVg4ha78GWEBPRhbdcCh77S5nznPPdDMFOsigStTGh3TIlYFnvrMlRFlIaziZa7TmNZvNkfWgPwHyiEDGx83ftyIru7XT8NwvtK-1O9ehZXoRWfPgo602lGRHv1G7FHx3tp08x--JfoxP2KuCznPc7-IqOFZ8hTk9ahl37Y4W)

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. clean_body: I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. Friend, The government and fake news media are lying to you! They called the January 6th protest a " deadly insurrection," but the video evidence doesn't back it up. A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful. We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State. I 'm launching the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Support the January 6th Defendants Goal: $33,000 Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation: PENDING The January 6th Committee lied. They lied about how Brian Sicknick died. They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission. They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away. They lied about Ray Epps. If they were "insurrectionists," then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested? What else are they lying about? I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free. I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying. This is just the beginning. The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events. Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. ** Thank you, Kash Patel The Fight With Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. ** Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
#
[](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=1&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Peter,
I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=2&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
**Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.**[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=3&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
[**If you’re with me, chip in $10 right now to Charles Booker****and our campaign to be one of the Founding Members of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link: secure.actblue.com/donate/charles-adam**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=4&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=5&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
_This is the fight of my life_ — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=6&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=7&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18901?t=8&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
With our economy and our democracy at risk, we _must fight:_[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=9&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=10&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
**With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.**[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=11&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=12&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy just removed me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18901?t=13&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=14&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18901?t=15&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
[**Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff by splitting a donation before the end of the day? Even $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=16&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)**
**
I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy.[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=17&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Talk soon,[**
**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18901?t=18&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
Adam
**[CHIP IN →](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18903?t=19&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230310-3043-footer&t=20&refcode2=3043_346206_A--25E&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)**
---
Email us: [info@charlesbooker.org](mailto: info@charlesbooker.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to PO Box 4369, Louisville, KY 40204.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=21&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.charlesbooker.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=3043%2E346206%2EA--25E)

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is why Mexico’s President is attacking me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1lb_Vfv06PJFR5odyp9XolVJUEyDK4GwxKsRA-16E9aMOLemZ2FtvPNqq_RPMW57R6Esy-Iz6Yj6mDHZNKpIZY1YE1ZoJfUOtymSIFpInZMGUGoA2QTZUwCOTvCfFBN-ZryEg7u9PhIJ37XQwbN4tD9GfP9s2GTFfVWfh6lO8iq1gKry_iAVKRIZe2UNBS7Gm5T_r9FKI_vLPDOIe8XZMBlKgc2BO47JTWo3okoTqqvW0QXwsZt2b58KFZrkOrY8qW9jVeM16EHYvKt6KAQ_POLFa1SDBlQcNS9zGASAlOgF2PEtJGRPJeRBiI5QAeIG5tCgRnEcDNkv2LID-vRpQ==&c=QM71Gfv52cU9ebsd7WKl8ugifcovAA4aUhmwferaiNMEhj01Teuxsg==&ch=03ahUra4e_pF2j0Jk8VU26glTlGrxiZssAQ5GqIxP0y9C4R6OtkTrg==)
---
|
Peter-
On a usual week, I update you on a wide array of policy matters rather than focus on a single issue. However, this week was a very unusual week and so this campaign brief will be quite different. I say unusual because it is not every day that a foreign head-of-state spends their entire week personally attacking a United States Congressman for legislation that would improve the safety and security of American citizens and the citizens of the country this head-of-state is supposed to represent. But that's exactly what happened, as the President of Mexico, Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador (AMLO) decided he would spend his week coming after me for daring to introduce legislation that would target the Mexican drug cartels which are terrorizing his citizens and killing more than 70,000 Americans every year with fentanyl. President AMLO also did this the same week two Americans were killed by a Mexican cartel shortly after they entered Matamoros, which sits just across the Texas-Mexico border, for a medical procedure.
That's why I want to devote the entirety of this campaign brief to that issue: my bills to target the cartels. I'm going to explain exactly why I am doing this and what my bills do, debunk the lies of Mexico's President and top leaders of the Mexican government (who also attacked me), and expose just how determined President AMLO is to stop me. At the end of the campaign brief I am going to outline exactly what you can do to help me in this effort and ensure we seize on this opportunity to finally take action against the Mexican drug cartels.
As always, thank you for your support. Now let's get started.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| MY LEGISLATION AGAINST THE CARTELS IS NOT PARTISAN
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1lb_Vfv06PJFR5odyp9XolVJUEyDK4GwxKsRA-16E9aMOLemZ2FtvPNqq_RPMW5OaTvHv-WukgznHX7-_Fj9tgFNHG43_g6ecSXZ8NEiq2azzhYE2124kSZEgGCbPONmy4hyxhuNqjOuXwn1Rl8ogLu3SCFKgnmrDl8glXU6IILefxw4VLw6To_L-BOggCyNK5q21lfhpWNO4l7fyk3QeDEPfdrxuc44xwrR19Fp38dvHVKpM_IW4XTXb4Ach7q2BZUFZ6d9HUI7eJSbohSj9VSZhf7u_d-&c=QM71Gfv52cU9ebsd7WKl8ugifcovAA4aUhmwferaiNMEhj01Teuxsg==&ch=03ahUra4e_pF2j0Jk8VU26glTlGrxiZssAQ5GqIxP0y9C4R6OtkTrg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MY OPED](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1lb_Vfv06PJFR5odyp9XolVJUEyDK4GwxKsRA-16E9aMOLemZ2FtvPNqq_RPMW5OaTvHv-WukgznHX7-_Fj9tgFNHG43_g6ecSXZ8NEiq2azzhYE2124kSZEgGCbPONmy4hyxhuNqjOuXwn1Rl8ogLu3SCFKgnmrDl8glXU6IILefxw4VLw6To_L-BOggCyNK5q21lfhpWNO4l7fyk3QeDEPfdrxuc44xwrR19Fp38dvHVKpM_IW4XTXb4Ach7q2BZUFZ6d9HUI7eJSbohSj9VSZhf7u_d-&c=QM71Gfv52cU9ebsd7WKl8ugifcovAA4aUhmwferaiNMEhj01Teuxsg==&ch=03ahUra4e_pF2j0Jk8VU26glTlGrxiZssAQ5GqIxP0y9C4R6OtkTrg==)
---
| |
---
| In a closely divided Congress, opportunities for bipartisanship are rare. That's why we should seize those opportunities whenever possible, because that's the only way anything is going to become law in a divided government. I believe my legislation to target the cartels is an excellent opportunity for bipartisanship. Let me explain why.
1\. These bills are very simple. They are specifically focused on the threat from the Mexican drug cartels and improving our capabilities and authorities to target them. One bill authorizes the use of military force against the cartels, so that we can work by, with, and through the Mexican government (just like we do with any host government when we have military authorities in their country) to assist them with all of the military resources at our disposal (including intelligence gathering and sharing). The other bill I've introduced would hit the cartels where it hurts: their wallets. My legislation would seize the cartels' assets and would also sanction and deny aid to foreign governments that coordinate with cartels or do not take the necessary action to stop cartel activity in their own countries-Mexico is an obvious example. It would also authorize increased punishment for anyone convicted of aiding cartel-related crimes by adding up to 20 years to their sentence and naturalized citizens could lose their citizenship if they are convicted. These are narrowly focused bills on an issue that both Democrats and Republicans have publicly acknowledged is a threat.
2\. These bills are also not inherently partisan as they do not wade into other divisive issues. I purposefully do not address immigration reform or border security in either bill, because we are never going to bring Democrats to the table on those issues in divided government. Obviously, I believe we need to improve border security and have introduced legislation to give our Border Patrol more resources, fix the problems within our asylum laws that encourage illegal immigration, and increase penalties against those who come into our country illegally. However, with Democrats still in control of the Senate and with a Democrat president in the White House, we need bipartisan support for any legislation to become law and my top priority is getting legislation enacted that would take on the criminals killing 70,000 Americans every year with fentanyl.
3\. Finally, the fentanyl crisis is one that impacts every single community and every single congressional district in this country. And there is bipartisan acknowledgement that the fentanyl crisis is being fueled by the Mexican drug cartels. The fentanyl crisis is an issue that gets national attention across the political spectrum-both Fox News and CNN run regular segments on the fentanyl crisis because it is impossible to ignore. That's why every single time I talk about these bills I frame it in a way that describes my legislation as a solution to the root cause of the fentanyl crisis, which is the trafficking of this illicit, deadly narcotic into our country by cartels just south of our border.
This is a common enemy that every American should want to defeat. Every policymaker, regardless of their political affiliation, should be joining legislation like mine. Stopping the Mexican drug cartels from killing Americans offers a unique opportunity for immediate bipartisan progress.

| DEBUNKING AMLO'S LIES

| As President AMLO went on his tirade against me, he based his arguments against my legislation on two main lies: 1) that the fentanyl crisis is America's fault, not the fault of Mexico or the Mexican cartels and 2) that my legislation would mean an immediate invasion of Mexico by America's military. I'll debunk both of these lies.
First, President AMLO said that if there was not a demand in the United States for fentanyl there would be no incentive for cartels to supply it. That is absurd: the supply of fentanyl creates the demand. Using chemical precursors from China, the cartels manufacture this narcotic that is 100 times more powerful than morphine. They traffic it into the United States with ease, both at points of entry and in between points of entry. Fentanyl is extremely addictive, which is why the cartels lace it into street drugs-if more people are addicted to their product, they will continue to buy it. Moreover, the primary reason young people overdose from fentanyl is because they have no idea they are taking it. These kids think they are taking common street drugs like Xanax or OxyContin or Adderall that happen to be laced with deadly levels of fentanyl.
AMLO also had the audacity to claim that fentanyl doesn't even exist in Mexico, that it isn't produced or consumed in his country. Even AMLO's own military debunks that claim. Back in February, [the Mexican army announced it seized more than a half million pills of fentanyl in the largest synthetic drug lab found to date.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1lb_Vfv06PJFR5odyp9XolVJUEyDK4GwxKsRA-16E9aMOLemZ2FtvPNqq_RPMW5XaZPix6v3r60r7Db5T0Y6VPiwXDWwQ6P3hi5cNRKztGQT46lv1xdt0mLKG9o3zkVfmTb016CuLTuPxfrGGCD9mhA4K0r3YUCXRMwFkS2OzGBxzSQ8mKG4UBY0C9F9kGdd_EE8OCTVj5Mn1-4H-mHahtxZQlYGoJm9ZgLzLAAUcuXCff-4Zx3Ng==&c=QM71Gfv52cU9ebsd7WKl8ugifcovAA4aUhmwferaiNMEhj01Teuxsg==&ch=03ahUra4e_pF2j0Jk8VU26glTlGrxiZssAQ5GqIxP0y9C4R6OtkTrg==) The army discovered the fentanyl lab in Culiacan, the capital of Sinaloa state, which is controlled by the Sinaloa Cartel. Mexican security analyst David Saucedo said "the president is lying. The Mexican cartels, above all the CJNG ( Jalisco New Generation Cartel) and the Sinaloa Cartel have learned to manufacture it."
And AMLO's claim about my bill is patently absurd. My bill doesn't mean that American tanks or American troops are going to roll into Mexico. Rather, my bill authorizes the military to work with the Mexican government to target these cartels that are terrorizing BOTH of our citizens. We simply have more military resources and intelligence capabilities than Mexico's military, and we want to use those resources to help Mexico get rid of this problem in their country. Furthermore, my bill is specifically targeted toward the drug cartels. It is narrowly targeted against:

* Those who produce and traffic fentanyl into our country.

* Those who attack United States law enforcement or our military.

* The Sinaloa Cartel, the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, the Gulf Cartel, Los Zetas Cartel, and the Juarez Cartel.

My legislation would also sunset five years after enactment so that it is not a continuous authorization. Congress would have to come back and reauthorize my bill for it to continue.

---
| | |
---
| |
---
| AMLO IS PLANNING ON INTERFERING IN OUR ELECTIONS TO STOP ME
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1lb_Vfv06PJFR5odyp9XolVJUEyDK4GwxKsRA-16E9aMOLemZ2FtvPNqq_RPMW5L2ZesSY5TYnWiZO16jyDWKgoYfFDUfv-tT48_wgPKvxGM3ucCYvh8_y-tX2rLidXuqzrzEJcXXxUTrW9zE315tSAjQifJ1mlc6KY06dhznYOM7P-qbZj5Z4TLgjaYZ_QHfh87pntzPk=&c=QM71Gfv52cU9ebsd7WKl8ugifcovAA4aUhmwferaiNMEhj01Teuxsg==&ch=03ahUra4e_pF2j0Jk8VU26glTlGrxiZssAQ5GqIxP0y9C4R6OtkTrg==)
---
| President AMLO is so against my efforts, that he promised to engage in a public relations campaign within the United States against my bills to fight the cartels and "make a call to not vote for '' anyone that supports my legislation. That is clear intent to interfere in our elections by a foreign head-of-state, which is illegal.
AMLO is also pressuring other high-level Mexican officials to attack me. The leader of the Mexican Senate attacked me earlier this week and the Mexican Senate Foreign Relations Commissioner issued a full page of lies and smears against me and my legislation.
Frankly, I take their attacks as compliments. It means we are doing the right thing and that leaders in Mexico are finally taking notice.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| BOTTOM LINE
---
| The bottom line is this: My efforts are aimed at improving the lives of both American citizens AND Mexican citizens. The Mexican people want to stop the cartels as much as we do because they've experienced firsthand how these cartels have terrorized their communities, murdered their family members and neighbors, and corrupted every government institution they rely upon for a well-functioning society. Mexico is teetering on the edge of becoming a failed narco-state if they do not eradicate the cartel threat. Mexico's leaders need to stop spending their energy attacking me and turn their energy toward taking down the cartels who are destroying their country, their security, and their vital relationship with the United States.
---

| HOW YOU CAN HELP

---
| This is my top priority in Congress right now and I am doing everything in my power to get these policies across the finish line, despite the threats from President AMLO. If you agree with my efforts and would like to offer your support, here's how you can help:
SIGN THIS PETITION: Sign your name on [this petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1lb_Vfv06PJFR5odyp9XolVJUEyDK4GwxKsRA-16E9aMOLemZ2FtvPNqq_RPMW5iQ0O8u6-UkQWqiXLhZ6V7f_3FtTBrn5Oz5wqKRrifw6V_ybWZCmv84uziCPpbdeK2dKRkwNALuR1xy7dvRUmgtZOAnUlho7mtXv3mvJ2aPnGmSwa3iTWGxmJWWBp8S41Ku_Ej33jcl8XJhray3qg2o9-UR1gboV_uD3G45xz2BFIOG6UmTG-B9RsS6NMmep51Tz0l82o4X9AeSNwQPt8HCZ-oOncYXu8ewsXlNUFD58G5d7BcOD7a90sotQOK5fqQxxzJd6XryIeh-D8UOQhy4IEgnkPbwuq5eYo1ndyLt8Hs7qUzmJn9vPiJnKcI8gv&c=QM71Gfv52cU9ebsd7WKl8ugifcovAA4aUhmwferaiNMEhj01Teuxsg==&ch=03ahUra4e_pF2j0Jk8VU26glTlGrxiZssAQ5GqIxP0y9C4R6OtkTrg==) to call on Congressional leaders to bring my cartel bills to the floor for a vote.
CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE AND SENATORS: Whether you're represented by a Democrat or Republican in Congress, call their office and tell them to co-sponsor my bills. The more support (especially bipartisan support) we can get for these bills, the better chance they have of becoming law.

** **I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Marcy Kaptur.** I know Marcy has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OH-09, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

**[I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Marcy Kaptur in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59982345/395692058/-820256091?refcode=EM_FR_230310frontline_N_TK_45DA_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWIxMjAyYS03MWJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pl_7af-Wwg4PkVO1eFtQ37V3ohBm2YDmy4QVVp0utK0=)**

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: I'd love to give you a call, Derek
body:
| | |
---
Derek, my husband’s family is from Chicago, where the river runs green every year in celebration of St. Patrick’s Day. Bart’s last name, now mine, means “proud” in Gaelic and was first used hundreds of years ago near Limerick. As you can imagine, this is a big holiday in our family.

Do you celebrate? Do you know the origin of your last name? Which is your favorite holiday (I actually have a few)? I’d love to know.
**Recently, I asked my top supporters like you to complete my 100 days survey, and I am grateful for your feedback. Because you're a Founding Member of Team Chrissy, I'd love to chat with you, trade family celebration stories, and generally hear what’s on your mind.**

**The first 10 people to sign up for a monthly recurring contribution to my campaign will receive a call from me in the next few weeks.**
_May your troubles be less
And your blessings be more,
And nothing but happiness
Come through your door.
–Old Irish Blessing_

clean_body: | | | Derek, my husband’s family is from Chicago, where the river runs green every year in celebration of St. Patrick’s Day. Bart’s last name, now mine, means “proud” in Gaelic and was first used hundreds of years ago near Limerick. As you can imagine, this is a big holiday in our family. Do you celebrate? Do you know the origin of your last name? Which is your favorite holiday (I actually have a few)? I’d love to know. Recently, I asked my top supporters like you to complete my 100 days survey, and I am grateful for your feedback. Because you're a Founding Member of Team Chrissy, I'd love to chat with you, trade family celebration stories, and generally hear what’s on your mind. The first 10 people to sign up for a monthly recurring contribution to my campaign will receive a call from me in the next few weeks. May your troubles be less And your blessings be more, And nothing but happiness Come through your door. –Old Irish Blessing | | = I know you share my commitment to securing a better future for folks in our community, so I hope you'll join me in sharing your thoughts. I look forward to speaking with you soon. There's work to be done. And Happy St. Patrick's Day! – Chrissy = | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. Peter, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Yadira Caraveo to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Yadira’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Colorado’s 8th district. But with Yadira serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

**[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $8 to help keep Yadira in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59982966/395694073/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b1_csd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjA0YjM1NS03MmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75c314EA-jYYWZmKuI-ozgaCmw0JoMa_o1Ok7J8PZ-8=)**

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

Peter, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Yadira.** I know Yadira has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for Colorado’s 8th district, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

clean_body: | = Peter, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Yadira Caraveo to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November. I’ve seen Yadira’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Colorado’s 8th district. But with Yadira serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. = **= I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher. Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block. Peter, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel. But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Yadira. I know Yadira has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for Colorado’s 8th district, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ******=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Thank you for standing with us, Suzan DelBene Chair, DCCC | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

That's why we're extending a special invitation to activate YOUR March Democratic Membership today. = | | = In 2022, we beat far-right extremists to defend our Senate majority against all odds. But election experts are already warning that we're facing even tougher odds this cycle – The Washington Post is calling the 2024 Senate map a "GOP dream." And here in New York, Kirsten is running for reelection amidst a dangerous surge in GOP turnout. New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades. Mitch McConnell knows that he only has to flip two seats to take back the majority – so he'll be looking for any signs of weakness from Democrats like Kirsten. The only way she'll be able to overcome the GOP's megadonors is with a huge, early surge in grassroots support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Ro Khanna
subject: We must end burdensome medical debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
No one should have to forego medical care for the sake of financial stability.
#
Friend,
Credit scores have an impact on some of the most fundamental elements of adult life. Whether you’re looking to purchase a house or a car, pursue a college education, enroll in insurance, or start a small business, a good credit score is often the deciding factor.
Yet for many Americans, particularly in the South, unpaid medical debt has resulted in low credit scores that prevent people from obtaining loans or forcing them to pay higher interest rates. [A recent study](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11306?t=7&akid=2648%2E946728%2EkZWS9u) found a strong correlation between counties with the largest amount of unpaid medical debt and the lowest average credit scores. In other words, Americans are being held back because they can’t afford life-saving medical treatments, in a region that has consistently failed to expand Medicaid for lower-income communities.
[**Tell Congress: Forgive medical debt and give Americans back their borrowing power.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/sign/forgive-medical-debt-petition/?t=8&akid=2648%2E946728%2EkZWS9u)
Through no fault of their own, millions of people in the South are being punished for seeking unforeseen, life-saving treatment that was simply priced too high. Unpaid medical debt is an undue burden that Congress has the power to eradicate.
[**Sign if you agree: No one should have to forego medical care for the sake of financial stability.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/sign/forgive-medical-debt-petition/?t=9&akid=2648%2E946728%2EkZWS9u)
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230310-2648-footer&t=10&refcode2=2648_946728_kZWS9u&akid=2648%2E946728%2EkZWS9u)**
---

But I’ve got to be honest — seeing that extremism up close and personal has been pretty alarming. I was on the House floor when Marjorie Taylor Greene and other Republicans heckled President Biden for saying the GOP wants to cut Social Security — something they’ve repeatedly threatened to do. I’ve heard awful attacks against LGBTQ Americans. And I’ve seen them passionately speak about their agenda to block abortion access. Team, as a representative for Colorado, I promise you that I will continue to fight back against extremism. And I’ll defend our democracy, just as the people of our community sent me to Washington to do — but I can’t do it alone. [**Our mid-month fundraising deadline is 5 days away, and the truth is, online donations have been slower than expected in 2023 — so we need some help to catch up to our goal. clean_body: | = Team, I’ve talked before about how one of the reasons I ran for Congress was to protect our democracy from the threat of right-wing extremism. But I’ve got to be honest — seeing that extremism up close and personal has been pretty alarming. I was on the House floor when Marjorie Taylor Greene and other Republicans heckled President Biden for saying the GOP wants to cut Social Security — something they’ve repeatedly threatened to do. I’ve heard awful attacks against LGBTQ Americans. And I’ve seen them passionately speak about their agenda to block abortion access. Team, as a representative for Colorado, I promise you that I will continue to fight back against extremism. And I’ll defend our democracy, just as the people of our community sent me to Washington to do — but I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jason Crow and Brittany Pettersen will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much for everything you do, — Brittany = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

subject: Constitutional Carry Update!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04c83d56883d/were-off-and-running-8118333?e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
| We're moving forward with the initiative petition process to amend Oregon's Constitution. When we're successful on the November 2024 ballot, Oregon will become the nation's 26th Constitutional Carry State.

**Here's what we've done since my last update:**
1\. Launched [Constitutional Carry for Oregon](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=37337e8a4f&e=ae2345792a). We're still building this website, but it will be a primary source of information. Joel manages this site.

2\. Launched our official [Constitutional Carry for Oregon ](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=c937c77515&e=ae2345792a)page on Facebook! Jean is the lead admin here. (I also post updates and other goodies on my [Common Sense Sanctuary](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=adda28fa2d&e=ae2345792a) Facebook page.)

3\. Formed the Constitutional Carry for Oregon PAC. This is a state requirement in many areas, including fundraising. (We are _volunteers_ , by the way, but advertising in 2024 won't come cheap.)

4\. We are recruiting County Leads in all 36 Oregon counties, and are vetting them thoroughly. After we get through the next few steps with the Secretary of State and Attorney General, and have things like a ballot title and new signature sheets, this network will activate. Volunteers (and we know there are so many of you!) will be able to contact their County Leads to help circulate.

5\. We've begun collecting what are called "Sponsorship Signatures." We need only 1,000 of those. If all goes well, we should get the go-ahead to begin gathering our 160,551+ signatures in April sometime. There are many steps in between.

6: Media. (There were more, but here are samples.)
[Joel on Captive Audience](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=31f5ab3238&e=ae2345792a)
[Kerry on KYKN](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=5ef15a5115&e=ae2345792a)
[Baker City Herald Article](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=10acf7c6cf&e=ae2345792a)
[Elkhorn Media](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=2a2ac723c5&e=ae2345792a)
[Fox 12 Portland](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=526b82f158&e=ae2345792a)
[Kerry on KQEN](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=96601be4bb&e=ae2345792a)

Finally ...
**I will be at Thor Armory in Albany,
noon - 4 p.m. on Saturday, March 11
collecting those 1,000 sponsorship signatures!**

[ During a House Judiciary Committee hearing on the “Twitter Files,” journalist Matt Taibbi was repeatedly pressed by Rep. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea40c3fd4bce4deda920e7c213de4b86&_e=z8rp6oyTSS0uFYItSdWfoje_qMKIGc3brvIfjtG07PQsWC8XDqHMgFi0QehTbom80fy-JW_GrlvAiR7rJJQdCEGIMHqyfe-TR_PkIk5W1y85q802B_7Qu5_Swpr-avLWrooSfRUHbUDzM5kkkpBFSQ9sWEaw7Cag57kAqM59_r6TLtr2jeq5i5-vy4rD_mvVk6qtEF7RekLR8QghXeWszN0Ro2L0DNg6rPmFw2Ym3jKnqvZqCx5zVH6RhitsaoaHvOQ3kS-EYYguDOXVYLhweCZsY6HJawZX6CkY9w0Dy73uRN-A19_GgVvS1Ii7fKPyYREy55O1-RLtgkcjLeaDEtgq9Qe1Y3LbH4th9tZP9jz4Ky8Q34phrEGPTaKBzfg4URcNm8dCAFv9sQUBO6vXcw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea40c3fd4bce4deda920e7c213de4b86&_e=z8rp6oyTSS0uFYItSdWfoje_qMKIGc3brvIfjtG07PQsWC8XDqHMgFi0QehTbom80fy-JW_GrlvAiR7rJJQdCEGIMHqyfe-TR_PkIk5W1y85q802B_7Qu5_Swpr-avLWrooSfRUHbUDzM5kkkpBFSQ9sWEaw7Cag57kAqM59_r6TLtr2jeq5i5-vy4rD_mvVk6qtEF7RekLR8QghXeWszN0Ro2L0DNg6rPmFw2Ym3jKnqvZqCx5zVH6RhitsaoaHJaPEN7nmRKwe2EMH32iZKLM3gjHOplJFn9QYqPAEX6D9LeTPPY9XL-VVCy-LtRJsnpfPkfleawa97rnzvFiB6zAisQVMqF6b0mkm2V91T8fOPt-4T8qKSyvqrA8a2H1EF5zEP358nYwgQTSq1wyFkQ%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. \- It’s #FF (FollowFriday), and I wanted to send you an email so you can get to know a little more about me and my family. I also hope you will follow us on our journey into 2024..... and maybe even invest financially in our mission to bring an additional conservative voice to the United States Congress from Central Florida!
| [CHIP IN $20.24](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=a83ada475d&e=5e611ce1ba)
---
# Scotty Moore:
For over 20 years, Scotty worked at the largest Christian mission organization in the world, Campus Crusade for Christ; now known as Cru.

Throughout his career, Scotty has made it his mission to help people know Jesus and help transform their lives. He has the unique ability to connect with anyone, anywhere, anytime - leveraging his highly dynamic and energetic personality in order to win people over. He excels in casting vision, telling stories and developing lasting relationships that produce next-level results. Scotty has coached people to reach their dream weight, assist struggling marriages, coach individuals in their leadership and personal development and help struggling businesses steady the ship and set a course for the future. He has traveled extensively and lived in Brazil for 6 years where he married his wife and learned to speak Portuguese on the streets of Brazil.

In 2021, Scotty took the bold step to run for U.S. Congress in Florida’s 9th congressional district, earning the endorsements of Mark Meadows, Senator Ted Cruz and Senator Rick Scott – eventually winning the primary and becoming the Republican nominee.
Scotty believes America is experiencing a leadership crisis. He strongly believes not all leaders are alike and that we need men and women who will courageously defend the Constitution, promote conservative principles with AMERICA-FIRST policies that honor God and help SAVE AMERICA.
Scotty holds a B.A. in Communication and has been married to Ester for 20 years and they have two daughters.
# FOLLOW US

name: Andy Cohen
subject: Me, you, and Lucas Kunce VS Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)
Hey Peter, it’s Andy Cohen! **I’m reaching out so I can invite you to have some fun with me and Lucas Kunce on Zoom on March 16** — but let me explain more.
You might know me for hosting _‘Watch What Happens Live!’_ on Bravo for nearly 14 years, but something you might not know is that I was born and raised in St. Louis, Missouri.
I love my home state, but I sure as hell don’t love some of the hypocrites who’ve taken power there — and Josh Hawley is the biggest creep of them all. He’s obsessed with controlling every detail of our lives, whether it be in the workplace, the doctor’s office, or even the bedroom. And on January 6, 2021, he showed us just how much of a fraud and coward he really is.
Missourians deserve a Senator who’s proven they’ll fight for them — not a phony who runs away when things get tough. That’s why I’m proud to support Lucas Kunce’s campaign to replace Josh Hawley in this U.S. Senate. He’s a 13-year Marine veteran who knows what it takes to stand up and be a warrior for everyday Missourians.
**On March 16 at 6:30PM CT/7:30PM ET, I’ll be joining Lucas for a virtual grassroots event. We’re gonna get into exactly how we’ll take Josh Hawley down —[and I want you to join us! Space is limited, so sign up and add a donation of $3 or more to secure your spot and send in a question for us now!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)**
**[CHIP IN TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)**
_Can't make it to the Zoom, but still want to support Lucas? Chip in using the links below. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[Chip in $5 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28557?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv) [Chip in $15 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28557?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28558?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)
---
This is going to be a real fight to beat Hawley in 2024. While Josh has shown us he’s more a runner than he is a fighter, he’s going to have the whole corporate and GOP mega-donor establishment backing him up. And they’ve even been attacking Lucas already since the day he launched his campaign.
But as a Missourian, trust me — if anyone can beat Josh Hawley, it’s Lucas Kunce, and it’s this election cycle. Here’s what Josh himself said just a few weeks ago: **“My race is going to be one of the closest in America.”**
Since Josh got to the Senate, he’s made a fool of himself. He’s obsessed with convincing the rest of us that he’s a “real man”. So much so, this is the REAL title of a book he’s ACTUALLY writing — _Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs._
Now it’s been years since his approval numbers have been above 50%, and even his mentor, former GOP Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.” The buyer’s remorse about Josh is real.
But then we’ve got Lucas Kunce — a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marine Corps to honor the community that took care of his family when they were bankrupt by medical bills.
Lucas did multiple overseas deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, worked at the Pentagon to keep dangerous weapons out of the hands of terrorists, and helped lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia. After active duty, he became an advocate against corporate corruption and the pointless wars that cowards like Josh Hawley always want to start.
Now Lucas is running for U.S. Senate to take power back for everyday Missourians — to rebuild our state, raise wages, and put people back in charge of their own bodies. His record-breaking campaign already has Josh feeling the heat. And if you ask me, living a life of service like Lucas has is a bit more convincing than writing a book titled “Manhood.”
When you chip in to help Lucas’ campaign, your support goes toward putting that message in front of Missouri voters and holding Josh Hawley accountable. **[So if you’re free to join us on Zoom on March 16 and want to help Lucas flip this U.S. Senate seat, please chip in what you can!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)**
**[CHIP IN TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)**
_Can't make it to the Zoom, but still want to support Lucas? Chip in using the links below. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[Chip in $5 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28557?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=9&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv) [Chip in $15 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28557?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=10&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28558?refcode=em20230310-2855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=2855%2E614464%2EEe7upv)

Thank you so much — and I hope to see you on March 16!
Andy Cohen

clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Andy Cohen! I’m reaching out so I can invite you to have some fun with me and Lucas Kunce on Zoom on March 16 — but let me explain more. You might know me for hosting ‘Watch What Happens Live!’ on Bravo for nearly 14 years, but something you might not know is that I was born and raised in St. Louis, Missouri. I love my home state, but I sure as hell don’t love some of the hypocrites who’ve taken power there — and Josh Hawley is the biggest creep of them all. He’s obsessed with controlling every detail of our lives, whether it be in the workplace, the doctor’s office, or even the bedroom. And on January 6, 2021, he showed us just how much of a fraud and coward he really is. Missourians deserve a Senator who’s proven they’ll fight for them — not a phony who runs away when things get tough. That’s why I’m proud to support Lucas Kunce’s campaign to replace Josh Hawley in this U.S. Senate. He’s a 13-year Marine veteran who knows what it takes to stand up and be a warrior for everyday Missourians. On March 16 at 6:30PM CT/7:30PM ET, I’ll be joining Lucas for a virtual grassroots event. We’re gonna get into exactly how we’ll take Josh Hawley down — Can't make it to the Zoom, but still want to support Lucas? Chip in using the links below. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This is going to be a real fight to beat Hawley in 2024. While Josh has shown us he’s more a runner than he is a fighter, he’s going to have the whole corporate and GOP mega-donor establishment backing him up. And they’ve even been attacking Lucas already since the day he launched his campaign. But as a Missourian, trust me — if anyone can beat Josh Hawley, it’s Lucas Kunce, and it’s this election cycle. Here’s what Josh himself said just a few weeks ago: “My race is going to be one of the closest in America.” Since Josh got to the Senate, he’s made a fool of himself. He’s obsessed with convincing the rest of us that he’s a “real man”. So much so, this is the REAL title of a book he’s ACTUALLY writing — Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs. Now it’s been years since his approval numbers have been above 50%, and even his mentor, former GOP Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.” The buyer’s remorse about Josh is real. But then we’ve got Lucas Kunce — a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marine Corps to honor the community that took care of his family when they were bankrupt by medical bills. Lucas did multiple overseas deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, worked at the Pentagon to keep dangerous weapons out of the hands of terrorists, and helped lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia. After active duty, he became an advocate against corporate corruption and the pointless wars that cowards like Josh Hawley always want to start. Now Lucas is running for U.S. Senate to take power back for everyday Missourians — to rebuild our state, raise wages, and put people back in charge of their own bodies. His record-breaking campaign already has Josh feeling the heat. And if you ask me, living a life of service like Lucas has is a bit more convincing than writing a book titled “Manhood.” When you chip in to help Lucas’ campaign, your support goes toward putting that message in front of Missouri voters and holding Josh Hawley accountable. Can't make it to the Zoom, but still want to support Lucas? Chip in using the links below. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you so much — and I hope to see you on March 16! Andy Cohen Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
