subject: VICTORY: Kristi Noem Vetoes CBDC Bill After Pressure From South Dakota Freedom Caucus
body:
This is the second state CBDC bill a Freedom Caucus has stopped | | | |
---
| | | **Friends,**

We just had a major victory in South Dakota that has broad nationwide implications.

Governor Kristi Noem announced, after pressure from the South Dakota Freedom Caucus, that she would VETO a bill that would create a framework in the state for a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC).

The push for CBDCs is the biggest attack on financial freedom that our country has ever seen. Imagine being forced to have a bank account directly with the Federal Reserve rather than a commercial bank like Wells Fargo or Bank of America. The government would see all of your transactions and even block those it disagrees with. Trying to buy a gun to protect yourself? Not if the government sees you as a threat. Want to have an abortion? The government will be all for it.

Yet, the bill sailed through the RINO-polluted GOP majorities in the South Dakota House and Senate despite fierce opposition from the SD Freedom Caucus. Rather than move onto another issue, the SDFC went into overdrive to convince Governor Kristi Noem to veto the bill. Glenn Beck amplified the issue by having a SD Freedom Caucus member on his show and we alerted outside groups that put the pressure on to urge a veto.

Thankfully, Noem came through.

But this is nowhere close to being near the end. Supporters of the legislation are proposing it in all 50 states.

Thankfully, just this week, the Arizona Freedom Caucus blocked the CBDC bill because the State Freedom Caucus Network alerted them about what happened in South Dakota and efforts are underway to kill this bill in all 50 states.

All across the country, “Republican” leaders have shown that they are more than happy to sign away your financial freedom but state freedom caucuses stand ready to defend your rights.
---
|
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=69f33a70c6&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

name: Ben Wikler
subject: Judge Janet needs our help! (re: TV ads)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Democracy won in February, but with the stakes so high, we can’t let Dan Kelly’s billionaire money sway this election in April.
#
Friend, it’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin.
My team just got devastating news: **We found out MAGA-backed groups are officially outspending us on TV ads before the Wisconsin Supreme Court election in a few weeks.**
With so much at stake in less than four short weeks, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help my team at WisDems fight back with a donation of any amount. [**Can you split a $5 donation between The Long Run and the WisDems right now to help us elect progressives like Janet Protasiewicz up and down the ballot all across Wisconsin?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230310-1-t45&t=1&akid=4247%2E196590%2EyWUSEH)

Ben Wikler

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Grassroots since Day 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our movement will always remain grassroots and people-powered.
#
Peter,
I am proud to say that when I first ran for Congress in 2016, I was **one of just _four_ members of Congress who refused corporate PAC money. I've still never accepted a dime.**
This is the way it should be, Peter. **Corporate and special interests should not be able to buy our elected leaders, write policy, or influence the outcome of elections.** I know a better way forward is possible. It's important to me that our work is and will continue to be powered by this generous network of grassroots supporters — folks like you.
With your support, our people-powered movement has been able to deliver for working people and families across the country. Along with our Progressive Caucus, I will continue to fight to pass transformative solutions to the most pressing issues we face. But I can't do this alone.
[**Which is why I'm asking: Peter, can you dig deep and chip in any amount today to keep our movement fighting for working people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40313?refcode=em20230310-2258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2258%2E420207%2Ef5eZ0w)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40313?refcode=em20230310-2258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2258%2E420207%2Ef5eZ0w)**
As our progressive coalition continues to deliver for our communities, I will fight tooth and nail to make sure the far-right GOP majority does not reverse any of the hard-fought progress that we've made.
I know that there will be several challenges ahead of us. But no matter what, I will continue to work tirelessly for our communities because we cannot afford to remain on the sidelines — **_change can't wait.**_
[**Will you stand with me today and our grassroots movement to advance our progressive agenda forward?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40313?refcode=em20230310-2258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2258%2E420207%2Ef5eZ0w)
**[Chip In $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40313?refcode=em20230310-2258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2258%2E420207%2Ef5eZ0w)**
**We're in this together,** and I am beyond grateful to have your support.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230310-2258-footer&t=23&refcode2=2258_420207_f5eZ0w&akid=2258%2E420207%2Ef5eZ0w)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Fight for Progress
subject: Do you support student loan forgiveness?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:

body:
Our voters deserve to have their voices heard.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59986440/395705439/823540626?refcode=ea.1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDcyY2ZkMC03YmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eIvAzLdJyhWnns_IasbQ1vclwBFEZIICik33JEAn5w=&emci=a86a7060-bebe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — There’s nothing more fundamental to our democracy than the idea that every one of us should have a fair, equal say in our representation. **But when partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression come into play, some votes count more than others.** North Carolina has seen the consequences of unfair legislative maps before — and courts have previously struck down extreme NC maps as a violation of our state Constitution. By allowing the legislators who draw maps to effectively choose their own voters, _partisan gerrymandering strips the voters of their voice._ Just yesterday, the North Carolina Supreme Court DENIED an amicus brief from Gov. Cooper and Attorney General Josh Stein in the redistricting case. **This is shocking even for them that they didn’t even want to hear what the two highest ranking Democrats had to say about their unprecedented rehearing of an already decided case.** With each passing day, this partisan Supreme Court shows that it cares only about the views of Republican legislators. That comes at the cost of voting rights, school funding, and—ultimately—our democracy. **Peter, Justices have no business doing the bidding of a political party, and North Carolinians deserve fair maps that give them a fair say.** **[The Court should take a strong stand for democracy and judicial independence by BLOCKING any partisan gerrymandering efforts. Sign on to say you agree>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59986442/395705441/-636323928?refcode=ea.1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDcyY2ZkMC03YmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eIvAzLdJyhWnns_IasbQ1vclwBFEZIICik33JEAn5w=&emci=a86a7060-bebe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59986444/395705443/-636323928?refcode=ea.1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDcyY2ZkMC03YmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eIvAzLdJyhWnns_IasbQ1vclwBFEZIICik33JEAn5w=&emci=a86a7060-bebe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1d72cfd0-7bbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

subject: We must increase Border Security
body:
For the sake of our families and communities | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=46545f32b0&e=4955722b3e)

| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=f4d41b3de8&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Dear Peter,

Fentanyl overdoses have become all too familiar in America... We must take a proactive approach and bolster our national security by increasing resources allocated to the southern border. As one of 4 freshman members who was invited to the border by Speaker McCarthy, I know first hand of the failures that are allowing drugs to pour into our country.
We must ensure that our immigration laws are respected and upheld.
Every community is a border community now due to the increase in drug trafficking as a result of the Democrats open border policies. **As your Congresswoman, I will continue to fight for a strong and secure southern border and stand up to failures of the Biden Administration that have gotten us to this point.**
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59986448/395705478/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2FmMmY5ZmUtN2JiZi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jvVLjF6X2DgIfCxyT7uP2Nq9bPoRXQiZq-VjtXzG74Q=)

I'm about to ask you to donate $25, Peter. **But first, please let me explain why your $25 today will make such a big difference in the fight to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.** **Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream."** And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too. We simply can't let that happen — not when everything from Social Security to reproductive freedom to the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. **That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of our critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $25 donation at a time. Falling short would send a clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs, so I'm counting on your urgent help, Peter.** [_**Please, will you chip in $25 — split between HER Time and my campaign – we can reach our critical mid-month goal, defeat the GOP here in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats? Every dollar truly does make a difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59986449/395705479/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2FmMmY5ZmUtN2JiZi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jvVLjF6X2DgIfCxyT7uP2Nq9bPoRXQiZq-VjtXzG74Q=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59986450/395705480/-2030493197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2FmMmY5ZmUtN2JiZi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jvVLjF6X2DgIfCxyT7uP2Nq9bPoRXQiZq-VjtXzG74Q=)

clean_body: | = I'm about to ask you to donate $25, Peter. But first, please let me explain why your $25 today will make such a big difference in the fight to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too. We simply can't let that happen — not when everything from Social Security to reproductive freedom to the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of our critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $25 donation at a time. Falling short would send a clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs, so I'm counting on your urgent help, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much for your support, Kirsten HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: Some of our greatest accomplishments:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | EMILYs List + the Senate [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59986693/395706092/118143280?sourceid=1048751&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjlmOGMwYi03Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2TkA9-EpUPHrqeUmR9yoTga8tX4zC7sYSqN8tvvp4I=&emci=fdbac62e-76bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e29f8c0b-7cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

In 1985, 25 women gathered in my basement, rolodexes in hand.

We had gathered to send letters to our friends, hoping to spread the word about our brand-new enterprise: a network to raise money for Democratic pro-choice women running for office. **And that's how EMILYs List was born.**

The very next year, in 1986, Sen.**Barbara Mikulski (MD)** — one of our first two endorsed candidates — became the first Democratic woman elected to the Senate in her own right. **[EMILYs List has been involved in tough Senate races since the day we started — and we're not slowing down. Our Save the Senate Fund, which is designed to set Senate women up for success all cycle long, ends tonight at midnight. Will you make a donation now to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women to the Senate in 2024 — and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59986714/395706116/118143280?sourceid=1048751&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjlmOGMwYi03Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2TkA9-EpUPHrqeUmR9yoTga8tX4zC7sYSqN8tvvp4I=&emci=fdbac62e-76bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e29f8c0b-7cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Since Sen. Mikulski's election, we've helped make history in the Senate time and time again — with the support of this incredible community, which has grown from 25 friends in a basement to more than five million grassroots supporters all across the country.

In _1992_ , which became known as the Year of the Woman, EMILYs List helped elect **four** new women senators, quadrupling the number of women in the Senate (all of whom, at that time, were Democrats). EMILYs membership grew more than 600% that year, with more than 23,000 members contributing over $10.2 million.

In _1993_ , Sen. **Carol Moseley Braun (IL)** became the first African American woman elected to the U.S. Senate _and_ the first woman to represent Illinois in the Senate. And here's a fact I love: that year, Sens. Moseley Braun and Mikulski broke the archaic prohibition on women wearing pants on the Senate floor.

In _2006_ , the victories of Sens. **Amy Klobuchar (MN)** and **Claire McCaskill (MO)** helped lead to the famous Democratic takeover of the Senate, thanks to dedicated supporters who helped us raise an incredible $46 million that year alone.

In _2012_ , we raised a record-breaking $51.2 million dollars, which helped elect nine women to the Senate — including Sen. **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** , who became the first openly LGBTQ+ senator in U.S. history.

In _2018_ , the first midterm race following Donald Trump's election, our candidates won the only two red-to-blue Senate flips of the cycle (this was also the year we took back the House and made Rep. **Nancy Pelosi** speaker once again!). These victories laid a critical foundation that allowed Democrats to take back the Senate in 2020 and hold it in 2022.

I'm proud to have founded and led such a groundbreaking organization. But I'm even prouder to have earned the trust and support of people like you, who have made our work and our victories possible for the past 38 years. ********Now, we're kicking off a brand new election cycle, and we've got a chance to elect and reelect some amazing women to the Senate in 2024. Donate before midnight to be part of our Save the Senate fund, and help make even more history next November:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Lets-Save-The-Senate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59986716/395706118/118143280?sourceid=1048751&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjlmOGMwYi03Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2TkA9-EpUPHrqeUmR9yoTga8tX4zC7sYSqN8tvvp4I=&emci=fdbac62e-76bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e29f8c0b-7cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)******** Thank you, Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59986719/395706124/118143280?sourceid=1048751&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjlmOGMwYi03Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2TkA9-EpUPHrqeUmR9yoTga8tX4zC7sYSqN8tvvp4I=&emci=fdbac62e-76bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e29f8c0b-7cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59986720/395706126/210412955?sourceid=1048751&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjlmOGMwYi03Y2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2TkA9-EpUPHrqeUmR9yoTga8tX4zC7sYSqN8tvvp4I=&emci=fdbac62e-76bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e29f8c0b-7cbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** ********

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation's capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

This is not hyperbole. This is not fake news. This is an election integrity emergency!

_**[This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca1f481316c74e219556ef45dffab0fb&_e=bhvdkJY4uoXgNrJ23SCHhAcGcbgWKReR-WDS5IZXga7e2rNY_sysfjPtYOa_4YurrrUqGKZeDSJiG2ikk7HDYzuJRu_Q_-XhlYFcVY6T3Lt1BOByEF-OWAda4uGfDuTyo0PGPtYJ-tlw9oIfNLzz-f_aoHVpUc8t7MSfv07K9BXcrX65UnyRtFU8E0bkPOc9_HKp6QK2wzDDHCMkd_XaDj3rv411nccM-hmYO6Wz1iOKnxdipVCHEnp_4JktzFhY9mqjL7qt61DqLeNoGKzBSU4B6ApcjPEy1B4tdh2mhbqt2ehuzpuGCVjvesN6qo-tbczOXtPZ67GYoabQoVp3IqHUIvL7rlo_klnbEAULBOa4xiEUGR1w0vzzyAZcahXUODn_WocrohWLanMSGFJOWbqL-4WyWOcmc1wMFVz_vgA%3D "This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.")**_ So we launched an official poll to collect honest and unfiltered feedback from the American People. body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIobAydtam9eNCX7ZkfeKveeAYT78aBb1PqW_bIlnBC8RrighCJUIVHrt7Y5BcniZBX7yWXKvGb4WL0-pGbULIgochhwjbc_PR5_H9RjtFj2pzI82m_FyIkgR8M5UrumCn7kbJanvXK8v4W38-RwxbdaAzQ-s6rCO64P5knjhdG0ndXSwunNpsxxR9_2EmN4gzshwIV20aNmyMzZawRAc8-_dxnWgcnGHTGiO-kM4QRr2XxDfXsJD01NULZpr6wbiqC1LcaOxZ4QkXcL5M1nWZhJdkQfeEeBx0Ox6uwXm87Im2PsSqkXr79ErBtaAPDJzbQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **Here Comes The Sun ☀️**
---
| |
---
Most Americans will turn their clocks forward this Sunday for daylight savings time (DST). That is everyone aside from those lucky folks in most parts of Arizona and Hawaii. For the rest of us, adjusting our clocks twice a year can be a bit of an inconvenient shock to the system. But what if I told you it didn't have to be this way? What if I said this could be the last time we ever have to "spring forward," and we could make DST permanent? That could be the case if the House gets on board with [the Sunshine Protection Act](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIjQdFKxLWLrjKTrm7UkdpBEHiC04yNJmjOX_AGacgmlUx9Nq0D3DDbjCvbNKsVlqCZdMK2Quc1Ldafqe8gyvD4W8ztzHBng7ZIKv9erOnCP7WvS20AzOd00dJnHUh6P9stwh21-I5Y5plnJPumsMpaZatdP11H4xMXUAXvH6UIk8KpArcL_ktI651DYSVDCPLmEsr64Ki0LUczoukfNCDVRvlPOqpNm_LOjT_dGktjpP), a piece of legislation I happen to be a [proud](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIvNu4yOefsIHZeye5DkWHXtNFs2RIqetfXbeJHYpg8uG0ldswG-2TqRv6Ow8mr-zeZpUYDC8WFchuei2TSm8d1Gumn--7uCEls57F-grji-ud6T85UOUJo83xiqM9Pmv0DNPGvZSdpFH5LXyWVSisz8kAkPhZX0FlKvR9xkQFcJqpBRj5Vd1sVZUiRNhgewx8uaNsMzH-KhdjA6wPccQBPJEqexkLKpMTmL1LhaYFXd1) sponsor of. This bill would [eliminate](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIjQdFKxLWLrjKTrm7UkdpBFnmI7HhTCqeDK4_ckMO0rLtqsN_1_VNkY4KfnPmVj8AjQKfDcaRMMRVpwefGg6rUIO6e3KGrYzL6lPPV91mmoIwBfXqXE3T2H9cUf89zvBjOo7LG4lbKTB_jgT06N5n-Y5HVyEULLdLsGPTCSm1OHV4JbAP3gBzNQkJtJ1pg8bKIDAiOQ5egFNPPz2V7eWqdDIKph6s5g_RR9xAdEkZsBVPkZZckmj7ZqHTvZNwejZ1Q%3D%3D) the changing of clocks, and if adopted by all states, the U.S. wouldn't 'fall back' in November, giving us a full year of DST rather than the usual eight months. The Sunshine Protection Act was already passed by a [unanimous](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIhu39A61lMjf-zOZu4PBYF8iXEbJ13-NnbWMBj4M2nTKxVNppdW1dXOZx0bbteWa-6eehIhp2vkpe_kXrSupsCf9qOm0YHSxZk0vM_lTf-iRojDO9p829ZHK_FR6K5EiM-_fRtwzgVR_Oo0mMZqUPWnB3xyNf6mEDU6S5T3yoWCYxoCLRD2ozKalmJ1zxjRaN41XqDF15tS1ZWXC_3BF4YLAj-gkPvLSrya2X4hEOdVUhOfWLkvU9tV7lfl05odM2eiwvZfIc8ukl2imUeniUY-pIiOj5waM6Xv6em_02aQn) vote in the Senate last year, and I am hopeful the recent [reintroduction](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIoHQfBs6Ga1ohnSZF8xw7GEElo5LFHEu9dfExb6eN6BFpqU-5J1B8_hrDe_lSStq66Y4D38sXu4A2FDcixTagOB17-rkV6S9XRxSwZNyBqWj8vn9n_isyjv07BkF2UfcI0Hvikd-IA5Ga17qnPFWViOegY72rNEHFaqEQuMD408PtBL1PMqOZ_HFI6L38zNRo7b45gRJ9XB0_rBXR9YDu5Sj0qa6yDCJZj3OhDCq9R_V7ZDu4VCOuCTnoHb8nPj-zI4UCdfYokav_UUc1kMus-hlKWpifPGdTSZh8ehOx01tnNV7fpH61oETceM4yNlMHA%3D%3D) of the bill can be championed to the finish line this time around. To sunny days ahead!
---
| | |
---
| | **A Fighting Chance 💪**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIhk92VmbYBvN0n-ltaf1L_hgklr8cdqxN5SwtingX-EVXIP08InVUGz841JI2N8QaLTzWV3jSbvAn5dJZdt2_3mgMwT71cA6wvOUYm7vwvvC26bLVou3HhfZlwm1-S7ZS4_hcQz1y_1ZY7dgipihalY9KSd9fl_rRJD-IshdphaXKcoLwnBgY0SS5mz7BfFKE66SVzT-oCKhH3HK4EliTX4XZHcs_nk5igUnknsm0AZ2FMN7f6VrxfHRjPnB12kCwxnzCDHx4XrMbKgDnSM7GejBIIa4BJcozXX-8uOV0MV6Wuuy8X3xFYc7TnLUxI3xIw79UxJ1eS2pe5vckit5IxOVbumuox_B6-Sbr9eOa5tz2M5ONNsc0JWP_nGDJ0Dy4PafnAIrJC6cQIOubfchAopcKDSa7rwajOxyVLQC4jn7)
---
A 5-year-old Knoxville boy is fighting for his life—and the East Tennessee community is [rallying around him](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=15732a8ca2424eb0b37b393a584a5cb6&_e=-AzbIHxPsbhS2nZt9ttxIhk92VmbYBvN0n-ltaf1L_hgklr8cdqxN5SwtingX-EVXIP08InVUGz841JI2N8QaLTzWV3jSbvAn5dJZdt2_3mgMwT71cA6wvOUYm7vwvvC26bLVou3HhfZlwm1-S7ZS4_hcQz1y_1ZY7dgipihalY9KSd9fl_rRJD-IshdphaXKcoLwnBgY0SS5mz7BfFKE66SVzT-oCKhH3HK4EliTX4XZHcs_nk5igUnknsm0AZ2FMN7f6VrxfHRjPnB12kCwxnzCDHx4XrMbKgDnSM7GegQW8312YH3IuHYQ9lsX5WmTCeJVtab12EzCwzM2K5qX0bF2ilsRxMWGBxoXwgbSlzpGcD2h5FNpTkhjP5PaXBPSk23RXFyRheyHRXmqHhJaSu6m9xrwiawnsP-NBIKCBbKztrf2EYiL403_PVEZTC3) every step of the way. Penn Hazuda was diagnosed with a form of leukemia, which requires long stretches of time in the hospital for treatment. He spends most of the day watching Super Mario Brothers, daydreaming of visiting Mario World himself one day. In true Tennessee fashion, the community has come together to raise money to turn Penn’s dream into a reality. With nearly $2,000 raised so far, the Hazuda family is getting closer and closer to taking Penn to Universal Studios for an unforgettable trip!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | Here Comes The Sun ☀️ | | Most Americans will turn their clocks forward this Sunday for daylight savings time (DST). That is everyone aside from those lucky folks in most parts of Arizona and Hawaii. For the rest of us, adjusting our clocks twice a year can be a bit of an inconvenient shock to the system. But what if I told you it didn't have to be this way? What if I said this could be the last time we ever have to "spring forward," and we could make DST permanent? That could be the case if the House gets on board with , a piece of legislation I happen to be a sponsor of. This bill would the changing of clocks, and if adopted by all states, the U.S. wouldn't 'fall back' in November, giving us a full year of DST rather than the usual eight months. The Sunshine Protection Act was already passed by a vote in the Senate last year, and I am hopeful the recent of the bill can be championed to the finish line this time around. To sunny days ahead! | | | | | A Fighting Chance 💪 | | A 5-year-old Knoxville boy is fighting for his life—and the East Tennessee community is every step of the way. Penn Hazuda was diagnosed with a form of leukemia, which requires long stretches of time in the hospital for treatment. He spends most of the day watching Super Mario Brothers, daydreaming of visiting Mario World himself one day. In true Tennessee fashion, the community has come together to raise money to turn Penn’s dream into a reality. | Earlier this month, we announced our official panels for the 2023 Republican Action Conference! Come and join us this May, learn something new, and help Republicans secure victories in 2023 and 2024!
** Campaigning 101: Build a Winning Campaign ** ** Grassroots Activism: Organizing For Victory ** ** Citizen Lobbying: Influencing Olympia Effectively ** ** Ballot Collection: Get The Republican Votes ** ** Campaign Fundraising 101 ** ** Digital Media: Build Your Brand **
We will also be hosting a lunch and banquet on Saturday - _**with excellent speakers who will be announced soon**_! Join us early on Friday night at our Welcome Reception for more fun and socializing with fellow Republicans!

**When:** May 5th and 6th
**Where:**
Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center
1101 N Columbia Center Blvd B
Kennewick, WA 99336
**What:** Trainings, social events, networking, and great speakers!

[Our Saturday night banquet has limited capacity, so register EARLY to ensure you can attend!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7cd328aa6f&e=6a281f566d)

|

## Olympia Watch
---
| This Wednesday was one of this session's major deadlines. 5PM on Wednesday was the cutoff for legislative proposals to pass their house of origin. Any bills that did not pass out of their house of origin are considered dead for this session.

Republicans saw some major successes leading up to this cutoff time - including keeping the Senate version of Police Pursuit alive for continued debate throughout this years' session and killing HB 1333, the Attorney General's plan to institute a domestic extremism panel to stifle Washingtonian's first amendment rights.

Other major success include:
* **HB 1025** is considered dead. This bill would have removed qualified immunity from police officers and been detrimental to public safety.
* **HB 1670** is considered dead. This bill was never pulled out of rules for a vote on the floor. It would have allowed for local governments to increase property taxes up to 3 times more than voters approved through citizen initiative.
* **HB 1832** is considered dead. This bill would have started a Pay Per Mile pilot program and paved the way for full adoption by 2030.
* **SB 5209** is considered dead. This bill would have made voting mandatory.

However, Democrats were still able to push through a number of bad bills. These include:
* **HB 1143** \- Establishes significant new requirements to legally purchase or transfer a firearm.
* [Send an OPPOSE message to your representative here.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7aa5475907&e=6a281f566d)
* **SB 5078** \- Would hold weapons manufacturers liable for the actions of criminals.
* [Send an OPPOSE message to your representative here.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d427a807a5&e=6a281f566d)
* **SB 5054** \- Cuts school learning time by 4 hours PER WEEK.
* [Send an OPPOSE message to your representative here. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6e82d6d702&e=6a281f566d)
* **SB 5599** \- Radical anti-parent bill that allows children to transition without parental notifcation or consent.
* [Send an OPPOSE message to your representative here.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8cecbcde6e&e=6a281f566d)
* **SB 5082** \- Removed Citizen approved advisory votes from the ballot.
* [Send an OPPOSE message to your representative here.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f648d8cabe&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Visit Olympia Watch for an updated list of good and bad 'alive' bills](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e83ddb1c15&e=6a281f566d "Visit Olympia Watch for an updated list of good and bad 'alive' bills")
---
|

## Candidate Schools
---
| The WSRP is teaming up with several organizations to host candidate trainings to help us set the stage for wins in 2023 and 2024!

Candidates - **[join us](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3e5730bb68&e=6a281f566d)** , the BIAW, and other partner organizations at upcoming candidate trainings in April and May of this year. These schools will cover the following topics:
* Voter Contact and Identification
* Voter databases
* Fundraising Techniques
* Budget Allocation
* Campaign Planning
* Importance of effective messaging
* Role of media in a campaign
* Responding to attacks from opponents
* Time management and discipline
* Creating a campaign calendar to achieve set goals

**[Register now for one of our upcoming candidate schools!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b29f8e8db8&e=6a281f566d)**

clean_body: WSRP Monthly Update | | | | | | | | | Earlier this month, we announced our official panels for the 2023 Republican Action Conference! Come and join us this May, learn something new, and help Republicans secure victories in 2023 and 2024! Campaigning 101: Build a Winning Campaign Grassroots Activism: Organizing For Victory Citizen Lobbying: Influencing Olympia Effectively Ballot Collection: Get The Republican Votes Campaign Fundraising 101 Digital Media: Build Your Brand We will also be hosting a lunch and banquet on Saturday - with excellent speakers who will be announced soon! Join us early on Friday night at our Welcome Reception for more fun and socializing with fellow Republicans! When: May 5th and 6th Where: Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center 1101 N Columbia Center Blvd B Kennewick, WA 99336 What: Trainings, social events, networking, and great speakers! | "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!" | | Olympia Watch | This Wednesday was one of this session's major deadlines. 5PM on Wednesday was the cutoff for legislative proposals to pass their house of origin. Any bills that did not pass out of their house of origin are considered dead for this session. Republicans saw some major successes leading up to this cutoff time - including keeping the Senate version of Police Pursuit alive for continued debate throughout this years' session and killing HB 1333, the Attorney General's plan to institute a domestic extremism panel to stifle Washingtonian's first amendment rights. Other major success include: HB 1025 is considered dead. This bill would have removed qualified immunity from police officers and been detrimental to public safety. HB 1670 is considered dead. This bill was never pulled out of rules for a vote on the floor. It would have allowed for local governments to increase property taxes up to 3 times more than voters approved through citizen initiative. HB 1832 is considered dead. This bill would have started a Pay Per Mile pilot program and paved the way for full adoption by 2030. SB 5209 is considered dead. This bill would have made voting mandatory. However, Democrats were still able to push through a number of bad bills. These include: HB 1143 \- Establishes significant new requirements to legally purchase or transfer a firearm. SB 5078 \- Would hold weapons manufacturers liable for the actions of criminals. SB 5054 \- Cuts school learning time by 4 hours PER WEEK. SB 5599 \- Radical anti-parent bill that allows children to transition without parental notifcation or consent. SB 5082 \- Removed Citizen approved advisory votes from the ballot. | "Visit Olympia Watch for an updated list of good and bad 'alive' bills" | | Candidate Schools | The WSRP is teaming up with several organizations to host candidate trainings to help us set the stage for wins in 2023 and 2024! Candidates - , the BIAW, and other partner organizations at upcoming candidate trainings in April and May of this year. These schools will cover the following topics: Voter Contact and Identification Voter databases Fundraising Techniques Budget Allocation Campaign Planning Importance of effective messaging Role of media in a campaign Responding to attacks from opponents Time management and discipline Creating a campaign calendar to achieve set goals | "Register for upcoming Candidate School" | | Grassroots Leadership Trainings | Get involved - join our Political Director at one of his upcoming volunteer trainings, through the clicking the images below, or contact Matthew Frohlich at mailto:matthew@wsrp.org for more information! | | | | | Grassroots Club | Want to support our work year round? Your monthly contribution gives us the confidence to scale up our programs to elect Republicans across our state. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I'm honored to co-chair the Military Mental Health Task Force
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Nobody who has risked their life in service to our nation should have to face otherwise treatable life-or-death mental health crises after returning home.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59988463/395713672/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlkNTNjMzktODBiZi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oaVtiLFoyLzF2-pXYUfrRFIx84dF0rEHIiuZ1oF4vDw=&emci=b5700f38-90be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d9d53c39-80bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

If you've served this country, we should have your back. But, for too long, service members and veterans have struggled with mental health challenges in silence.

Nobody who has risked their life in service to our nation should have to face otherwise treatable life-or-death mental health crises after returning home. **That's why I am honored to announce that I will be co-chairing a bipartisan Military Mental Health Task Force along with Representative Guy Reschenthaler.**

Together, we will seek to address issues pertaining to mental health and suicide prevention among current and former service members. All veterans should receive the benefits they've earned, and that includes access to a full range of life-saving mental health services.

**[We should never take for granted the bravery and selflessness of our men and women in uniform. Please join me in recommitting to the work to support our veterans and service members by adding your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59988465/395713673/-1181171239?ms=em23_230310_milita_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230310_milita_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230310_milita_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230310_milita_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=5dy91YgIGmylQu8T8jrkiv+IPqkpu8DYAsExBAMM3u7pehYNjoyyE2/MoPwWhdDW8M6mjtQYNKErUORLqgvmPYaZ8HX3S7zATu0t/bpUc4n6UwxJE5aJ9o220zNjcSBArd4DxS8fBZzTGEu6clClgKWZcifIuQRH5lh9a3G0ZLs=&refcode2=d9d53c39-80bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlkNTNjMzktODBiZi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oaVtiLFoyLzF2-pXYUfrRFIx84dF0rEHIiuZ1oF4vDw=&emci=b5700f38-90be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d9d53c39-80bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**

I've proudly supported several pieces of legislation to support our nation's veterans. From bipartisan bills to make the VA more accessible to legislation to help end the veteran mental health crisis and initiatives focused on ensuring every veteran has a job. **Now, I’m honored to continue the work on the Military Mental Health Task Force.**

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59988468/395713674/-1919651591?refcode=em23_230310_milita_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230310_milita_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d9d53c39-80bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlkNTNjMzktODBiZi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oaVtiLFoyLzF2-pXYUfrRFIx84dF0rEHIiuZ1oF4vDw=)

clean_body: Nobody who has risked their life in service to our nation should have to face otherwise treatable life-or-death mental health crises after returning home. Peter, If you've served this country, we should have your back. But, for too long, service members and veterans have struggled with mental health challenges in silence. Nobody who has risked their life in service to our nation should have to face otherwise treatable life-or-death mental health crises after returning home. That's why I am honored to announce that I will be co-chairing a bipartisan Military Mental Health Task Force along with Representative Guy Reschenthaler. Together, we will seek to address issues pertaining to mental health and suicide prevention among current and former service members. All veterans should receive the benefits they've earned, and that includes access to a full range of life-saving mental health services. I've proudly supported several pieces of legislation to support our nation's veterans. From bipartisan bills to make the VA more accessible to legislation to help end the veteran mental health crisis and initiatives focused on ensuring every veteran has a job. Now, I’m honored to continue the work on the Military Mental Health Task Force. It's an honor to serve you, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: They're going to try to pass it: Gutting the National Environmental Policy Act. Massive expansion of oil drilling. Keystone XL. We need your help:
body:
__Triple your impact. Save clean energy. |
---

|
Peter -- days ago, oil and gas lobbyists came to Capitol Hill with a wish list: **A massive expansion of fossil fuel production. A steep discount on drilling leases. Severe limits on the public 's right to review environmentally devastating projects.******

House Republicans have already rolled out a bill that would give polluters exactly that -- and hearings on the proposal are underway _now_. _****_

If we don't stop them, the damage to the environment will be irreversible. ____

We can't let this pass without a fight, Peter. That means flooding House and Senate offices with calls, letters, and emails. It means meeting with congressional staff and members of Congress who are being _bombarded_ with misinformation from corporate polluters.

We need your help -- our campaigns are only possible because of grassroots supporters like you. And for a limited time, your support will go three times as far.**** ****

[Please, make a gift right now. For a limited time, your support will make THREE TIMES the impact for our climate and clean energy, thanks to a group of committed environmental donors who are matching all gifts -- meaning a gift of just $5 becomes $15 when you give right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

We have to stop Republicans' dirty energy bill that reads like a laundry list of giveaways to the fossil fuel industry:
* **Gut environmental review.** Their bill would severely roll back the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA), the law that requires environmental impact studies for projects like pipelines, highways, and drilling on public lands -- and allows affected communities to give input on these projects.
* **Massively expand oil and gas drilling.** Republicans' plan would mandate quarterly oil and gas leasing, overriding the long-standing precedent that defers leasing decisions to the Secretary of Interior. From there, it would open up even more public lands and waters for drilling and mining... at a steep discount.
* **Greenlight dirty oil pipelines.** Their plan would encourage new fossil fuel production and infrastructure like natural gas pipelines, further exacerbating the climate crisis, perpetuating environmental injustices, and endangering communities by gutting the laws that are in place to safeguard communities and our resources.

|
---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT:
STOP THE GOP'S
DIRTY ENERGY BILL >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

Peter, we're counting on committed environmentalists like you to step up at this key moment. **If we don 't speak up to protect our climate now, we could lose that right forever.**

[Help us reach our $40,000 fundraising goal. Even $5 helps. Because this is so important, a group of donors has agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all gifts if you give today.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for fighting for a better future for our climate, our communities, and our planet. We'll be in touch soon with updates on our campaign.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
---
**[**DONATE**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

**[**MAKE IT MONTHLY**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to demand Democrats do more to end poverty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Let’s make sure that Democrats are truly the party of the working class. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvuEcaWzm99AmoFYQF5jE63XTOuZqgfoNaKDfm38j3M1wM2FUICDsBJwAf6WBgnxaUmTKklGEQKaHYGN9TYHLFkmP9ywEU-wVGP3o9JKDHTqCAmNZljQ2nEcD55dcpZm_JYDHTOvtJ6iBFPr4QW5oaVaab4ECIc_rFGMJ7cgDGm5ZLMmi2Y81agAUoo5OoZJWu/3ud/6upTbmNGQ3W2bw0Cqa-8jA/h0/MI2pwH_Gje3ZpOXaNaL1PBFbwsGORPXCGh4WAwKxgDQ)
---
Friend, We live in the wealthiest country in the world, yet 63% of U.S. residents live paycheck to paycheck. Many of our neighbors are struggling to put food on the table and are rationing their medication. Nearly half of us don’t have enough cash to cover a $400 emergency expense. That means a rent increase, medical bill, childcare payment, tuition check, or even a blown tire could push more of our neighbors into extreme financial distress or even homelessness. The status quo is unacceptable, and we can change it. Poverty is due to policy choices. I’m pushing for transformative legislation that our communities urgently need. But in order to pass these policies, we need much more Democratic support for bold solutions that meet the scale of our problems now. **So I’m joining Justice Democrats to push Democrats to truly be the party of the working class.** [**Please sign our petition if you agree: Democrats in Congress and the Biden administration must do more to end poverty and ensure that working class communities can thrive.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKuf2VSaO4LN24Ja9Yl-Yn3JK0cSIOl9VvVMNkgR7yQ0dBo4drapglkbp1bRFsJkIewyXbvBfhAV_m3eIPd9kCWdWfiQ5szaUkWt8oy1lcGzD3nt3h-HdFaXBwnizCZSo9BZmMzIMYYu7UP6zE_1zHNGomYLskgGNJ91H78IGtL7DSnOWt9tOLkzicUe_uHytEdHUhcO-4G0oaOi9vVQUgxCqMnaScpTr2J1dsJ98yRFI0e9eZHWAswWzusyM4lPTUh/3ud/6upTbmNGQ3W2bw0Cqa-8jA/h1/BbFfPqnVa6F0YYVap_y17FWf167phjEvZYwCHOl_RlA) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKuf2VSaO4LN24Ja9Yl-Yn3JK0cSIOl9VvVMNkgR7yQ0dBo4drapglkbp1bRFsJkIewWiDgMOaO62dsojjwMmiYw74gafmsfTdRsvVllf0iwEPihxj8jhHsBXihdLE7YmaE9hMR4gamfUF_jP-irYQ7YjjCpfu2oUrjIwN8N2LRbBJLpgi6DYxDsahflzwaa8VQc7dppLhEIBWRJsWi5Idx1ukHio8MYUCODkSOEYDuDLF6yd0aDF4nUa55KReTWVSY/3ud/6upTbmNGQ3W2bw0Cqa-8jA/h2/qtvE7SyWZau1YxAP9-J24e0qIYdpWp5QXDbkIQwHFA8)
---
In my home state of Michigan, 1 in 5 children live in poverty.
In 2021, Congress passed a temporarily expanded Child Tax Credit, providing between $250-$300 per month per child for families with young children. A critical lifeline for many families, the expanded Child Tax Credit cut child poverty by 40%. But corporate Democrats and Republicans let it expire.
So I introduced the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would replace the Child Tax Credit and cover every child in the United States, including the lowest-wealth families who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system—because, ironically, they earn too little.
The _End Child Poverty Act_ would cut child poverty by 70% by providing families with a universal benefit of nearly $400 per month per child, from children’s birth until their 19th birthday. Since each child would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, there would be no need for annual paperwork.
When the federal government gave people occasional one-time payments during the pandemic, it had a huge impact in people's lives, in my community and across the country. But one-time payments are not enough.
**To address our country’s economic crisis, we must urgently pass legislation that puts money directly back into people's pockets on a monthly basis.**
I’ve introduced multiple bills to do just that, including the _Building Our Opportunities to Survive and Thrive (BOOST) Act_. If passed, the bill would provide people with recurring, monthly cash payments of up to $250 per month for individuals (who earn under $50,000 in a year) and up to $500 per month for married couples (if they make under $100,000 in a year).
In addition to transformative anti-poverty policies like this, we need federal action to eliminate debt—from education debt to medical debt to utility debt and more.
We can pay for these changes by making the rich and corporations pay their fair share, by re-allocating money in the federal budget (i.e. from the Pentagon), and through my team’s innovative plan to #MintTheCoin.
But we’ll only pass these transformative policy changes through Congress if more Democrats push for the meaningful changes our communities desperately need. We need massive Democratic support for bold, meaningful bills that invest directly in our communities and meet the scale of our problems now. This is about living our values.
[**Please join me and Justice Democrats and sign our petition demanding Democrats do more to end poverty.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKuf2VSaO4LN24Ja9Yl-Yn3JK0cSIOl9VvVMNkgR7yQ0dBo4drapglkbp1bRFsJkIews8Bs_n1nfo_MAYB_vV8NowwuRkysjW8foKjQnIr6WnxrzMC9996ckaFeWoHfKltObjTLUGzRx0DmhKmgFqyd4YxNDrD8lpaHloZ3WdmzIg-1regeFz8K0wRgKMr0edsT8YwZ5-VlxMWeu5hr0V975HpXRvCD-fDKzOKSUYIviY0bY0Fvfxts7m5M8jXpEzl4/3ud/6upTbmNGQ3W2bw0Cqa-8jA/h3/2RjBuG6rv9QO_avG5qgIbGxVLC8JZhNDrShG-bnbi50)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKuf2VSaO4LN24Ja9Yl-Yn3JK0cSIOl9VvVMNkgR7yQ0dBo4drapglkbp1bRFsJkIewCGvp1Or1IyxZ5rIHM3-IsTAtclYsO9cvK424F9GM7ZHQIbq1cgbutTammvCqxQmVvkWHbEX8eycpOOHEIZ5dRV6ev7MiByTHAjK7YU5c7o9Zc8d5v2EUqf4XfqO02MNRmMZlHMupa_RUYFLCpclF7kpCx6Ywec1y3pADlwp_kC9--tRk34twTjvgZ9jyDO4s/3ud/6upTbmNGQ3W2bw0Cqa-8jA/h4/ZlyD_YePW_WahTu__OxuiFohJHnLC-CgIKc8w8ClVoY)
---
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Dan Kildee
subject: The big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hey,

I wanted to follow up on my team’s note from earlier. Now that we’re officially running in one of the most competitive races in the country once again, my team is looking to grow our resources right away.

We know National Republicans will again be targeting us heavily with misleading attack ads. Because it’s also a presidential election year and Michigan is home to a marquee Senate race, we know our state is once again going to be the main stage for American politics.

That’s why I’m asking you to chip in during the first 24 hours after this announcement to help my team prepare, so we can etch out another strong victory in mid-Michigan. Grassroots supporters like you helped us win in the midterms, can I count on you now?

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/frontline-2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59991560/395716096/-630420539?amount=20.24&contactdata=2K6IsjxzDoraQw6sqQUljbNU6KZYqXfkpztAl3T7hWFIzpd2mk41bjkH3QDm3qXe8L6L3bK3HgjRxkvUl+hS+xSqrXkWaWHRneut5ppXojiw17x4sfn/yS2mZkpP6qX9qxaa9Y+V9uly5Ats+tQdgg==&refcode2=c7c0e650-82bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230310_FR_2.2_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2MwZTY1MC04MmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ai1Dt7BdCq5T0aLAGeppaqluRO2bjFnZotIDhMdkOPo=)**

Thank you,

Dan

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | Hey, I wanted to follow up on my team’s note from earlier. Now that we’re officially running in one of the most competitive races in the country once again, my team is looking to grow our resources right away. We know National Republicans will again be targeting us heavily with misleading attack ads. Because it’s also a presidential election year and Michigan is home to a marquee Senate race, we know our state is once again going to be the main stage for American politics. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in during the first 24 hours after this announcement to help my team prepare, so we can etch out another strong victory in mid-Michigan. Grassroots supporters like you helped us win in the midterms, can I count on you now? = Thank you, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: Katie Porter
subject: My recipe for black bean soup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’ll send you my favorite recipes!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19140%2E3422442%2EewPkUt)
Derek,
As a single mom with three kids and a budget, I cook from scratch a lot. And while cooking meals is honestly not nearly as fun as whiteboarding witnesses, I do love seeing happy children when they come to the dinner table. I have a big bell, with a wooden ringer, that I clang to summon the kids downstairs. I know they heard it because I hear the thundering down the hallway.
**But when I’m in Washington, I cannot cook dinner, and my first year in Congress there was a lot of complaining—even about pizza!** My kids want their mom’s cooking, and they want it nearly every night, regardless of where the demands of my job require me to be.
**The solution is aggressive meal planning.** On the days I fly to D.C. for votes and hearings, I get up at 5:30 a.m. I quickly get ready for the plane and then prepare a dinner for the kids to enjoy that night. It’s always a slow cooker recipe or something that can sit in the fridge until the kids cook it. Favorites include pot roast, my grandma Doris’s meatballs, baked potato bar, chili, and a pepperoncini beef. **[(Contribute $5 or more by next Friday and I’ll send you some recipes!).](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230310-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF10_1_REC_20230310_V1_F&refcode2=19140_3422442_ewPkUt&akid=19140%2E3422442%2EewPkUt)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230310-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF10_1_REC_20230310_V1_F&refcode2=19140_3422442_ewPkUt&akid=19140%2E3422442%2EewPkUt)
Last week, it was black bean soup, and as you see from the meal plan, I have learned to be specific. **Just like with government witnesses, I sometimes have to spell out how to do the job, even if it seems obvious.** “Take out bay leaves” comes from a past experience, where my kids were calling me while I was in Washington because they thought a tree leaf somehow got in their soup. And “wash the crockpot”—you guessed it, I’ve come home to it supposedly still soaking, three days later.
I know there are millions of other busy Americans juggling many responsibilities. If you’d like to make some of my favorite recipes, **[contribute $5 or more before Friday, March 17th, and we’ll send you some of my original recipes.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230310-1?refcode=EMAF10_1_REC_20230310_V1_F&refcode2=19140_3422442_ewPkUt&akid=19140%2E3422442%2EewPkUt)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230310-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF10_1_REC_20230310_V1_F&refcode2=19140_3422442_ewPkUt&akid=19140%2E3422442%2EewPkUt)**
Happy meal-prepping!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF10_1_REC_20230310_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19140_3422442_ewPkUt&akid=19140%2E3422442%2EewPkUt)**

name: Working Families Party
subject: Biden considers reviving Trump-era immigration policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, **_The New York Times_ reported this week that the Biden administration is considering reinstating the policy of detaining asylum-seeking families in prison-like camps along the southern border1** — a Trump-era policy that President Biden had condemned as inhumane and ended when he first took office. This is alarming news — and it is part of a cascade of newly-proposed border restrictions that would prohibit thousands from applying for asylum in the U.S.2[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGqVg7_jfWQzu8HEuSXChe0HQ3u0ya2w4MdCXs-JgbSsFmvKEWJ74o3cz_k4BMT4GhPcdupsBMBWYRIncms7xAv9yyDPvPREmg8MGkwAgG705qcNdyXzXp22DYxl-UGRqgYkNe74S6CbKizGPBbMLJM797GZR6sFgkgd_NmJm4jTrroCmMk-vFKqGU7O_-0tX7q-6goBvqQYlUlB7mC0PXxXErcKcjJglbSMdufHqiQLqJp7fHUnRpaaArVkigghznowmz8-gRYansOuk1sQbWGrPdU2r5FY2mzwnN8OaLkP3CaxMLbICWfQ2YVgShfqfQ2ksPNKgepT14-nZMkfiQbP_uwaFuMBaA45InEWINIq_vIvHU1rx4Q6yvUeOOCnf69Ja30_nAvw3VEKEtALGPlaHhsoAkUQYMXI608sH3fL/3ud/KPze5xHxSTevTkvwyltxog/h0/Z0YiFsc94GfcK8kE8tb0ZaP7LpvGiyowtMUZ1RdHPs8) **We didn’t turn the page on the Trump administration just to return to the same cruel policies.[Will you join us in calling on President Biden to reject any plan to revive migrant family detention? Sign our petition: Welcome asylum-seekers, close the detention camps, and expand pathways to citizenship.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wqHjC4HKFfMWd6cNRRQKnRsczTg45vsE5yyFaYbZMTIyb5SRi3Cwly1AWeBKBXeu271Uo8JLPa9Oe4bNhKuV5WSv0TROii_IWrqCnDP3HQ7mFwIG3XE5YgRM0zJiug3748dD6bRcI83gyvV09ALPOJRVb1FRFc9YFQEygVCSY8cF4ce11RzqMAlvwQkqzfccQK6e-eFQJAFsvGro9eCOMUz5aJejGOLVxL4FDgXaG6Bn0AA3R9xQyDoiZAJz3San-xWU_ibm4t4n16nLF3i-mBGYqHe24iwQP1Y4qYws5iuJL_gqf3XKJ_PiunOqSIwIRwYaB30hF-SU_WWBrm9HXSlbFJnayhmlbAPB8idHdUUdIN4LIcYxXWD7iXx_IGvB-mxz2GZ10l9Qb2ovC8IEKGg/3ud/KPze5xHxSTevTkvwyltxog/h1/F3LroIOl6LaM_swaVfIFZApnLgFf9ZzdFaz8woSuaG0)** **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wqHjC4HKFfMWd6cNRRQKnRsczTg45vsE5yyFaYbZMTIyb5SRi3Cwly1AWeBKBXeu271Uo8JLPa9Oe4bNhKuV5WSv0TROii_IWrqCnDP3HQ7mFwIG3XE5YgRM0zJiug3748dD6bRcI83gyvV09ALPOJRVb1FRFc9YFQEygVCSY8cF4ce11RzqMAlvwQkqzfccQaPU0zAsHtX1URocIDGfohSVwuTtZXOMhCffBUyQ8NHF-CJJwc3U5lww2jkopDj2Dx1wEa8GOAVUp9emLkEnmyEy49wPWla9q_69JTcxhN1Z5F1f2gbip5nR34n3BpzlEuarpIoCjOsj5s9hLhLAoiOeOrXiNkXzkbRm7im6k-MtSKpcH1BOrHNQuWgh8kOzh0DQNo17_Q_dB2zfPmqRMDA/3ud/KPze5xHxSTevTkvwyltxog/h2/zgY6QaIy2A9_-0QBwZj4RDYrSB046Y_3dlnmB3izF6M)** In 2020, voters rejected Republicans’ anti-immigrant agenda and delivered the presidency to this administration on the promise of jobs and care for our communities and the reversal of Trump’s punitive border policies that ripped families apart, locked children in cages, turned away refugees, and sent asylum-seekers back into danger. And last year, when Republican candidates plowed money into vicious anti-immigrant ads to turn out voters in the midterm elections, they were roundly rejected, again. **We rejected family detention under the Trump administration — and we need to reject it under a Democratic administration too.** Resurrecting Trump-era policies and creating barriers to asylum would be an attack on the legal and human right of those fleeing violence and persecution to seek safety. It would put vulnerable people — doing what any of us would do if faced with similar circumstances — in harm’s way. And it would be a betrayal of Biden’s campaign promise to restore dignity and humanity to our immigration system. **Regardless of political party, this policy is cruel and degrading — asylum seekers need safety, not incarceration.[Sign on to our petition calling on President Biden to welcome asylum-seekers, close the detention camps, and expand pathways to citizenship.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wqHjC4HKFfMWd6cNRRQKnRsczTg45vsE5yyFaYbZMTIyb5SRi3Cwly1AWeBKBXeu271Uo8JLPa9Oe4bNhKuV5WSv0TROii_IWrqCnDP3HQ7mFwIG3XE5YgRM0zJiug3748dD6bRcI83gyvV09ALPOJRVb1FRFc9YFQEygVCSY8cF4ce11RzqMAlvwQkqzfccQUd5yOfFFoRJ36TTzjyXwzoZwbTjot78XGvWe8sTFdKf3bsvJxA0cAl3YJn-fXGXOvgDzNEgeruoRcjwT_JbOYKucpavXWtLvve4E4BWH5bZvB926rDxQZBDXKOHVzIC6i3GX__mjfw5MWjPv9wCwpq9mfmMn6Ke20v63RWtbCJD-PStYvqpbJEzKW8U8WxkBS6rk8G9nKiwFbE6TU71JrA/3ud/KPze5xHxSTevTkvwyltxog/h3/cCXElP679fgxUl4SbL4aKnrrCfvRky4cUXaEo6QkxQo)** **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wqHjC4HKFfMWd6cNRRQKnRsczTg45vsE5yyFaYbZMTIyb5SRi3Cwly1AWeBKBXeu271Uo8JLPa9Oe4bNhKuV5WSv0TROii_IWrqCnDP3HQ7mFwIG3XE5YgRM0zJiug3748dD6bRcI83gyvV09ALPOJRVb1FRFc9YFQEygVCSY8cF4ce11RzqMAlvwQkqzfccQMGHdwqBg3jq-3r_ico3tdikCAH8oz2yrFhBFKNXEBG84_5V_1FuIEdj5m19AN9C8RfMpuyeyQxh_CdXk51h2ncmkXBM5fYuw-h3lLePqJwcAYoONY77FUUP5iiAqMqY_rw_2uyQeKbgfb6FyDrMbKMulEj6cNGNEzchEu62fzy0wBmw4thaTjXhWRYKX_epiD76VYVcqec4w5DdoJ-9W2g/3ud/KPze5xHxSTevTkvwyltxog/h4/mMccZrEr5JEdTQSrXioKBSqcuJDWwg-5g46Kfd9jm8M)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source:

clean_body: | | | Peter, The New York Times reported this week that the Biden administration is considering reinstating the policy of detaining asylum-seeking families in prison-like camps along the southern border1 — a Trump-era policy that President Biden had condemned as inhumane and ended when he first took office. This is alarming news — and it is part of a cascade of newly-proposed border restrictions that would prohibit thousands from applying for asylum in the U.S.2 We didn’t turn the page on the Trump administration just to return to the same cruel policies. In 2020, voters rejected Republicans’ anti-immigrant agenda and delivered the presidency to this administration on the promise of jobs and care for our communities and the reversal of Trump’s punitive border policies that ripped families apart, locked children in cages, turned away refugees, and sent asylum-seekers back into danger. And last year, when Republican candidates plowed money into vicious anti-immigrant ads to turn out voters in the midterm elections, they were roundly rejected, again. We rejected family detention under the Trump administration — and we need to reject it under a Democratic administration too. Resurrecting Trump-era policies and creating barriers to asylum would be an attack on the legal and human right of those fleeing violence and persecution to seek safety. It would put vulnerable people — doing what any of us would do if faced with similar circumstances — in harm’s way. And it would be a betrayal of Biden’s campaign promise to restore dignity and humanity to our immigration system. Regardless of political party, this policy is cruel and degrading — asylum seekers need safety, not incarceration. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , New York Times, March 7, 2023. 2\. , Reuters , February 22, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. [**Please chip in any amount to help me reach my Mid-Month deadline.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=3b2481a461b34007a1a402e92019c557&_e=kT8Mb2Z_P_pT9a5x6X_3zlYppGdPfSY4sq8Y6-AQT4W2xIl00be1OSLSBOaSi3gMTBmR3g3pu3d-brwg3uS2-eTaX3PMEL1Ynb9wNofNgUdmdkFdsKrf3WTzYmB06FlM6T7r1nT57-nh8DC8XrpbofkuA3dm3-1ZfVDPLqP2UMpyB6DA8vLZ5HwNPIdq2TE0ybqMhIf7ruUT5a850ZOsXFB0SNl4tJO7EpJJpDkNU-YSjb-1Bqb5R2VcCrdRsVy1el810BCbUQXD-c_ZG3bJ4WAiyQEQW3w_X0qy8lRH_bBpp4z4dvpnS7Lr3mA7utcV5yRcK8-riSkTI7i-S58ZWvlTHMIDvywhWAenAQZa3u49silWihJmshfC-1-nc8ELJqK-ItKzEowSfzlCgngEngB-uL48zv1wXxsir7_9sjHa5jetCQuBfDGc0cjIkw6Z_nzOGZsy_hEXk1aIbKTEsf1u6AvyhBee-NUxyhMw71UUo60lfqgiVFBh2gbXhHw_)

clean_body: Support my campaign today | Friends, I am writing to ask for your help in reaching my Mid-Month fundraising deadline. As you know, I am running for U.S. Senate and need your support to ensure I have the resources to run a successful campaign. | Your donation will help me reach my goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the month. This money will be used to fund my campaign and ensure that I have the resources to get my message out, engage with voters, and make sure you know what I stand for. I believe in conservative values and am committed to representing the American people in the Senate. It is my TOP PRIORITY , and I will work day and night to ensure we get our country back on track. I understand that times are tough and that many people are struggling right now. But if you can donate, no matter how small the amount, it will make a huge difference in my campaign. I hope you will join me in this important effort and help me reach my Thank you in advance for your support, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| Stop Adam Political Action Committee was just incorporated by — wait for it — New York Republican and disgraced liar George Santos’ campaign treasurer, Thomas Datwyler.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1921%2E5257348%2EZ91tke)
Derek, there’s a new Super PAC registered with the FEC that raises _a lot_ of questions:
Stop Adam Political Action Committee was just incorporated by — wait for it — _New York Republican and disgraced liar George Santos’ campaign treasurer, Thomas Datwyler._
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230310_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1921%2E5257348%2EZ91tke)
As Santos faces mounting questions about $700,000 in shady campaign contributions, on top of the mountain of lies for which he’s already been exposed,**this new Super PAC run by his campaign treasurer is equipped to spend unlimited sums of money on stopping Adam from reaching the Senate.**
This could be an ominous sign of things to come, so please:

subject: Are you keeping up with the long list of Santos’ lies?

body:
here’s a quick run down:

| Peter, we wouldn’t blame you if you’ve lost track of what is true about George Santos after all the lies he’s told. **Here’s a run down of the facts:**

**FACT:** George Santos LIED about everything in his background, including where he went to school, his work history, his charity work, and even his religion.

**FACT:** Santos is a HUGE Trump supporter – he spread election denying conspiracies and even attended Trump’s January 6th rally!

**FACT:** There’s an FEC complaint against Santos alleging he used campaign money to pay for his personal expenses and tried to hide his donations to his own campaign. _George Santos is the human embodiment of corruption, Peter, and we can’t set the precedent that this is acceptable!_He must be removed from Congress NOW.__

**[We need 10,000 signatures immediately demanding that Santos is expelled from Congress! clean_body: here’s a quick run down: | Peter, we wouldn’t blame you if you’ve lost track of what is true about George Santos after all the lies he’s told. Here’s a run down of the facts: FACT: George Santos LIED about everything in his background, including where he went to school, his work history, his charity work, and even his religion. FACT: Santos is a HUGE Trump supporter – he spread election denying conspiracies and even attended Trump’s January 6th rally! FACT: There’s an FEC complaint against Santos alleging he used campaign money to pay for his personal expenses and tried to hide his donations to his own campaign. George Santos is the human embodiment of corruption, Peter, and we can’t set the precedent that this is acceptable!He must be removed from Congress NOW. | Thank you, UniteDemocrats | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. On February 21st, [State Senator Jennifer McClellan](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgQROiIq-nDYJPBPR74FnCezJN6WMGG28B8QO4NNTqcqQrV1gZsfrCz8nJsposuj0Oik4h1JgvygD4dppDLRVKFx3LS0OUE2AuZ75sCP5du43B8RQKQTFv772JGbTqnfRHNECtdCFG0WLRj1JD5Iy6JZ6wl-9xyWydIsMkpohsSl_b7qGkhG8bcB-hiLIFqs3AwhlL4iewh1fj9EAmrykz18CLStVM5tP7Jel467RcKctdTw2eW8z0xTqJvaIIv4SF2hPOEr1mK7dhblGW6k9AsyG5Di042tUoN3Q7uTa8GPtvrswdBS2avh8oS7U9YemAjPsp00w7jblqd8oS7ed8r1CWdjUgL2z-0t9iMrX5AmrpYd8Qp8n7LqBJ_4tgLbrHZziBv9d32lQC1uYI_8Aqn7F96FbxJiyibpvHotJ2aIq0eoBVzY6MkS6aCq_sVIgeL8UafRIywonBkeVVJ3FbwVE04W7V3oo7GNLv0166Cf7jlUxXelNdZRiG32waEGcRyteoL3Nxj-hr8LpSniuBI/3ud/0E_ky-rrR-ug1_I17NVHvw/h4/X0HRiO59OuEG9E8ogoRGJ1nPoHiPd3IERZtPhuxNSig) made history in Virginia by becoming the first Black woman to represent the commonwealth in Congress. Her proven track record of enacting progressive change, paired with her experience and passion, will make her a powerful voice in the U.S. House of Representatives.

**February Endorsements** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYcCEpog-amtHc8pXpyQCXs3GHd_JfghWR-ktRpm2QPtqFgM2vDY8fqSAEpOY991-wPor8D4E8iGxlA9QCgnirYR4SGLzFsiSYsIaf1kjx3aB4Z_b2_FTw0tVwtPb60I379kHwTyvrs77TCjgy-QqFmUJaqOWjjDLoF_iCzKjVlcxWZhJafiJja3sUc-7mv2A0TDpAp2dc5YmG5Tjq5Gb8I9rugs9Gvf-TSMxh9Z6w4jo7hb6j_b6p4i85YJq0s_pGT8Zyp9DRn1NdFTekSDE6vn9_kd4EFgkobDTlzxg3Q15qAJfxCfzwoACYuWQh231C6UnQSHjdnfmb6ccmmu5JBTCEQNkJzH1h8aotb5OTYWJHu3LrqY6xU1Txu5cyQrWo5A-Ghw2J7G82Y7xKgSCTgt/3ud/0E_ky-rrR-ug1_I17NVHvw/h5/hbtbqeiwRZC9WwPI4VDV9VVNnnz112Hq8lWKhp-a3OQ) During the month of February, The Collective PAC made its first endorsements in the 2023 and 2024 election cycle.

We announced our [first municipal endorsements](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgQROiIq-nDYJPBPR74FnCezJN6WMGG28B8QO4NNTqcqZlk7XUdigGejOdm6iEP4dhiYeQ1weknXtf5HDnyL_CoWSYExV4D_yQLMGAf_uVJCIifoGPgVub_Sn4otjevLVnCEtGSRut-0yBh8s9-RMsC3xTkFlwI50UpuNKBh4NSRh5afBe9YnA38DnfpcdIWSi219B_8VhFwP4g7PkoyBvfcMlOICxcoD0bBlO22maWz9Dnq8KqX6dtjIkNbmoGZ1nNo-SD4loObChbdnQxMAbHneozrWoccGeG6RlitO3E5_2KSko5wbf8rVBnq2cp3UpQdlK4GxBRDMvI-NZ9Kdt9XH_tKqBWE1z5bY81x0Yb21TQyy9DtdenoIvwA0xIlMN2H-FqDK_fBw8iORJ7YXoPcHnLF2wDB8x5eYD_xPwwWemVIQBSxk6_-_eGjZH88iw/3ud/0E_ky-rrR-ug1_I17NVHvw/h6/p1D54hH5C2r6DGGikiHQgOgYhuYgOXUZPpqqRzcE_pg) for 2023 with the following candidates: Kesha Hodge Washington running for Phoenix City Council in Arizona; Ce-Ce Gerlach running for re-election to the At-Large seat for Allentown City Council in Pennsylvania; and Dr. Jared Williams running for re-election to the Fort Worth City Council in Texas.

We also endorsed [Colonel Pamela Stevenson](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgQROiIq-nDYJPBPR74FnCezJN6WMGG28B8QO4NNTqcq-eJaEWQAC1ZTBKuol13SkYxxmV6rLZ6G2lz4dfouUuoxxfDOV4xyjGqYbXvKK5r0XAw5DAneRN8KTW6tsSUZ54TOAqU9_ABSIyOxIXpXb0XtRndUOLWkf3qVkJsMoZ-eqN1jcYb-l6Zgqjn3qpqu1Zi5_Bl2NzWxBViNv-1Dx5MEbBfVi2WTtd13bOkuyceexgjxPJ3tcLGdUaB44SxmBQCjYMoCFdLlys-PsPEq5NTLDy8hNeu-l_hha65HOTUW3U28CItJo5aRimq2QWlPBlFm7vaVq69UlrjJN4gdLUERWMi97Z1ybfAMgv0F66bdTurRu4JUiXDNEoL8ahhVmDuuyYDIRlSdz0VFT7b8dCyqUVviPK_YQL_7jkjGVKFv0sFmun802Ee6Lr-6jJaK4pE6ofXKKUTHDm0y4sJHVV0/3ud/0E_ky-rrR-ug1_I17NVHvw/h7/S9LBKIfOegwQ2dPHYbNOVqtLcf7K31YDH0lhbXguXss) in her historic bid to become Kentucky's first Black woman Attorney General. With 39 years of legal experience at the local, state, federal and international levels, Col. Stevenson is one of the most qualified candidates to ever seek the office of Attorney General.

Electing a Black woman to the U.S. Senate this cycle remains a top organizational priority, and to that end, The Collective PAC proudly endorsed [Congresswoman Barbara Lee](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgQROiIq-nDYJPBPR74FnCezJN6WMGG28B8QO4NNTqcqYjtz4FNWFjcIt7yK7KDRSw0IQrT5f9BquuB0L5svlIhGFDj62zXIMhzEaZ8ohMPDBkXrcyZysb2QyHqp7WDigs8e3Z87IyinOLJi3SevpT_CXupRW2uVTDmxvpx1BuBhZ2lb4Dmf0gzkj7wVJuZtqMgeDMgqBsY89pwd6Igh0BReyq8qy9TSOdz0Dcz7sfkTjqkc6XsGmz60QaiLvJPBNwUIJSYNizC9s4CnmCRk6CRe4-NXqI3PE3BKdqimyBiVQDFtRbIodVGLyfZm2HThoikZWM81dO8dLuOP-fmwvptF_OKfwWU5QENMG9-vVN5EsJn8arIQQXpSOhsBcWJCgsyR2q_WKOwl2p-cd6Wmt_eHDD4ejOlau8R3OI2srh9qTxIJxKDvLFsc4xbuE3m3he8K1lts3Rd5Ohks6w_GgoSviQV-nMEmPRFsuOOCWbG-/3ud/0E_ky-rrR-ug1_I17NVHvw/h8/WrrMFka0pf2w6dcp3NdVRrRyV3_8dHCeO6Noc0UTxWw) from California for the United States Senate, marking our first Senate endorsement of the 2024 election cycle.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | WOMEN’S HISTORY MONTH STATEMENT 2023 Jennifer McClellan Wins Special Election in VA-04 On February 21st, made history in Virginia by becoming the first Black woman to represent the commonwealth in Congress. Her proven track record of enacting progressive change, paired with her experience and passion, will make her a powerful voice in the U.S. House of Representatives. February Endorsements During the month of February, The Collective PAC made its first endorsements in the 2023 and 2024 election cycle. We announced our for 2023 with the following candidates: Kesha Hodge Washington running for Phoenix City Council in Arizona; Ce-Ce Gerlach running for re-election to the At-Large seat for Allentown City Council in Pennsylvania; and Dr. Jared Williams running for re-election to the Fort Worth City Council in Texas. We also endorsed in her historic bid to become Kentucky's first Black woman Attorney General. With 39 years of legal experience at the local, state, federal and international levels, Col. Stevenson is one of the most qualified candidates to ever seek the office of Attorney General. Electing a Black woman to the U.S. Senate this cycle remains a top organizational priority, and to that end, The Collective PAC proudly endorsed from California for the United States Senate, marking our first Senate endorsement of the 2024 election cycle. Article Spotlight Black candidates keep losing winnable races — and say the Democratic Party may be why By Brittany Gibson and Holly Otterbein. “While there are numerous reasons why none of the Black candidates trying to flip seats won, they’ve gravitated to a common theme, one that’s more personal than a typical after-action campaign report: Black candidates needed more trust — and, with it, funding — from the Democratic Party’s infrastructure.” Read the entire article February in Review During Super Bowl weekend, The Collective PAC celebrated the historic wins in November with a dinner in Phoenix, Arizona. We were honored to host Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs, Rep. Jamal Bowman, Rep. Marilyn Strickland, Rep. Nikema Williams, Kansas City, Missouri Mayor Quinton Lucas, and Hon. Reggie Bolding. Together we are ready to elect even more Black candidates to office up and down the ballot in 2023 and 2024. The Collective in the News The Grio - USA TODAY - Roll Call - The Grio - The Washington Post - Thank you for being a part of The Collective Fam! Be sure to follow us on social media (Twitter/IG: @collectivepac) for the latest updates and join us at an upcoming virtual event. Also, don't hesitate to email us at info@collectivepac.org if you have any questions or need additional information. | | | ---|---|--- The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . **Ron DeSantis is DANGEROUS, friend:**

In Florida, he signed anti-LGBTQ+ legislation and restricted access to the ballot box. **Now, the Florida governor and presidential wannabe expressed his _ATROCIOUS support for a BAN ON ABORTIONS_** at six weeks – before most people even know they're pregnant.

But DeSantis is just the latest in a string of GOP leaders attacking abortion rights. Last month, Mike Pence said he supports banning medication abortion and would **_sign a national abortion ban into law as president!_**
We can't sit idly by and let the GOP strip away our fundamental rights. Not now, not ever! At American Bridge, we work to hold Republicans accountable and defeat them at the ballot box, but we rely on your insights to do that.
