name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. name: Wisconsin Senate Update (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
subject: We won’t forget Paul Ryan’s legacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=36%2E35263%2Ev7MDJN ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — You’ll never guess who is being named as a potential
Republican challenger to Tammy for the U.S. Senate.

Paul Ryan.

Remember him? He used to represent Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District
in the House. He was the most conservative nominee for vice president in
over 100 years. He served as Speaker of the House — where he was
hand-picked by the radical right-wing House Freedom Caucus.

While in Congress, he worked to dismantle the Affordable Care Act,
supported anti-abortion legislation, tried to cut funding for Social
Security and Medicare, and embraced President Trump’s MAGA agenda.

And if you’re wondering what he’s been up to since leaving office, he
currently sits on the board of directors for Fox Corporation (you know,
the group that controls Fox News). He’s on tour promoting his new book,
trying to rewrite his record and distance himself from Trump.

Peter, we will never forget the work Paul Ryan did to uplift
Trump’s policies and raise taxes for hard-working Wisconsinites.

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/674?t=1004&akid=36%2E35263%2Ev7MDJN ]Speculation or not, we have to keep Paul Ryan as far away from the U.S.
Senate as possible. Will you rush in $10 or any amount today to stop Paul
Ryan and support Tammy’s campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:
I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Hillary Scholten to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members.

| Friends, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Hillary Scholten to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Hillary’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across West Michigan. But with Hillary serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

_**[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Hillary in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60010337/395726337/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230310-2-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg2ODBmOC04YmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ao2DH1yhPD8VD7vV7Vm-0yEY3D0USjpUgy_YNkgkuio=)**_

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

Team, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Hillary Scholten.** I know she has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for Michigan’s Third Congressional District, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

[_**I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Hillary in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60010339/395726339/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230310-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg2ODBmOC04YmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ao2DH1yhPD8VD7vV7Vm-0yEY3D0USjpUgy_YNkgkuio=)

They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block. Team, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel. But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Hillary Scholten. I know she has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for Michigan’s Third Congressional District, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us, Suzan DelBene Chair, DCCC * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . clean_body: That’s because I’m NOT a politician! | | | | | | | | | | Friend, | You may have noticed that I’m not very politically correct. | But you know what? | I got the world to listen. | Before I ever ran for president, our so-called “leaders” had gone deaf to the concerns of our citizens who were crying out for help. | The Washington swamp had SILENCED you and BETRAYED you – all while they made a fortune off of selling out our country. | But now that I’m on the political stage, you better believe they hear the Silent Majority now! | And the entire world is going to hear the THUNDEROUS VOICE of the “Silent” Majority on November 5, 2024 when we once again take back our country! | But the Soros Money Machine and the powers that be will fight like hell to send you back into the shadows. That’s why I need you to rise up and save America. | "Please watch my THANK YOU VIDEO and – if you can – make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,400% impact." | | | I know I don’t sound like a typical politician, but that’s because I’m NOT a politician. | I saw what politicians were doing to the greatest country in history – and I had to fix it. | Look at what politicians have done to our once magnificent cities... Good-paying jobs were shipped overseas – while deadly drugs and criminal illegal aliens were trafficked in. | Our country became the world’s dumping ground so that politicians could make a quick buck. | We started wars to defend countries that hate us and spent trillions of dollars building up nations you’ve never heard of all while we neglected our own veterans, our own infrastructure, and our own communities. | Here’s the thing: when our country is on fire, I’m not going to speak with a library voice. | I’m going to speak so that YOU are heard. | And I won’t apologize for it. | Because I won’t let them silence the Silent Majority any longer. | When I’m back in the White House, your concerns, your struggles, and your priorities will be heard loud and clear by YOUR president. | Together, we will once again put the people of our country first! | "Please make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund – for 1,300% impact." | | | | Thank you, | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: House Republicans want to force major cuts and hang millions of working families out to dry. = Look, the Republicans have made it clear: if they get their way, funding for Medicaid is on the chopping block. just reported that the House GOP's budget plans would likely force major cuts to Medicaid — making it harder for millions of working families to get the healthcare they need. The safety net has long been a Republican target, but now that they have control of the House, they're closer than ever to making their extreme agenda a reality. = = The American people have repeatedly shown that they oppose cuts to Medicaid, but Republicans aren't listening. They only care about pleasing their special interest donors who've always stood against expanding healthcare. An empowered GOP that's hellbent on cutting care and services is something our country cannot afford. That's why we have to flip the House back in 2024. But if Jennifer loses, Republicans will be on their way to keeping their majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Wexton | Rep. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert’s constant stream of lunatic ranting is a liability even in a lean-red congressional district. Adam Frisch had a strong first run in 2022–coming within less than 600 votes of defeating Boebert—and we can turn it into a win in 2024.
body:
Boebert, go home: 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d65d2ab-910a-4e0b-86f3-8e258b13eccf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, we know it seems like there was just an election and the next one is a ways off, but if we want to take back the House in 2024, building early is the way to do it. And this is one of our best pickup opportunities: Lauren Boebert’s seat. **Because Lauren Boebert just keeps talking. And talking. And talking... It's like she has a disease where she simply can't stop trying to one-up herself by being more unhinged today than she was yesterday.** **_Boebert has openly rooted for Russia vs Ukraine, attacked Discover Card for tracking gun purchases to prevent gun violence as a Communist plot, and sponsored a bill to get rid of the Department of Education._** _Look. If Boebert wants to go shooting her mouth off for the rest of her miserable life, I don't care. That she is doing it while getting paid six figures with our taxpayer dollars and using the microphone given to her to put more Americans and human beings around the world in danger, that I have a serious problem with._ We need our government officials to show up and do their jobs in a serious way that respects the important decisions voters have entrusted to them. Adam Frisch, who came within fewer than 600 votes of sending Boebert home in his first run for Congress in 2022, is someone we can trust to govern with care and not by spectacle. [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80cec737-b4b0-4600-a497-c9d75f30eb15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ba7fa93-e322-43b4-920e-72deb0d28291/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Meanwhile, the accomplished Adam Frisch, who lost to this loud and stupid person by only 546 votes in a lean Trump district in 2022, is running again. Instead of the verbal diarrhea of Boebert, here is an example of the kinds of things to which Frisch is talking about:_ **_Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24–send Boebert off somewhere to talk to herself and take back Kevin McCarthy's gavel._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8f4f51e-5343-4621-a86d-e11d14189fbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication. Always.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3082c636-3768-4b75-b2fb-bdb0abaca3e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Show Support for the Toxics Free Bill Package!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60014575/395728395/1207770575?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjI4MWRkLThlYmYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OgM9aHsy2ekHzEHM3_7sI3z3IJ3XZKBXh0L-4XmjiME=&emci=fa2af29f-85bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1d6281dd-8ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, Toxic chemicals lurk in the items we use everyday, potentially endangering us to numerous health risks like cancer, reproductive disruption, and endocrine disruption. Hazardous chemicals can be found in children’s toys, in our schools through lawn pesticides, and in cosmetics and personal care products. Three bills being considered in the legislature would protect Oregonians from toxic chemical exposure, and it’s urgent that we take action now. Industry opponents continue to lobby against these bills––prioritizing profit over protecting people, particularly our children, from toxic chemicals. So it is imperative that you [reach out to your state representative and show your support for these three bills!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60014577/395728397/1207770575?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjI4MWRkLThlYmYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OgM9aHsy2ekHzEHM3_7sI3z3IJ3XZKBXh0L-4XmjiME=&emci=fa2af29f-85bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1d6281dd-8ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) **HB 3043 (Toxic Free Kids Modernization)** aims to protect children from toxic chemicals by streamlining and increasing the efficiency of the current Toxic Free Kids Program, allows the state to regulate entire classes of chemicals such as PFAS (also known as cancer-causing forever chemicals), and requires reporting of brand-name and product models to be easier for regular people to understand. **SB 426 (Toxic Free Schools)** aims to protect children by implementing safer pesticide use practices and preventing illegal pesticide use in Oregon schools through resources and technological assistance to school districts. It also seeks to modernize the pesticide record-keeping processes and provide equitable pest management support for schools. **SB 546 (Toxic Free Cosmetics)** requires cosmetic manufacturers to disclose all chemical ingredients in their products on their company websites. It would also regulate or prohibit the sale of the worst classes of chemicals in cosmetics and personal care products––such as formaldehyde (a well known carcinogen) and formaldehyde releasers. We need your voice to protect our communities from toxic chemicals. These bills are moving forward and getting scheduled for hearings, so let’s keep the positive momentum going! [Take action today to urge your lawmakers to vote YES on the Toxic Free Bill Package!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60014579/395728399/1207770575?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjI4MWRkLThlYmYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OgM9aHsy2ekHzEHM3_7sI3z3IJ3XZKBXh0L-4XmjiME=&emci=fa2af29f-85bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1d6281dd-8ebf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you for all that you do, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---
|
|

name: Team Brown
subject: Don't let your voice go unheard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We’re reflecting on the road ahead and the victories still to achieve.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60015418/395730939/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230310WomensRights_N_PET_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDVkZGNmZi05MGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEfjwou2pgXzRraxSNeyAG2TX5Aj4jjiS2y42Qw1LfA=) Peter,

This Women’s History Month, we’re paying special attention to the role women, especially Black women, have played in saving our democracy and standing at the forefront of our nation’s social justice movements.

More than two-thirds of Black women voted in 2020—the third highest rate of any race-gender group—stopping Trump from winning reelection and further eroding our democracy. In 2022, Black women showed up again for President Biden, mitigating the GOP’s red wave and delivering positive midterm results for Democrats.

Despite their outsized contributions to American democracy, women are desperately underrepresented in leadership. **Did you know that only 3% of members of Congress have been women?** _That's just 378 women out of 12,506 members throughout the entire history of this country._

Peter, no matter what contributions women have made, we must remember that women are still fighting for their rights today. The Equal Rights Amendment hasn't been ratified, abortion rights are under attack across the country, and leadership positions are still overwhelmingly dominated by men.

Shontel Brown and her Democratic colleagues are committed to giving women the seats at the table they deserve. **Shontel knows that when women succeed, our families, communities, and country succeed.**

[**_**_So, Peter, will you join Shontel in the fight to further women's rights in Congress by signing our petition today? Together, we can send a message to those in power that women deserve equal pay, affordable childcare, access to quality healthcare, and the government out of their reproductive rights._**_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60015419/395730940/-1762299798?refcode=EM_PET_230310WomensRights_N_PET_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDVkZGNmZi05MGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEfjwou2pgXzRraxSNeyAG2TX5Aj4jjiS2y42Qw1LfA=&emci=16123d01-62bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3d5ddcff-90bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60015420/395730941/-1762299798?refcode=EM_PET_230310WomensRights_N_PET_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDVkZGNmZi05MGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEfjwou2pgXzRraxSNeyAG2TX5Aj4jjiS2y42Qw1LfA=&emci=16123d01-62bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3d5ddcff-90bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=23746811) Onwards,

Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

clean_body: We’re reflecting on the road ahead and the victories still to achieve. = Peter, This Women’s History Month, we’re paying special attention to the role women, especially Black women, have played in saving our democracy and standing at the forefront of our nation’s social justice movements. More than two-thirds of Black women voted in 2020—the third highest rate of any race-gender group—stopping Trump from winning reelection and further eroding our democracy. In 2022, Black women showed up again for President Biden, mitigating the GOP’s red wave and delivering positive midterm results for Democrats. Despite their outsized contributions to American democracy, women are desperately underrepresented in leadership. Did you know that only 3% of members of Congress have been women? That's just 378 women out of 12,506 members throughout the entire history of this country. Peter, no matter what contributions women have made, we must remember that women are still fighting for their rights today. The Equal Rights Amendment hasn't been ratified, abortion rights are under attack across the country, and leadership positions are still overwhelmingly dominated by men. Shontel Brown and her Democratic colleagues are committed to giving women the seats at the table they deserve. Shontel knows that when women succeed, our families, communities, and country succeed. Onwards, Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. **I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Gabe Vasquez to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November. I’ve seen Gabe’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across NM-02. But with Gabe serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. **[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Gabe in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016202/395732918/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230310chair_sd_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk0NjAzYy05M2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zR1Xss8ryin6NTERgRtalEGSnYndWABHEM5868HyfdA=)** | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016203/395732919/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230310chair_sd_90da_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk0NjAzYy05M2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zR1Xss8ryin6NTERgRtalEGSnYndWABHEM5868HyfdA=)
---
**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**
Kevin McCarthy and his far-right extremists have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.
Friend, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__
**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Gabe.** I know he has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for NM-02, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.
**[I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Gabe in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016204/395732920/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230310chair_sd_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk0NjAzYy05M2JmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zR1Xss8ryin6NTERgRtalEGSnYndWABHEM5868HyfdA=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Gabe Vasquez to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November. I’ve seen Gabe’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across NM-02. But with Gabe serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. = | = I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher. Kevin McCarthy and his far-right extremists have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block. Friend, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel. But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Gabe. I know he has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for NM-02, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for standing with us, Suzan DelBene Chair, DCCC | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Courts matter, as do women judges all across the state and the world.

| Fellow activist, today is the second-ever International Day of Women Judges, as established by the United Nations.

We are proud to join the international community in recognizing the important contributions of women judges around the world, as well as the importance of equal representation in the courts. The participation of women at all levels of decision-making, on equal terms with men, is essential to true democracy.

You may not know this, but Pennsylvania has done a great job at electing a judiciary with equal representation for women.

We are just about two months away from the Judicial/Municipal/Local Primary Elections. In addition to lower court vacancies, Pennsylvanians will decide who fills several appellate court judicial vacancies: two on our Superior Court, one on our Commonwealth Court, and one on our state Supreme Court. Each of these contests is significant.

Looking ahead to 2025, there will be three justices up for retention elections. This is extremely important to remember.

NPP’s work of civic education and voter engagement is crucial in turning out the vote in this year's Judicial/Municipal/Local Elections. We continue to help educate constituents on why courts matter and how decisions affect our everyday lives. **[Will you donate $10 now to support the work of the New Pennsylvania Project in voter clean_body: Courts matter, as do women judges all across the state and the world. = | Fellow activist, today is the second-ever International Day of Women Judges, as established by the United Nations. We are proud to join the international community in recognizing the important contributions of women judges around the world, as well as the importance of equal representation in the courts. The participation of women at all levels of decision-making, on equal terms with men, is essential to true democracy. You may not know this, but Pennsylvania has done a great job at electing a judiciary with equal representation for women. We are just about two months away from the Judicial/Municipal/Local Primary Elections. In addition to lower court vacancies, Pennsylvanians will decide who fills several appellate court judicial vacancies: two on our Superior Court, one on our Commonwealth Court, and one on our state Supreme Court. Each of these contests is significant. Looking ahead to 2025, there will be three justices up for retention elections. This is extremely important to remember. NPP’s work of civic education and voter engagement is crucial in turning out the vote in this year's Judicial/Municipal/Local Elections. We continue to help educate constituents on why courts matter and how decisions affect our everyday lives. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

body:
Your weekly recap of Illinois Review's top stories that you won't want to miss!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/21a821711c96/alert-conservative-news-update?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

BREAKING: DeVore Seeks Permission from Effingham County Court to Add 2K Plaintiffs to Existing Lawsuit, Court Grants, Now 7K Plaintiffs and 200 FFLs Part of Assault Weapons Ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/breaking-devore-seeks-permission-from-effingham-county-court-to-add-2k-plaintiffs-to-existing-lawsuit-court-grants-now-7k-plaintiffs-and-200-ffls-part-of-assault-weapons-ban-challenge.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Friday, Effingham County Chief Judge Douglas Jarman granted attorney Tom DeVore’s order requesting to amend his initial complaint and include an additional 2,000 plaintiffs to his lawsuit challenging Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban.

DeVore’s lawsuits in total, represent over 7,000 plaintiffs and over 200 Federal Firearms Licensees (FFLs).
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/breaking-devore-seeks-permission-from-effingham-county-court-to-add-2k-plaintiffs-to-existing-lawsuit-court-grants-now-7k-plaintiffs-and-200-ffls-part-of-assault-weapons-ban-challenge.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/breaking-devore-seeks-permission-from-effingham-county-court-to-add-2k-plaintiffs-to-existing-lawsuit-court-grants-now-7k-plaintiffs-and-200-ffls-part-of-assault-weapons-ban-challenge.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Chicago Police Department, Community Honor Fallen Police Office Andres Vasquez Lasso (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/chicago-police-department-community-to-honor-fallen-police-officer-andres-vasquez-lasso-during-thursdays-funeral.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Chicago Police Officer Andres Vasquez Lasso was killed in the line of duty responding to a domestic call last week. The shooting took place by Sawyer Elementary School in the Gage Park neighborhood.

Illinois Review mourns the loss of every officer, because “when a police officer is killed, it’s not an agency that loses an officer, it’s an entire nation.” Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/chicago-police-department-community-to-honor-fallen-police-officer-andres-vasquez-lasso-during-thursdays-funeral.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/chicago-police-department-community-to-honor-fallen-police-officer-andres-vasquez-lasso-during-thursdays-funeral.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Anti-Trump IL GOP Leaders, Who Endorsed RNC Chair Ronna Romney, Now Throwing Support Behind Gov. Ron DeSantis' Potential Presidential Run (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Fresh off a humiliating loss in the primary, the IL GOP is laying the groundwork to support yet another potential candidate – Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, who may run against presidential candidate Donald Trump for the 2024 Republican nomination for president.

But this comes as no surprise.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Power-Hungry Pekau Erasing Orland Park History on Village Website, Setting the Stage for a Referendum that Changes Governing Structure, Giving Him More Power and Money (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/power-hungry-pekau-erasing-orland-park-history-on-village-website-setting-the-stage-for-a-referendum-that-changes-governing-structure-giving-him-more-power-and-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Since the pandemic, the Democrats have tried to rewrite history, even taking credit for the return to in-person learning “in spite of Republicans,” but in Orland Park, Mayor Keith Pekau is doing more than just rewriting history – he’s deleting it altogether on the village’s official website, as residents continue to reject his latest power grab being dubbed a “referendum” – moving the village away from a council-manager form of government to a mayor-council form of government.

Last Thursday, during a standing room only community meeting hosted by
Vote Yes Orland (https://voteyesorland.com/?fbclid=IwAR3SPg3DGILJaPPNDDvZSj50DBnToXkHso08v3CcFzoRHHYZDwZX9qfRzUs&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , a local ballot initiative committee registered with the Illinois State Board of Elections, over a hundred Orland Park residents stood alongside Vote Yes to publicly express their opposition to Pekau’s latest attempt to become the most powerful political figure in Orland Park in forty years. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/power-hungry-pekau-erasing-orland-park-history-on-village-website-setting-the-stage-for-a-referendum-that-changes-governing-structure-giving-him-more-power-and-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/power-hungry-pekau-erasing-orland-park-history-on-village-website-setting-the-stage-for-a-referendum-that-changes-governing-structure-giving-him-more-power-and-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Caulkins' Sprint to the IL Supreme Court Jeopardizes Rights of Thousands of Illinoisans and Livelihoods of Hundreds of Small Business Owners and Their Employees (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/kaspar-caulkins-sprint-to-the-il-supreme-court-jeopardizes-rights-of-thousands-of-illinoisans-and-livelihoods-of-hundreds-of-small-business-owners-and-their-employees.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

A direct appeal to the Illinois Supreme Court on the basis of the Temporary Restraining Orders entered against the Assault Weapons Ban – the Equal Protection violation – brought by Gov. Pritzker and stipulated to by Illinois State Rep. Dan Caulkins of Decatur, now jeopardizes the rights of thousands of Illinoisans safeguarded under those orders – including the livelihoods of hundreds of small business gun shop owners and their employees. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/kaspar-caulkins-sprint-to-the-il-supreme-court-jeopardizes-rights-of-thousands-of-illinoisans-and-livelihoods-of-hundreds-of-small-business-owners-and-their-employees.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/kaspar-caulkins-sprint-to-the-il-supreme-court-jeopardizes-rights-of-thousands-of-illinoisans-and-livelihoods-of-hundreds-of-small-business-owners-and-their-employees.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=127d964aa7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_10_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-127d964aa7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

body:
|
---
Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ****_2023 Session: INDems Stand Firm Against INGOP Culture Wars as Legislative Session Reaches Halfway Point_ As the Indiana legislative session reaches its halfway point, the INGOP are continuing their ‘slate of hate’ against LGBTQ Hoosiers, organized labor, and voting access. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **2023 Session: INDems Stand Firm Against INGOP Culture Wars as Legislative Session Reaches Halfway Point As the Indiana legislative session reaches its halfway point, the INGOP are continuing their ‘slate of hate’ against LGBTQ Hoosiers, organized labor, and voting access. INDems denounced these attacks this week and remain focused on practical solutions to the issues facing Indiana. Indiana’s future has dimmed under the GOP’s nearly 20-year watch. Hoosiers have an and the state has a , a , the in the nation, and the . Indiana Democrats are committed to building an Indiana where everyone has a chance to succeed and the government doesn’t get in the way. Democrats at the Statehouse have been focused on , making , creating for students, improving , and increasing . We hope that the INGOP will join House and Senate Democrats in prioritizing the needs of Hoosier families and workers, rather than pushing a divisive, harmful agenda. See INDems’ release by . ' Slate of hate': anti-LGBTQ legislation could push Indiana to bottom of national rankings Indiana is poised to join the least welcoming states for transgender rights because of the INGOP’s ‘slate of hate’. Transgender rights are human rights, and everyone deserves to be treated with dignity and respect. Discrimination against the transgender community has no place in Indiana or anywhere else in the country. It is disappointing to see that the Indiana GOP is not following the mantra of Hoosier Hospitality. INDems believe that everyone should be welcomed with open arms, regardless of their background or identity. Yet, the recent efforts to discriminate against the transgender community show a lack of understanding and empathy for our fellow Hoosiers. Indiana Democrats will stand up for the rights of all Hoosiers and reject any legislation that seeks to discriminate against our transgender neighbors. **Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Senator Andrea Hunley passed a bill out of the Indiana Senate that creates a “Vision Zero Task Force” focusing on improving safety across Indiana roadways. Sen. Hunley said the following after its passage, “It’s important to know that 40 people is 40 too many. What the Vision Zero Task Force does is it looks at data, it looks at what’s working in other cities and states and municipalities not just in the US but around the world so we can reduce that number to zero.” now heads to the Indiana House to be considered. ** Marion County is MARCHing to the Polls ** Join the Marion County Democratic Party as they seek to engage with the community and understand better how to increase voter turnout. They will make their way through all of the Marion County townships, and you can come and share your own voting experiences with local leaders. | William G. Boykin Lieutenant General (Retired) US Army

| Dear Friend,
I am honored to receive the endorsement of Brother in Christ and fellow special operations veteran, William Gerald "Jerry" Boykin, retired American Lieutenant General. He has an incredible lifetime of service to our country, including thirteen years in Delta Force. He is now working to advance faith, family, and freedom in public policy and culture, across our nation, from a biblical worldview. Learn more about General Boykin [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMkG5MidxXNNYJ7NCjIuOGdLbzlCCrdfUCffNWTJFUrzA4ellx-RJUoi0mKNBlwIcCFoN8bW6Lwcv-YEL_gdDiQxgGnWlXtK5eA83kHMMDLI0TrKHdMPRpQE7FboNWWGWWIv_B0cKFrmMs19H-NkWJjkSVFOfqaVFaWgt8isu18ZoK8kgtaJKQ==&c=7yLYZMzv0DGmPkh4cTtVTptm7t7nivkw3h3vMTqEo3INpjvrGfxicg==&ch=kNTBG2nlVyMGEwrMaw6JcYNcXwmhLqThcznQiMsBZd4w5gakZx2Uig==).
General Boykin resides in Senate District 10 in Prince Edward County and is currently Executive Vice President at the [Family Research Council](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMkG5MidxXNNYJ7NCjIuOGdLbzlCCrdfUCffNWTJFUrzA4ellx-RJUoi0mKNBlwIVbeO0AhGPHaqC5efU3b8VVkrq2Tc52KN9MsAJHskU_nI0pOUU3Nkc7tqJLuLyPU1jS49iIBOevw=&c=7yLYZMzv0DGmPkh4cTtVTptm7t7nivkw3h3vMTqEo3INpjvrGfxicg==&ch=kNTBG2nlVyMGEwrMaw6JcYNcXwmhLqThcznQiMsBZd4w5gakZx2Uig==).
---
| | |
---|---
|
"I am pleased to announce my endorsement of Delegate John McGuire's candidacy for Virginia Senate District 10. As a fellow veteran, I am grateful for his 10 years of service to our nation. As a Navy SEAL, John has demonstrated incredible bravery and dedication defending our nation on missions across the globe. When he was told after an accident that he would never walk again, through the grace of God, he was able to overcome his injuries and get back on his feet. Our shared values of life, family, and religious liberties are under attack like never before, and it's going to take men like John McGuire to fight for them. I know the same spirit that sustained John McGuire on missions overseas, and the grit and determination that he showed in coming back from a serious injury will serve him well in the Virginia Senate. I wholeheartedly endorse Delegate John McGuire's bid for election to the Virginia Senate District 10 and I encourage others who care about the preservation of our Republic to do so as well."

For America,
William G. Boykin Lieutenant General (Retired) U.S. Army

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire

subject: Unlike the DCCC…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Unlike the DCCC, we will never scare you in an attempt to get you to make
a donation. The sky isn’t falling and there is no reason to kiss all hope
goodbye.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130966?refcode=em20230310-27920&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=27920%2E1203867%2E8jiwda ]Instead, we will politely ask that you contribute $3
right now to support our work and make sure we reach our $20,535 mid-month
fundraising goal. Can you make a contribution?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130966?refcode=em20230310-27920&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27920%2E1203867%2E8jiwda ]Contribute $3

We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. And we don’t employ firms
associated with union busting, Big Pharma, or the GOP. Meanwhile,
corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma,
payday loan companies, and union-busters. AND the Democratic Party has
routinely hired firms that protect the interests of banks, pharmaceutical
companies, and fossil fuel executives.

It’s clear: Justice Democrats will fight for the people, the Democratic
establishment will work for their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130966?refcode=em20230310-27920&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27920%2E1203867%2E8jiwda ]Will you donate today to help us find the next slate of progressive
challenger candidates and then win our primaries against the Democratic
establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates? Together, we can
overcome the odds and grow the Squad in Congress.

Thank you for all that you do to support our work and our primary
candidates.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27920%2E1203867%2E8jiwda ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27920%2E1203867%2E8jiwda ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Unlike the DCCC, we will never scare you in an attempt to get you to make a donation. The sky isn’t falling and there is no reason to kiss all hope goodbye. [ ]Instead, we will politely ask that you contribute $3 right now to support our work and make sure we reach our $20,535 mid-month fundraising goal. Can you make a contribution? [ ]Contribute $3 We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. And we don’t employ firms associated with union busting, Big Pharma, or the GOP. Meanwhile, corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma, payday loan companies, and union-busters. AND the Democratic Party has routinely hired firms that protect the interests of banks, pharmaceutical companies, and fossil fuel executives. It’s clear: Justice Democrats will fight for the people, the Democratic establishment will work for their corporate donors. [ ]Will you donate today to help us find the next slate of progressive challenger candidates and then win our primaries against the Democratic establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates? Together, we can overcome the odds and grow the Squad in Congress. Thank you for all that you do to support our work and our primary candidates. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. We just wanted to be sure you saw this email from Congresswoman Suzan DelBene announcing that Chris was added to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Frontline program.
| Hi Derek,

We’ll keep this brief. We just wanted to be sure you saw this email from DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene announcing that Chris was added to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s **Frontline program.**

**This is a big moment for our campaign.** Even though we’re only three months into 2023, top election experts have predicted our 2024 race will be one of the most competitive in the entire country. It’s clear that for Democrats to take back the House majority, we must keep PA-17 blue and defend Chris’s seat.

**We can’t do it without you, Derek. That’s why we have to ask:[Can you chip in $10, $15, or more today to our Frontline race today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016773/395734627/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODhkZWJkYS05NmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2GQU1s8IBqJJkWGQZmQdJSoLf0SDcZIFhohPk7TDvE=)**

Thank you for being on our team,

Team Deluzio

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Congresswoman Suzan DelBene**
Date: Fri, March 10, 2023 at 10:12 AM
Subject: Proud to be in Chris Deluzio’s corner Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Chris Deluzio to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Chris’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across western Pennsylvania. But with Chris serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

**[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $15 to help keep Chris in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016775/395734629/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODhkZWJkYS05NmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2GQU1s8IBqJJkWGQZmQdJSoLf0SDcZIFhohPk7TDvE=)** | **[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016777/395734631/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODhkZWJkYS05NmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2GQU1s8IBqJJkWGQZmQdJSoLf0SDcZIFhohPk7TDvE=)**
---
**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Chris.** I know Chris has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for PA-17, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

**[I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Chris in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60016779/395734633/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.10_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODhkZWJkYS05NmJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2GQU1s8IBqJJkWGQZmQdJSoLf0SDcZIFhohPk7TDvE=)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: 100% committed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I'm counting on you to speak out alongside me, friend.
| | |
---
Friend,

Before my wife, Connie, agreed to our first date in 2003 – before she even met me – she needed to know just one thing: my voting record on reproductive rights and LGBTQ+ rights. Both had to be 100% – otherwise, no date.

**Here we are 20 years later, and I am still fighting for both – especially at a time when these fundamental rights are under attack.**
In our post-Roe world, GOP lawmakers from Texas to my home state of Ohio are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive rights. More than a dozen GOP-led states have already banned abortion outright.

Personally, I find it absurd and dangerous that any politician should have control over another person's personal health care decisions. **And poll after poll shows that the majority of Americans agree.**
I'll never waver in this fight to protect women’s freedom over their own bodies – but it's not a fight any one of us can win alone. With the GOP's attacks escalating, we've _all_ got to keep speaking out as loud as possible.
**That's why I'm looking for just 185 more folks in PA ****to ta****ke part in my live poll, and I'm counting on you to be one of them, friend. So please, before our crucial midnight deadline, let me know:**
| | **Do you believe we should restore reproductive rights for all?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60017433/395737245/-174210758?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk14-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhhZDhhYy05OGJmLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmFq8jZ6Q-r9F0f3yCuG1Bm_I4UPaWJnpmdsGzt5PGE=&emci=14baf493-76bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f8ad8ac-98bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)

Personally, I find it absurd and dangerous that any politician should have control over another person's personal health care decisions. And poll after poll shows that the majority of Americans agree. I'll never waver in this fight to protect women’s freedom over their own bodies – but it's not a fight any one of us can win alone. With the GOP's attacks escalating, we've all got to keep speaking out as loud as possible. That's why I'm looking for just 185 more folks in PA to take part in my live poll, and I'm counting on you to be one of them, friend. So please, before our crucial midnight deadline, let me know: | | Do you believe we should restore reproductive rights for all? | | | | Thank you for adding your voice to this critical fight. In solidarity, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

| | I was a kid when my dad took me to school **and told me that, if I went through those school doors and worked hard, I could do just about anything.** Many years later I was the first in my family to graduate from college. Dad and mom knew the value of education and instilled a love of learning. They knew the value of a book that challenges your thinking. They knew that **with knowledge and reading comes opportunity and freedom.** But today books are being banned across the country by local school boards, county governments, and even state legislatures. **Book banning is a sign of rising authoritarianism.[I am standing against banning books and I need you to stand with me. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: What your $5 gift can do -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)
---
If you knew that $5 could change the course of political history for a generation, would you make that contribution?

If you knew $5 could guarantee we **hold our Senate majority so we can pass President Biden's bold agenda, prevent Republicans from blocking our progress, and keep America on track** , would you take that leap?

[**Now's your chance: We're running behind today's must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal, and we need support from folks like you. Will you donate $5 now to help make up the difference and defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)**

Here's what I mean when I talk about $5: President Biden's critical agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate, and Republicans only need TWO seats to regain power. **That's all that is stopping them from completely stonewalling President Biden's transformative agenda.**

Democrats in battleground states across the country are up for re-election -- and we're looking at multiple _extremely close_ races. _One loss_ could be _devastating_.

**I'm not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide our political future.** But right now, we're still waiting on a contribution from you today, and I know you wouldn't want to miss out on a chance like this to be a real difference-maker.

[**If everyone reading this message contributed right now, we'd hit today's goal in no time. But as it stands right now, Republicans are threatening to outraise us. We can't let that happen -- and it all starts with $5. Please, contribute now:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)
---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=9&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)
---

Republicans _will_ outraise us if we don't rise up to the challenge. And they could take back the Senate -- maybe by a margin so thin that meeting today's goal would be enough to stop them.

But we'll never know unless folks across the country band together and pitch in $5 to protect our Senate majority.

I know that $5 doesn't sound like a lot in the face of the GOP megadonor machine, but think of it this way: **We have strength in numbers, and if we learned anything from defying history in 2022, it's that our numbers are greater -- as long as everyone steps up to do their part.**

[**Control of the Senate is in our hands, and I’m counting on YOU to keep it there. $5 just might make the difference -- so please chip in now.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)**

I'm so grateful to have you on our team,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12319?t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230310-ChuckSchumer-Schumer5-Pros-sl1&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=10052_9716520_FVYTDA&akid=10052%2E9716520%2EFVYTDA)**.

name: Team Cori
subject: Thank an abortion provider today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Today is Abortion Provider Appreciation Day — a day to celebrate and honor the necessary and life-saving work of abortion care providers everywhere.
We show our appreciation for abortion care providers on this day because 23 years ago Dr. David Gunn, an abortion care provider, was murdered outside his clinic by a white supremacist and anti-abortion extremist.
Dr. Gunn is believed to be one of the first abortion care providers murdered for their work, but we know attacks on both care providers and abortion access — as well as racially-motivated attacks — have only _increased_ since his death in 1996.
Addressing the link between white supremacy, legislative attacks on reproductive healthcare, and violence towards care providers can be uncomfortable, **but that’s exactly why we need Cori’s leadership — in Congress, in our community, and on the ground.[Will you make a contribution to support Cori’s efforts to defend abortion access today?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230310.iWfs8M&amount=5&refcode=em20230310-2310&t=1&akid=2310%2E1082990%2E70Lao2)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230310.iWfs8M&refcode=em20230310-2310&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2310%2E1082990%2E70Lao2)**
As attacks on abortion rights began escalating last year, Cori began sharing her own abortion story, protesting with the community, and leading the fight to pass urgent reproductive health protections, including the introduction of a bill to protect access for medication abortion.
Cori was arrested last summer while protesting for abortion rights at the Supreme Court — she knows even if it means putting our bodies on the line, we must raise up our voices in this pivotal moment to make our demands clear:**Abortion care is health care and health care is a human right.**
**[We need leaders like Cori who will fight for justice and won’t back down. Show your support of Cori’s fight to defend abortion access: Chip in $5 or any amount meaningful to you right now.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230310.iWfs8M&refcode=em20230310-2310&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2310%2E1082990%2E70Lao2)**
Thanks for your support, Peter — and remember to thank an abortion care provider today.
—Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230310?refcode=em20230310-2310-footer&t=22&refcode2=2310_1082990_70Lao2&akid=2310%2E1082990%2E70Lao2) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=23&akid=2310%2E1082990%2E70Lao2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2310%2E1082990%2E70Lao2)

name: Joe Biden
subject: Democrats are delivering (and we have to keep it up)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Thanks to this grassroots team, Democrats are delivering for the American people. But we’re not done just yet. | |
---
You’ve heard me say it before, and I’ll say it again: Nothing's beyond our capacity. The United States of America is the only nation in the world that has come out of every crisis stronger than before we went in, and that's what we're doing now. With the help of this team, Democrats passed the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in the history of the world and the most significant federal gun control legislation in nearly _30 years_. The economy has created 12 million new jobs -- the strongest two years of growth in history _by a longshot_. We delivered the biggest investment in American infrastructure since President Eisenhower's administration. _(I’ll stop there for now, Derek)_. But for as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We need to:
* Make the cost of insulin $35/month for every American
* Pass affordable child care and family paid leave
* Ban assault weapons and limit the number of bullets
* Codify _Roe v. Wade_
* And so much more

**Kamala and I can’t do it alone -- it’s going to take the full support of this team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you make a $7 donation to the DNC today to invest in the resources Democrats are relying on to win races in every corner of this great nation?**

clean_body: Thanks to this grassroots team, Democrats are delivering for the American people. But we’re not done just yet. | | You’ve heard me say it before, and I’ll say it again: Nothing's beyond our capacity. The United States of America is the only nation in the world that has come out of every crisis stronger than before we went in, and that's what we're doing now. With the help of this team, Democrats passed the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in the history of the world and the most significant federal gun control legislation in nearly 30 years. The economy has created 12 million new jobs -- the strongest two years of growth in history by a longshot. We delivered the biggest investment in American infrastructure since President Eisenhower's administration. (I’ll stop there for now, Derek). But for as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We need to: Make the cost of insulin $35/month for every American Pass affordable child care and family paid leave Ban assault weapons and limit the number of bullets Codify Roe v. Wade And so much more Kamala and I can’t do it alone -- it’s going to take the full support of this team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you make a $7 donation to the DNC today to invest in the resources Democrats are relying on to win races in every corner of this great nation? Thanks to folks like you who donated their time and money to support our party through the midterms -- Democrats are delivering. Actually, we are delivering big time. But we need to keep our foot on the gas. Thank you for all that you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: CaucusRoom
subject: Liberals Ruin Everything
body:
Soak the Rich! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! Have you noticed the new update to the website? You can now react to comments! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-j/) **Soak the Rich** Biden proposed**[an array of tax hikes in his annual budget request to Congress that would dramatically raise the rates](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-t/) **paid by corporations and wealthy Americans. **Nine More Boxes** **[Nine boxes of documents were taken from Biden's attorney Patrick Moore's Boston office](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-i/),** but have yet to be reviewed. _That is a lot of documents._ **Stealing Military Secrets** **[China achieved its fifth-generation fighter jet by copying U.S. military tech](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-d/), **and it could maintain its pacing challenge for the American military if more isn't done to safeguard sensitive weapons information**.** **Sidelined by Fauci**
## Former CDC Director Dr. Robert Redfield told lawmakers that**[Dr. Anthony Fauci "sidelined" him from internal debates about the origin of COVID-19](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-h/) **at the start of the pandemic.
**First****Amendment**** Rights** **[The Twitter Files hearing erupted as Matt Taibbi refused to reveal his sources](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-k/)** in a heated exchange with Democrats. **They Ruin Everything** First lady Jill Biden and Secretary of State Antony Blinken [**were slammed for presenting a biological male from Argentina with an award for women on International Women 's Day.**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-u/)

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* That stuff is **[for the birds](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* There are **[all types](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* **[Dad Jokes](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* **[Oh No!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjkitl-trhiujldw-q/)**!
